description: Enables the caster to use all attack skills at +5%. It will also add +1 to AG in terms of combat ranking and characteristic struggles, it will not add to skills based on AG This spell will not increase parry or dodge skills nor may it be used in conjunction with other attack skill magics.
short_description: Enables the caster to use all attack skills at +5%.

description: Reduces the skill chance of any attacks made against the caster by 5%. This can include missile attacks aimed at the caster. The spell will also reduce the attacker’s AG by 1 point in terms of combat ranking and characteristic struggles against the caster. This will not reduce the attacker’s parry or dodge skills, nor will it affect their other AG based skills. The spell cannot be used in conjunction with other attack skill magics. c
short_description: Reduces the skill chance of any attacks made against the caster by 5%. This can include missile attacks aimed at the caster.

description: Creates a glowing silvery weapon around the caster’s hand. The weapon can be used either like a dagger or a punch attack depending on how the hand is held when attacking. In either case it will cause 1D4+1 damage on a successful hit. The caster will not take damage to their hand or feel pain when hitting armour or if the weapon is parried. Xama Chom \ attack stasis 2 12R 20Sd Reduces the skill chance of any attacks, including missile attacks, made against the caster by -10%. The spell will also reduce the attacker’s AG by 2 points in terms of combat ranking and characteristic struggles against the caster. This will not reduce the attacker’s parry or dodge skills, nor will it affect their other AG based skills. The spell cannot be used in conjunction with other attack skill magics.
short_description: Creates a glowing silvery weapon around the caster’s hand. The weapon can be used either like a dagger or a punch attack depending on how the hand is held when attacking.

description: Gives the caster a sense of forewarning of any imminent or surprise attacks. This will allow the caster a chance to react. Perhaps draw a weapon, warn their companions or to dodge the attack when it happens.
short_description: Gives the caster a sense of forewarning of any imminent or surprise attacks. This will allow the caster a chance to react.

description: Brings a dropped or discarded weapon to the caster’s hand. The caster merely has to gesture to the weapon required. This may also cover arrows if within range (provided they are not stuck in something or someone).
short_description: Brings a dropped or discarded weapon to the caster’s hand. The caster merely has to gesture to the weapon required.

description: Gives the caster +10% on any of their missile weapon skill chances. The combination will also increase the caster’s DFT by +2 for the purposes of combat ranking and characteristic struggles. The spell cannot be used with other missile attack skill magics.
short_description: Gives the caster +10% on any of their missile weapon skill chances. The combination will also increase the caster’s DFT by +2 for the purposes of combat ranking and characteristic struggles.

description: Allows the caster to fire or throw a missile weapon and almost immediately pull a fresh missile from its scabbard or quiver. This allows the caster the chance to fire more than once in a round. The caster may continue to automatically draw missiles whilst the spell is running. It should be noted that the spell does not draw the bow or aim the throw, nor will it crank a crossbow.
short_description: Allows the caster to fire or throw a missile weapon and almost immediately pull a fresh missile from its scabbard or quiver. This allows the caster the chance to fire more than once in a round.

description: Enables the caster to switch almost instantly between any weapons carried about their person. The fresh weapon jumping to their hand and the discarded weapon jumping back into its scabbard or normal place of storage. As a result there is hardly any pause preparing the new weapon, allowing it to be used straight away, even halfway through a round of combat.
short_description: Enables the caster to switch almost instantly between any weapons carried about their person.

description: Gives the caster a missile-point-view of the missile touched at the time of casting. The caster simply needs to close their eyes whilst the spell is running to see the missile’s view, as it is fired or simply thrown.
short_description: Gives the caster a missile-point-view of the missile touched at the time of casting.

description: Touching a missile such as an arrow or stone allows the caster to hear sounds in its proximity. If the missile is subsequently shot or thrown, the caster will continue to hear the sounds in the area it lands. The caster need only concentrate to filter out the sounds around them from the sounds sent from the spell.
short_description: Touching a missile such as an arrow or stone allows the caster to hear sounds in its proximity.

description: Repairs the equivalent of 1D6 HP on a damaged weapon. This will be doubled to 2D6 if the enchanter uses Key stored in arbine. If the weapon is completely broken then the spell may only be effective if the roll is very high. This spell cannot be cast multiple times to repair the same area of damage. The weapon will need to go to an armour smith if the spell fails to restore all the HP.
short_description: Repairs the equivalent of 1D6 HP on a damaged weapon. This will be doubled to 2D6 if the enchanter uses Key stored in arbine.

description: Causes 1D6 HP of damage to a weapon by touching it. The affected area of the weapon will become crazed and weakened. If the weapon is magical this spell will usually fail, although at the referee’s discretion, it may cause the magic to stall for 1D6R, depending upon the nature of the magic involved.
short_description: Causes 1D6 HP of damage to a weapon by touching it. The affected area of the weapon will become crazed and weakened.

description: Adds +20% to all the caster’s melee attack skills. The combination will also increase the their AG by +4 for the purposes of combat ranking and combat characteristic struggles. This will not add to any of the caster’s other skills which are based on AG. This spell will not increase parry, dodge or missile weapon skills. It cannot be used to layer-up any other spells that increase attack skills.
short_description: Adds +20% to all the caster’s melee attack skills. The combination will also increase the their AG by +4 for the purposes of combat ranking and combat characteristic struggles.

description: Creates a glowing sphere in the caster’s hand. The caster may throw the sphere at any target up to 10Sd distance using their throw skill, or basic attack if they have none. The sphere will cause 1D4+1 damage in a magical explosion to the target on impact. Once the caster has thrown a sphere, a new one will appear in their hand at the start of the next round. Once the spell ends the sphere in the caster’s hand will remain for 1R before vanishing.
short_description: Creates a glowing sphere in the caster’s hand. The caster may throw the sphere at any target up to 10Sd distance using their throw skill, or basic attack if they have none.

description: Reduces the skill chance of any attacks, including missile attacks, made against the caster by -20%. The spell will also reduce the attacker’s AG by 4 points in terms of combat ranking and characteristic struggles against the caster. This will not reduce the attacker’s parry or dodge skills, nor will it affect their other AG based skills. The spell cannot be used in conjunction with other attack skill magics.
short_description: Reduces the skill chance of any attacks, including missile attacks, made against the caster by -20%.

description: Enables the caster to attempt to pull the weapon from a target’s hand by matching their KEY to the target’s STR in a characteristic struggle. If the caster succeeds, then the target’s weapon will be wrenched from their hand and fly to the caster’s. Even if the caster should fail in the struggle the target will lose their attack and any parries with that weapon for that round.
short_description: Enables the caster to attempt to pull the weapon from a target’s hand by matching their KEY to the target’s STR in a characteristic struggle.

description: Allows the caster to sense the presence of any hidden traps or ambushes in range of the caster. Like XAMA-SHASS, this spell will also forewarn the caster of any imminent, unexpected attack and allow them to avoid being surprised.
short_description: Allows the caster to sense the presence of any hidden traps or ambushes in range of the caster.

description: Completely conceals any weapons the caster is carrying about their person. If they are searched, the searcher will not be able to find anything whilst the spell is in effect. The spell is less likely to conceal a large weapon slung about the person such as a bow or giant axe although if the caster succeeds in a KEY vs an onlooker’s INT roll, then the onlooker will fail to notice the obvious. If the caster choses to draw one of the concealed weapons it will immediately become apparent to anyone watching.
short_description: Completely conceals any weapons the caster is carrying about their person. If they are searched, the searcher will not be able to find anything whilst the spell is in effect.

description: Hides the caster’s motion from a target’s peripheral vision so that they are not alerted to the caster’s surprise attack. The spell will not make the caster quiet, however and the target may still be alerted in this way. The spell does not make the caster invisible and if they are in full view the target can see them. If they are to the side or behind, they are much more difficult to spot.
short_description: Hides the caster’s motion from a target’s peripheral vision so that they are not alerted to the caster’s surprise attack.

description: Creates a magical silvery weapon around the caster’s hand. The weapon can be used for a punch or knife attack depending how the caster holds their hand at the time of casting. The magical weapon will cause 2D4+2 damage on a successful hit. The caster will not take damage to their hand or feel pain when hitting armour or if the weapon is parried.
short_description: Creates a magical silvery weapon around the caster’s hand. The weapon can be used for a punch or knife attack depending how the caster holds their hand at the time of casting.

description: Allows the caster to elect to take only half damage from a single blow at any point whilst the spell is active. Generally this will be the next blow they receive, but the caster can elect to defer the effect. They must do this before the damage is rolled.
short_description: Allows the caster to elect to take only half damage from a single blow at any point whilst the spell is active.

description: The weapon upon which this is cast will take no damage when parrying a critical blow or conditions which may affect its HP. The spell will also protect the weapon from the effects of XAMA YLG or XAMA GHAN YLG spells.
short_description: The weapon upon which this is cast will take no damage when parrying a critical blow or conditions which may affect its HP.

description: Helps mend a damaged weapon. The spell will repair the equivalent of 2D6 weapon HP (doubled if the caster uses Key stored in arbine). Note that, if the weapon is actually broken and on zero HP, then the spell may not work (at the referee’s discretion).
short_description: Helps mend a damaged weapon. The spell will repair the equivalent of 2D6 weapon HP (doubled if the caster uses Key stored in arbine).

description: Allows the caster to match their KEY against the HP of the target’s weapon. If they succeed, the weapon will snap, shatter or crumble beyon repair. The spell will have no effect if the weapon is protected by magic or has magic currently cast upon it.
short_description: Allows the caster to match their KEY against the HP of the target’s weapon. If they succeed, the weapon will snap, shatter or crumble beyon repair.

description: Enchants a weapon to enable it to cause magical damage to a target including spirits or undead creatures that might otherwise be unaffected by mundane weapons. On a successful hit the enchanted weapon will cause 1D4 Key damage to the target. This may appear in different ways for different creatures. This magical damage can also be done to a living creature on top of the weapon’s normal damage. It should be noted that if the target has armour, then the weapon’s mundane damage must penetrate the armour before any Key damage is caused.
short_description: Enchants a weapon to enable it to cause magical damage to a target including spirits or undead creatures that might otherwise be unaffected by mundane weapons.

description: Creates an insubstantial glowing weapon around the caster’s hand. The weapon can be used for a punch or knife attack depending how the caster holds their hand at the time of casting. The magical weapon will cause 1D4+1 damage on a successful hit. Being magical the weapon may penetrate up to 3 points of armour, including magical armour. The caster may feel pain when hitting armour. If their attack is parried, they must roll for luck (Keyx3) or take 1D4+1 damage to their own hand.
short_description: Creates an insubstantial glowing weapon around the caster’s hand. The weapon can be used for a punch or knife attack depending how the caster holds their hand at the time of casting.

description: Summons all the caster’s dropped or stored weapons and arrows to them over the course of 1R. The weapons will not fly at the caster lethally, they will slow as they get near and if possible slot into their scabbards or quivers. The caster may also grasp a weapon as it approaches if they wish. If the caster possesses no weapons in range then a selection of random weapons from within range of the spell will be called.
short_description: Summons all the caster’s dropped or stored weapons and arrows to them over the course of 1R.

description: Allows the caster to elect to take no damage from a single blow at any point whilst the spell is active. Generally this will be the next blow they receive, but the caster can elect to defer the effect. They must do this before the damage is rolled.
short_description: Allows the caster to elect to take no damage from a single blow at any point whilst the spell is active.

description: Should an attacker land a blow upon them, the spell will automatically match the caster’s KEY against the HP of the weapon in a characteristic struggle. If the caster wins, the weapon will break. This will occur even if the weapon failed to cause damage to the caster. If the weapon is magical, then it will not suffer damage.
short_description: Should an attacker land a blow upon them, the spell will automatically match the caster’s KEY against the HP of the weapon in a characteristic struggle. If the caster wins, the weapon will break.

description: Creates a glowing sphere in the caster’s hand. The caster may throw the sphere at any target up to 10Sd distance using their throw skill, or basic attack if they have none. The sphere will magically explode on impact causing 1D10+1 damage. Being magical itself, the explosion may penetrate up to 5 points of magical armour. Once the caster has thrown a sphere, a new one will appear in their hand at the start of the next round. When the spell ends the sphere in the caster’s hand will vanish after 1R.
short_description: Creates a glowing sphere in the caster’s hand. The caster may throw the sphere at any target up to 10Sd distance using their throw skill, or basic attack if they have none.

description: Allows the caster to elect to take no damage from a single blow at any point whilst the spell is active. Generally this will be the next blow they receive, but the caster can elect to defer the effect. They must do this before the damage is rolled. At the same time the caster will automatically match their KEY against the HP of the weapon in a characteristic struggle. If the caster wins, the weapon will break. This will occur even if the weapon failed to cause damage to the caster. If the weapon is magical, then it will not suffer damage, unless the roll is a critical.
short_description: Allows the caster to elect to take no damage from a single blow at any point whilst the spell is active.

description: Adds 5% to all the caster’s parry and dodge skills.
short_description: Adds 5% to all the caster’s parry and dodge skills.

description: Reduces any parry or dodge skill rolls, made against the caster’s attacks, by 5%. This can include targets the caster fires missile weapons at over a considerable distance. This reduction only applies to attacks made by the caster.
short_description: Reduces any parry or dodge skill rolls, made against the caster’s attacks, by 5%. This can include targets the caster fires missile weapons at over a considerable distance.

description: Improves the caster’s anticipation of an opponent’s attacks, giving an additional 15% on all parry and dodge skill rolls whilst the spell is active.
short_description: Improves the caster’s anticipation of an opponent’s attacks, giving an additional 15% on all parry and dodge skill rolls whilst the spell is active.

description: Creates a magical defence about the caster’s body giving +1 armour protection. The defence will give off a faint shimmering glow. This may also be interpreted as increasing the caster’s attribute resistance rolls to cold, heat, poison or disease by 1pt. The spell will not be effective in increasing the caster’s resistance to magic. This spell may be cast on top of existing armour, adding to its defence, but cannot be used in conjunction with any other defensive spells. Critical hits by non-magical weapons will not ignore this protection.
short_description: Creates a magical defence about the caster’s body giving +1 armour protection. The defence will give off a faint shimmering glow.

description: Magically reduces the target’s armour by 1pt. This may also be interpreted as reducing the target’s attribute resistance rolls to cold, heat, poison or disease by 1pt. The spell will not be effective in reducing the target’s resistance to magic.
short_description: Magically reduces the target’s armour by 1pt. This may also be interpreted as reducing the target’s attribute resistance rolls to cold, heat, poison or disease by 1pt.

description: Allows the caster to determine what sort of defences and weaknesses an opponent, place or object has. The spell will not give the caster a detailed explanation but will provide them with a vague idea. Thus if the spell were cast upon a vampire, it would inform them that the vampire is very well protected from physical attack but vulnerable to certain light, without letting caster know what kind of light or how much damage the vampire might suffer.
short_description: Allows the caster to determine what sort of defences and weaknesses an opponent, place or object has. The spell will not give the caster a detailed explanation but will provide them with a vague idea.

description: Summons an invisible arm to defend the caster’s back. The arm must be given a suitable shield, parrying weapon, stool, frying pan with which to operate. It may make one parry each round against attacks made at the caster’s back, effectively adding one full parry combat action. The arm has a parry skill of 50 with whatever it is using.
short_description: Summons an invisible arm to defend the caster’s back. The arm must be given a suitable shield, parrying weapon, stool, frying pan with which to operate.

description: Increases the caster’s ability to knock an opponent back. Each time they make a successful parry the caster has a 20% chance of knocking their opponent back 1D2Sd forcing them to make a balance or AGx3 roll to avoid tripping over. The caster may do this with whatever weapon or shield they are using to parry. Additionally if the caster chooses to use their shield or a hafted weapon in a knock back attack, they may do so at +20% whilst the spell is running.
short_description: Increases the caster’s ability to knock an opponent back.

description: Magically seeks a weakness in the target’s armour causing a buckle or tie to come undone and some part to loosen, reducing its effectiveness to be reduced by 1D4 points. The spell will not generally damage the opponent’s armour and it can usually be fixed if the wearer has a round or two free to do so. In more complete armour like chainmail the back or a sleeve may ride up and become entangled in some way thereby leaving an area exposed.
short_description: Magically seeks a weakness in the target’s armour causing a buckle or tie to come undone and some part to loosen, reducing its effectiveness to be reduced by 1D4 points.

description: If the caster makes a successful parry at half their chance or less this spell enables them to flick their opponent’s weapon out of their grasp to disarm them. The weapon will fall 1D2Sd in a random direction. This spell will not disarm an opponent using natural weapons such as teeth or claws, but will cause them to lose their next attack instead.
short_description: If the caster makes a successful parry at half their chance or less this spell enables them to flick their opponent’s weapon out of their grasp to disarm them.

description: Mends a shield or item of damaged armour. The spell will repair the equivalent of 1D6 of protection points on the item. This will double if the enchanter uses Key stored in arbine. If the armour or shield is completely broken then the spell may be ineffective (at the referee’s discretion).
short_description: Mends a shield or item of damaged armour. The spell will repair the equivalent of 1D6 of protection points on the item.

description: Causes 1D6 points of damage to a shield or armour by touching it, effectively reducing its protection by that amount. This spell will cause the affected area of the armour or shield to become cracked and weakened. If the armour is magical this spell will usually fail.
short_description: Causes 1D6 points of damage to a shield or armour by touching it, effectively reducing its protection by that amount.

description: Adds +25 to all the caster’s parry and dodge rolls whilst the spell is in operation.
short_description: Adds +25 to all the caster’s parry and dodge rolls whilst the spell is in operation.

description: Reduces the target’s armour protection by 2 points. Armour affected by this magic will appear dull and may produce puffs of dust when struck. The spell will also affect the target’s ability to resist poison, disease cold or heat, reducing attribute rolls by 2 points. The spell will have no effect on the target’s ability to resist magic.
short_description: Reduces the target’s armour protection by 2 points. Armour affected by this magic will appear dull and may produce puffs of dust when struck.

description: Pulls the caster’s armour on to their body over the course of 1R. If the caster has none, then any unclaimed armour within range will be considered fair game. The armour will not be tied or buckled on, but will be held in place as if it were by the spell for the next 11R. At the end of the spell, depending on the type, the armour will most likely just drop off.
short_description: Pulls the caster’s armour on to their body over the course of 1R. If the caster has none, then any unclaimed armour within range will be considered fair game.

description: Makes the caster’s armour look like mere clothing to any observers for the duration of the spell. The concealment is only visual and if someone were to actually touch the caster they would feel hard armour not fabric. As a rough guide, the more expensive looking the armour, the finer the illusory clothing will appear.
short_description: Makes the caster’s armour look like mere clothing to any observers for the duration of the spell.

description: Creates a magical defence about the recipient’s body giving +2 protection. The defence will give off a faint shimmering glow. This this spell will also increase the caster’s attribute resistance rolls to cold, heat, poison or disease by 2 points. The spell will not be effective in increasing the caster’s resistance to magic. This spell may be cast on top of existing armour adding to its defence, but cannot be used in conjunction with any other defensive spells. Critical hits by non-magical weapons will not ignore this protection.
short_description: Creates a magical defence about the recipient’s body giving +2 protection. The defence will give off a faint shimmering glow.

description: Enchants the caster’s armour such that they it will always protect at its normal value, even when the caster is struck by a critical blow.
short_description: Enchants the caster’s armour such that they it will always protect at its normal value, even when the caster is struck by a critical blow.

description: Mends a shield or item of damaged armour. The spell will repair the equivalent of 2 points of protection on the item per level of the caster or 4 per level if the enchanter uses Key stored in arbine. If the armour is completely broken then the spell may be ineffective (at the referee’s discretion).
short_description: Mends a shield or item of damaged armour. The spell will repair the equivalent of 2 points of protection on the item per level of the caster or 4 per level if the enchanter uses Key stored in arbine.

description: Enables the caster to match their current KEY to the maximum protection of the target’s armour. Should they succeed the armour will be damaged by a magical corrosion. The target must roll their armour and deduct that amount from the armour’s protection permanently. The spell will have no effect if the armour is protected by magic, or has magic currently upon it. NB armour that loses less than half its protection to this spell might still be repaired by an armour-smith.
short_description: Enables the caster to match their current KEY to the maximum protection of the target’s armour. Should they succeed the armour will be damaged by a magical corrosion.

description: Enables the caster to enchant their shield so that it may be used to parry insubstantial attacks by spirits, wraiths, elementals and magically enchanted weapons that would otherwise pass through a physical defence. This includes the ability to parry darkness elemental and enchanted weapon attacks on the caster’s shadow.
short_description: Enables the caster to enchant their shield so that it may be used to parry insubstantial attacks by spirits, wraiths, elementals and magically enchanted weapons that would otherwise pass through a ...

description: Suppresses up to three points of magically generated armour protection on the target for the duration of the spell. The spell may also negate other magical protections up to three key cost (at the referee’s discretion) for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Suppresses up to three points of magically generated armour protection on the target for the duration of the spell.

description: Creates a shimmering magical defence about the caster’s body. The defence have no effect against mundane attacks but will protect against the touch attacks of wraiths or similar. The armour will also halve the effect from any non-physical elemental attacks. This includes attacks made by Light elementals. Darkness elementals, the breath of ice elementals and bolts and pulses from Lightning elementals.
short_description: Creates a shimmering magical defence about the caster’s body. The defence have no effect against mundane attacks but will protect against the touch attacks of wraiths or similar.

description: Pulls the caster’s armour on to their body over the course of 1R. The armour will be fitted, buckled tied as the caster would wear it normally and will remain on until the caster removes it. If the caster has no armour of their own to hand, then any unclaimed armour within range will be considered fair game and fitted as well as possible to the caster’s body.
short_description: Pulls the caster’s armour on to their body over the course of 1R. The armour will be fitted, buckled tied as the caster would wear it normally and will remain on until the caster removes it.

description: Enchants the caster’s armour such that it always protects at full value against any blows the caster receives whilst the spell is active. This spell will not work with existing defence magics and will cease to work if another defence spell is cast upon the armour.
short_description: Enchants the caster’s armour such that it always protects at full value against any blows the caster receives whilst the spell is active.

description: Increases the caster’s distance vision. Enabling them to zoom in to see things in more detail. This will effectively increase the caster’s see skills by +10% for the duration of the spell. The spell will counter EJA-SEN.
short_description: Increases the caster’s distance vision. Enabling them to zoom in to see things in more detail.

description: Improves the caster’s ability to focus on details, enabling them to zoom in on a small area. This spell is often used by shortsighted people for reading. It also will effectively increase their search skill by +10% for the duration of the spell. The spell will counter EJA EVU.
short_description: Improves the caster’s ability to focus on details, enabling them to zoom in on a small area. This spell is often used by shortsighted people for reading.

description: Allows the caster to zoom their view in on a distant object or switch to view details on something much closer. The spell aslo enhances the number of colours the caster can see.. This will effectively increase the caster’s see and search skills by +25%.
short_description: Allows the caster to zoom their view in on a distant object or switch to view details on something much closer. The spell aslo enhances the number of colours the caster can see..

description: Allows the caster to set an eye glyph onto the object upon which it is cast. The object must be non-living and non-magical. The glyph will remain closed until the enchanter wishes to use it. The magical eye may then be opened by concentrating for one round. Once it is opened the caster may then see through the eye glyph from its fixed position. The enchanter will need to maintain concentration while viewing, the vision appearing in the mind’s eye, but they may still see things with their own eyes. Once it has been set in an object, the enchanter may use the eye any time, or from any distance away. The eye must be opened for a minimum of 6R, but may then be closed again, remaining concealed to all but a successful search roll. The eye may be used in this way two times for each level of the caster, after which it will disappear. If such a glyph is covered it will be rendered impotent. It will take no damage from being struck, although if the wall or object it has been placed upon is broken or scratched the glyph may be destroyed.
short_description: Allows the caster to set an eye glyph onto the object upon which it is cast. The object must be non-living and non-magical.

description: This will create an area with a radius of 1Sd per level of the caster within which a veil will be drawn over the eyes of anyone who enters (including the caster). The veil will cause all skills needing sight to be halved for the duration of the spell. This may include combat skills. People entering the area passively may not notice their sight has been affected unless they are specifically attempting to use a skill involving sight. This may be useful if the caster wishes to conceal something unobtrusively.
short_description: This will create an area with a radius of 1Sd per level of the caster within which a veil will be drawn over the eyes of anyone who enters (including the caster).

description: Allows an enchanter to tell if they are being watched. When alerted to such, the caster will gain a sense of the approximate range and direction of the watcher without having to turn and actively look back at them.
short_description: Allows an enchanter to tell if they are being watched.

description: Makes the caster or target the centre of attention for a few moments. As soon as the spell takes effect, all creatures in range will find their eyes drawn, even if only briefly, to the them. If a creature or person actively wants to resist looking at the caster they must make a KEY vs the caster’s KEY roll to do so.
short_description: Makes the caster or target the centre of attention for a few moments. As soon as the spell takes effect, all creatures in range will find their eyes drawn, even if only briefly, to the them.

description: Allows the caster to see through the eyes of the target. The recipient need not be of the same species as the caster—providing it has some sort of eye. If the target is unwilling or unaware their KEY must first be overcome. The target need not remain in range after the spell has been cast. The caster cannot see through their own eyes whilst the spell is in effect, although they may dismiss the spell at any time. Note that, unless the target is familiar with magic or has knowledge of this spell, they will only experience a momentary blurring of vision as the spell is cast and will be unaware that their sight is being used.
short_description: Allows the caster to see through the eyes of the target. The recipient need not be of the same species as the caster—providing it has some sort of eye.

description: Gives the caster all-round 360º vision for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Gives the caster all-round 360º vision for the duration of the spell.

description: Enables the caster to stare at a selected target and cause them a jolt of pain. This jolt will cause them to lose concentration. As a result the next skill roll they make in the same round will be reduced by 60. The caster must overcome the target’s Key for this spell to be effective.
short_description: Enables the caster to stare at a selected target and cause them a jolt of pain. This jolt will cause them to lose concentration.

description: Protects the recipient’s eyes from, bright lights, dust, insects, snow blindness and sharp objects.
short_description: Protects the recipient’s eyes from, bright lights, dust, insects, snow blindness and sharp objects.

description: Temporarily restores the sight of the recipient. This can include sight impaired by irritants or bright light, drunkenness and natural shortsightedness. It can also restore sight impaired by Light Elemental attacks. It will not enable someone to see if their vision is impaired by darkness, magical darkness, mists or physical blindfolds.
short_description: Temporarily restores the sight of the recipient. This can include sight impaired by irritants or bright light, drunkenness and natural shortsightedness.

description: Enables the caster to momentarily cloud the vision of one target each round. The caster must overcome a target’s KEY each time to be successful. This spell will not blind the target as such, but will leave the target’s sight obscured long enough for them to lose their next action in combat, in spell casting or for some other skill that requires vision.
short_description: Enables the caster to momentarily cloud the vision of one target each round. The caster must overcome a target’s KEY each time to be successful.

description: Allows the caster to powerfully zoom their view in on a distant object or switch to view minute details on something much closer. The spell also enhances the number of colours the caster can see. The spell will enable them to see hot and cold. This will effectively increase the caster’s see and search skills by +50.
short_description: Allows the caster to powerfully zoom their view in on a distant object or switch to view minute details on something much closer. The spell also enhances the number of colours the caster can see.

description: Enables the caster to use a suitable smooth surface, even a still liquid to project the image from a magic eye glyph of the caster’s making. If the caster has multiple magic eyes running, they may switch the projection between them by gesturing the LERRU glyph. The size of the projected image depends on the size of the available surface and the level of the caster. A prime level caster could create a projection up to 2Sd across. Once the projection has been set up the caster does not have to remain nearby.
short_description: Enables the caster to use a suitable smooth surface, even a still liquid to project the image from a magic eye glyph of the caster’s making.

description: Creates a magical eye glyph, similar to the EYA-CYA spell, which may be looked through by the caster (with two uses per level and remaining open for 6R on each use). If desired the glyph may be used once in a similar way to the EJA-XAMA spell to cause a target viewed through the eye to fail or fumble their next action as a result of a jolt of pain. Once the eye has been fired it will be dispelled. For each extra point of Key invested in the spell it may fire one more time before being dispelled. If such an eye glyph is created as a permanent spell it may ‘fire’ as many times per day as additional Key invested in the creation spell. If such a glyph is covered it will be rendered impotent. It will take no damage from being struck, although if the wall or object it has been placed upon is broken or scratched the glyph may be destroyed.
short_description: Creates a magical eye glyph, similar to the EYA-CYA spell, which may be looked through by the caster (with two uses per level and remaining open for 6R on each use).

description: Creates an eye glyph similar to the EJA-CYA spell; however, this glyph acts as an early warning system, switching on when it detects the movement of any large creature (human size upwards). As with EJA-CYA, the spell will give two uses per level and, once activated, the eye will remain open for 6R. If such a glyph is covered it will be rendered impotent. It will take no damage from being struck, although if the wall or object it has been placed upon is broken or scratched the glyph may be destroyed..
short_description: Creates an eye glyph similar to the EJA-CYA spell; however, this glyph acts as an early warning system, switching on when it detects the movement of any large creature (human size upwards).

description: Creates a magical eye glyph similar to the EJA–CYA spell; however this combination also allows the glyph to pick up sound in the vicinity. The spell will give two uses per level and each time it is activated the eye will remain open for 6R. If such a glyph is covered it will be rendered unable to see, but it may still hear. It will take no damage from being struck, although if the wall or object it has been placed upon is broken or scratched the glyph may be destroyed.
short_description: Creates a magical eye glyph similar to the EJA–CYA spell; however this combination also allows the glyph to pick up sound in the vicinity.

description: Creates a small smooth glassy sphere in the palm of the caster’s hand. If examined the sphere will usually have cloudy depths or to hold a wisp of darker material within, not unlike a pupil. The sphere will behave in all ways like a magic eye glyph enabling the caster to see from it wherever it is carried or placed. The sphere can even be given to someone else to carry. The enchanter will need to maintain concentration while viewing through the sphere, the vision appearing in the mind’s eye, but they may still see things with their own eyes. The viewpoint can be from any angle visible from the sphere, the caster need only look up down or turn as needed. Once created the enchanter may use the eye any time, or from any distance away whilst the spell is in operation. Once the spell ends the sphere will crumble to dust. If such a sphere is covered it will be rendered impotent. It will take no damage from being struck. It may only be destroyed by magic.
short_description: Creates a small smooth glassy sphere in the palm of the caster’s hand. If examined the sphere will usually have cloudy depths or to hold a wisp of darker material within, not unlike a pupil.

description: Gives the caster the ability to see on the chimeric level. Natural background chimeric light is very dim and the caster will barely be able to see anything more than 2Sd away. Although it could be useful to have some vision in complete darkness, including darkness created magically. If the caster is able to magically generate chimeric light or has a source that produces such light they will be able to see much further. Bright chimeric light is even able penetrate solid objects, enabling the caster to see through flesh, cloth, leather, and wooden walls or floors. Even a course of brick or a layer of thin mental will not entirely obscure what is beyond. Thick stonework, deep earth, water and dense metals are the only things that will obscure a bright source of such light.
short_description: Gives the caster the ability to see on the chimeric level. Natural background chimeric light is very dim and the caster will barely be able to see anything more than 2Sd away.

description: Enables the caster to see into the border between the spirit world and the mundane. The caster will see key in its true form, allowing them to view spirits, elementals as they really are and active magic (though not the exact nature of the spell involved). This spell will also enable the caster to view a spirit departing in death from its body as it begins its journey to the afterlife.
short_description: Enables the caster to see into the border between the spirit world and the mundane.

description: Effectively cancels any scrying spells being used on the caster for the duration of the spell.. It will not make the recipient immune or invisible to direct sight based magic. It may, however, confound some creatures or spirits that only see by Key alone..
short_description: Effectively cancels any scrying spells being used on the caster for the duration of the spell.. It will not make the recipient immune or invisible to direct sight based magic.

description: Allows the caster to tell if there are any magical illusions in range (to the caster the illusion will appear to flicker for the spell’s duration. This includes various forms of invisibility and magical concealment. The spell will also enable the caster to locate any magic eye spells (EYA CYA and similar) in range, even if they are dormant and not watching the caster at the time.
short_description: Allows the caster to tell if there are any magical illusions in range (to the caster the illusion will appear to flicker for the spell’s duration.

description: Allows the caster to stare at a target and cause them severe and debilitating pain. As a result they will they will fail or fumble their next action and will also be subject to a stun. The pain will start to fade once the target successfully unstuns. The caster must overcome the target in a Key vs Key struggle for the spell to be successful. The spell may be used once each round for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Allows the caster to stare at a target and cause them severe and debilitating pain. As a result they will they will fail or fumble their next action and will also be subject to a stun.

description: Protects the caster specifically from magical gaze attacks. This can include the stare attacks of a light elemental and transfix attacks made by certain vampires and other creatures
short_description: Protects the caster specifically from magical gaze attacks. This can include the stare attacks of a light elemental and transfix attacks made by certain vampires and other creatures

description: Creates a magical eye glyph similar to the EJA–HUST-CYA spell; however this combination not only allows the eye to pick up sound in the vicinity, but also allows the caster to speak through the glyph. The spell will give two uses per level and each time it is activated the eye will remain open for 6R. If such a glyph is covered it will be rendered blind, but depending on the covering, may still be able to hear and speak. It will take no damage from being struck, although if the wall or object it has been placed upon is broken or scratched the glyph may be destroyed.
short_description: Creates a magical eye glyph similar to the EJA–HUST-CYA spell; however this combination not only allows the eye to pick up sound in the vicinity, but also allows the caster to speak through the glyph.

description: Enables the caster to use a suitable smooth surface, even a still liquid, to project the image from a magic eye glyph, magic ear or combination of both of the caster’s making. If the caster has multiple magic eyes or ears running, they may switch the projection between them by gesturing the LERRU glyph. The size of the projected image depends on the size of the available surface and the level of the caster. A prime level caster could create a projection up to 2Sd across. Once the projection has been set up the caster does not have to remain nearby.
short_description: Enables the caster to use a suitable smooth surface, even a still liquid, to project the image from a magic eye glyph, magic ear or combination of both of the caster’s making.

description: Gives a combination of all of the effects of the three spells of EJA-HUST-CYA, EJA-GisCYA, and Sight-CYA. Producing a magical eye glyph which can both see and hear, which will also act as an early warning system. The spell will give two uses per level and each time it is activated the eye will remain open for 6R. If such a glyph is covered it will be rendered blind, but depending on the covering, may still be able to hear. It will take no damage from being struck, although if the wall or object it has been placed upon is broken or scratched the glyph may be destroyed.
short_description: Gives a combination of all of the effects of the three spells of EJA-HUST-CYA, EJA-GisCYA, and Sight-CYA.

If such a sphere is covered it will be rendered blind, but depending on the covering, may still be able to hear. It will take no damage from being struck and can only be destroyed by magic.
short_description: Creates a small smooth glassy sphere in the palm of the caster’s hand. If examined the sphere will usually have cloudy depths or to hold a wisp of darker material within, not unlike a pupil.

description: Creates a magical eye glyph of the same nature as the Eja-Xama-Cya spell (with two uses per level and remaining open for 6R on each use) but the eye may cause severe and debilitating pain to one chosen target the eye stares at. As a result they will fail or fumble their next action and also be subjected to a stun. The pain starting to fade once the target successfully unstuns. The eye may repeat this once each round for the 6R it remains open. As with the lesser spell the eye may be given additional charges by investing extra points of key at the time of casting. If such a glyph is covered it will be rendered blind and impotent. It will take no damage from being struck, although if the wall or object it has been placed upon is broken or scratched the glyph may be destroyed.
short_description: Creates a magical eye glyph of the same nature as the Eja-Xama-Cya spell (with two uses per level and remaining open for 6R on each use) but the eye may cause severe and debilitating pain to one ch...

description: The caster gains improved hearing while this spell is active, increasing all their listen roll by 10%.
short_description: The caster gains improved hearing while this spell is active, increasing all their listen roll by 10%.

description: Lowers any sound that the caster makes. This will reduce their orate skill by -10% but will increase their move silently by +10%.
short_description: Lowers any sound that the caster makes. This will reduce their orate skill by -10% but will increase their move silently by +10%.

description: Allows the recipient to tune out any unwanted sound and hear what is underlying that noise. This gives improved hearing and range, allowing them to notice any anomalies or hear a distant conversation. This will increase all their listen roll by +25% for the duration of the spell. Note that if any very loud sounds occur nearby whilst the spell is in operation the caster may have to make a stun roll.
short_description: Allows the recipient to tune out any unwanted sound and hear what is underlying that noise. This gives improved hearing and range, allowing them to notice any anomalies or hear a distant conversation.

description: Enables the caster to draw a HUST glyph upon any inanimate object or surface. The glyph will remain closed until the caster activates it by concentrating for 1R. Once activated The caster may speak through the glyph as if it were their own mouth at any time whilst the spell is in effect. They may also hear any normal sound including talking in the vicinity of the glyph (roughly 3Sd). Once the spell is finished the glyph will fade away. There is no apparent limit on the range of the spell once the glyph has been created.
short_description: Enables the caster to draw a HUST glyph upon any inanimate object or surface. The glyph will remain closed until the caster activates it by concentrating for 1R.

description: Creates an area ‘dead’ to sound approximately 1Sd radius per level of the caster. No sound may be heard within the area, or coming from it. The spell may be cast at a specific area within range, where it will remain fixed for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Creates an area ‘dead’ to sound approximately 1Sd radius per level of the caster. No sound may be heard within the area, or coming from it.

description: Makes the caster the centre of attention for a few moments. As soon as the spell takes effect, all creatures in range will fall quiet and strain to listen, even if the caster only clears their throat. This will give the caster +30% on their orate if they use it to bark an order, warning or short statement.
short_description: Makes the caster the centre of attention for a few moments. As soon as the spell takes effect, all creatures in range will fall quiet and strain to listen, even if the caster only clears their throat.

description: Enables the caster to feel the tiniest vibrations through placing their fingertips onto a solid object or into a liquid. The vibrations can be from a butterfly landing, a mouse in its burrow. It will also allow the caster to detect movement of larger creatures up to the limit of the spell. They may even feel the vibrations from someone successfully moving silently.
short_description: Enables the caster to feel the tiniest vibrations through placing their fingertips onto a solid object or into a liquid. The vibrations can be from a butterfly landing, a mouse in its burrow.

description: Gives a recipient the ability to hear what the caster is hearing. If the other person is unwilling, the caster must first overcome their Key. Once the subject has been touched they may move any distance away from the caster and still hear what they are hearing. The subject will still be able to hear sounds around them with their own ears.
short_description: Gives a recipient the ability to hear what the caster is hearing. If the other person is unwilling, the caster must first overcome their Key.

description: The caster is able to strike one target dumb for the duration of the spell. The caster then speak with the stolen voice if they desire whilst the spell is still in effect.
short_description: The caster is able to strike one target dumb for the duration of the spell. The caster then speak with the stolen voice if they desire whilst the spell is still in effect.

description: Projects the caster’s voice and any instrument they are playing so that anyone up to the range of the spell will hear them as clearly as if they were stood beside them.
short_description: Projects the caster’s voice and any instrument they are playing so that anyone up to the range of the spell will hear them as clearly as if they were stood beside them.

description: Allows the caster to emit a piercing scream as an attack. Anyone forewarned my attempt to protect themselves by placing their hands over their ears. Those within range who do not will lose their next action and must roll for stun. Anyone who fails their stun will have their listen and language skills halved for 1D4 hours.
short_description: Allows the caster to emit a piercing scream as an attack. Anyone forewarned my attempt to protect themselves by placing their hands over their ears.

description: Protects the caster from any loud noises, or sound based attacks including spoken charms. The spell also protects the caster against the effects of sound based magic spells, but will be dispelled as a result. It should be noted that whilst this spell will protect the caster for one round from the effects of HUST-CHOM it will not protect the caster from its sound deadening on the following round as the protection will have been dispelled in the process.
short_description: Protects the caster from any loud noises, or sound based attacks including spoken charms.

description: Restores any hearing lost to magically induced deafness. The spell will also treat short term hearing problems caused by loud noises. The spell will not cure permanent deafness.
short_description: Restores any hearing lost to magically induced deafness. The spell will also treat short term hearing problems caused by loud noises.

description: If the target fails to resist the caster in a Key vs Key struggle, this will completely deafen them for the duration of the spell.
short_description: If the target fails to resist the caster in a Key vs Key struggle, this will completely deafen them for the duration of the spell.

description: Enables the caster to tune out unwanted sound and give them vastly improved hearing of +50% for the duration of the spell. This also includes the ability to overhear conversation that is taking place a considerable distance away.
short_description: Enables the caster to tune out unwanted sound and give them vastly improved hearing of +50% for the duration of the spell.

description: Transforms the caster’s words in the ears of anyone listening to them into a language that they can understand. This can be cast in conjunction with HUST LERRU EKAT.
short_description: Transforms the caster’s words in the ears of anyone listening to them into a language that they can understand. This can be cast in conjunction with HUST LERRU EKAT.

description: Transforms the words of anyone that the caster is listening to into a language the caster understands. This can be cast in conjunction with HUST LERRU TIRA.
short_description: Transforms the words of anyone that the caster is listening to into a language the caster understands. This can be cast in conjunction with HUST LERRU TIRA.

description: Enables the caster and one target to communicate on a simple level using a shared pidgin language unique to the spell. Both can speak the language at 50. The language will be incomprehensible to anyone else listening.
short_description: Enables the caster and one target to communicate on a simple level using a shared pidgin language unique to the spell. Both can speak the language at 50.

description: Causes a suitable smooth surface, even a still liquid, to emit sounds from a magic ear glyph of the caster’s making. The surface will work with any of the HUST CYA based spells. If the caster has multiple magic ears running, they may switch the projection between them by gesturing the LERRU glyph. Once the surface has been set up the caster does not have to remain nearby.
short_description: Causes a suitable smooth surface, even a still liquid, to emit sounds from a magic ear glyph of the caster’s making. The surface will work with any of the HUST CYA based spells.

description: Adds +50 to the caster’s move silently skill for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Adds +50 to the caster’s move silently skill for the duration of the spell.

description: Enables the caster to emit a devastating scream over several seconds. Anyone forewarned my attempt to protect themselves by placing their hands over their ears. Anyone within range who does not will lose their next action and must roll for stun -20%. Victims will also take 1D4+1 damage to their VGR, be deafened for 12R and will have their listen and language skills halved for 1D6 hours.
short_description: Enables the caster to emit a devastating scream over several seconds. Anyone forewarned my attempt to protect themselves by placing their hands over their ears.

description: Creates a magical HUST glyph, similar to the HUST-CYA, spell which may be spoken and listened through by the caster from any distance away. If desired the mouth may also be used as a one off in a similar way to the HUST XAMA spell to stun all targets (if they do not protect their ears) within range of the spell, and reduce all listen and language skills by half for 1D6 hours. Once the glyph has been ‘fired’ it will be dispelled. For each extra point of Key invested in the spell it may fire one more time before being dispelled. If such an glyph is created permanently it may ‘fire’ as many times per day as additional Key invested in the creation spell.
short_description: Creates a magical HUST glyph, similar to the HUST-CYA, spell which may be spoken and listened through by the caster from any distance away.

description: Creates a magical HUST glyph, similar to the HUST-CYA, spell which may be spoken and listened through by the caster from any distance away. The glyph will also act as a warning system, alerting the caster to the slightest sounds of movement it detects within range.
short_description: Creates a magical HUST glyph, similar to the HUST-CYA, spell which may be spoken and listened through by the caster from any distance away.

description: Creates a magical glyph similar to the HUST– CYA spell; however this combination also allows the glyph to see through the glyph like the EJA CYA spell. The spell will give two uses per level and each time it is activated the glyph will remain active for 6R.
short_description: Creates a magical glyph similar to the HUST– CYA spell; however this combination also allows the glyph to see through the glyph like the EJA CYA spell.

description: Allows the caster to put words into the mouth of the target, if the caster is able to overcome their Key. The words will be using the target’s own voice. They will be aware that they have said the words but not why. To transfer the words the caster must utter them as well, even if it is under their breath. Whilst the spell is in effect the caster may speak normally as well, but may need to make an INTx3 roll to prevent the target from uttering every word they say.
short_description: Allows the caster to put words into the mouth of the target, if the caster is able to overcome their Key. The words will be using the target’s own voice.

description: Enables the caster to perfectly mimic the voice of the target at any time whilst the spell is running. It is necessary for the caster to overcome the target’s key for this spell to work. The caster may switch between their own voice and the person who’s voice they are imitating.
short_description: Enables the caster to perfectly mimic the voice of the target at any time whilst the spell is running. It is necessary for the caster to overcome the target’s key for this spell to work.

description: Enables the caster to understand any person regardless of what language they speak. The caster does not know the words but gets an impression of the meaning of the whole. Not effective on non-humans.
short_description: Enables the caster to understand any person regardless of what language they speak. The caster does not know the words but gets an impression of the meaning of the whole.

description: Allows the caster to put their own words into the mouth of the target beast. The words will be in the caster’s voice shaped to an extent by the creature’s natural sound. Thus a bear will sound growly, a fish will sound glottal a bird will be shrill. They beast will be aware that it is is making noisesd but not why. The beast is not under the caster’s control in any other way and if it choses to wander off or attack someone this spell will give them no influence over the beasts actions. To transfer the words the caster must utter them as well, even if it is under their breath. Whilst the spell is in effect the caster may speak normally as well, but may need to make an INTx3 roll to prevent the beast from uttering every word they say.
short_description: Allows the caster to put their own words into the mouth of the target beast. The words will be in the caster’s voice shaped to an extent by the creature’s natural sound.

The sphere will behave in all ways like a HUST CYA glyph enabling the caster to ‘hear’ from it wherever it is carried or placed. The sphere can even be given to someone else to carry. The enchanter will need to maintain concentration while listening through the sphere, but they may still hear things with their own ears. The range of hearing of the sphere will be up to 4Sd. Once created the enchanter may use the sphere any time, or from any distance away whilst the spell is in operation. Once the spell ends the sphere will crumble to dust.
short_description: Creates a small smooth glassy sphere in the palm of the caster’s hand. If examined the sphere will usually have cloudy depths or to hold a wisp of darker material within.

description: Enables the caster to hear and to some extent to be heard by spirits on or beyond the boundary of the spirit world. Even if a spririt does hear the caster, there is no guarantee it will understand them or respond in any way.
short_description: Enables the caster to hear and to some extent to be heard by spirits on or beyond the boundary of the spirit world.

description: Alerts the caster aware of any magically created sounds they can hear. The spell will also make them aware of the location of any magic ears in range.
short_description: Alerts the caster aware of any magically created sounds they can hear. The spell will also make them aware of the location of any magic ears in range.

Once the projection has been set up the caster does not have to remain nearby.
short_description: Enables the caster to use a suitable smooth surface, even a still liquid, to project the sound and image from a both EJA and HUST glyphs or combinations of both.

If examined the sphere will usually have cloudy depths or hold a wisp of darker material within, not unlike a pupil. Once the spell ends the sphere will crumble to dust.
short_description: Creates a small smooth glassy sphere in the palm of the caster’s hand. If examined the sphere will usually have cloudy depths or hold a wisp of darker material within, not unlike a pupil.

description: Not only transforms the words in the caster’s mouth to come out in the language of any listeners, but also enables the caster to understand perfectly what is being said in return. To others it will seem that the caster is suddenly fluent in that language. The caster must touch one of the listeners when the spell is cast, but the spell will run on the caster. Once the spell ends the caster will not be able to understand the language being spoken, nor can the caster tick or start a skill in that language. This spell is not effective on non-humanoids.
short_description: Not only transforms the words in the caster’s mouth to come out in the language of any listeners, but also enables the caster to understand perfectly what is being said in return.

description: Not only transforms the words in the caster’s mouth to come out in the language of the intelligent creature listener, but also enables the caster to understand perfectly what is being said in return. To others it will seem that the caster is suddenly fluent in that language. The caster must touch the listener when the spell is cast, but the spell will run on the caster. Once the spell ends the caster will not be able to understand that language, and Elemental Glyphs These glyphs are those with which the elemental spirits are most strongly connected. Elements are regarded as the bones and flesh of the world, in some cases opposed, but each forming a balance with the others. As one becomes stronger another is weakening until the cycle turns the other way. Elemental glyphs can be fickle and dangerous when used by the inexperienced. All elements are subject glyphs only and must be listed first even if combined with a secondary subject in a combination.
short_description: Not only transforms the words in the caster’s mouth to come out in the language of the intelligent creature listener, but also enables the caster to understand perfectly what is being said in return.

description: Will help to stop rock from crumbling and sand, soil or wood from shifting. It is effective against unsound precipices, splintering stairs, crumbling tunnel ceilings and even quicksand. As a guide, an area up to 2Sd across may be prevented from imminent collapse. If a cave-in has already started it will not be able to stop rocks from falling, but it will help against further falls whilst the spell is effective.
short_description: Will help to stop rock from crumbling and sand, soil or wood from shifting. It is effective against unsound precipices, splintering stairs, crumbling tunnel ceilings and even quicksand.

description: Will make an area of solid ground or rock slippery or muddy up to 1Sd diameter per level of the caster. This includes stone or wooden bridges. Anyone standing in the area must make an Agility x3 roll (or balance if higher) for every 2Sd crossed. If they fail they will slip and fall. If cast upon a rock face the surface will become slick and greasy, only climbable at -40%. If cast upon soil, sand, or gravel anyone crossing will sink ankle deep, reducing Agility by half. When the spell ends the mud will dry at normal speeds for the conditions.
short_description: Will make an area of solid ground or rock slippery or muddy up to 1Sd diameter per level of the caster. This includes stone or wooden bridges.

description: This will change up to a sackful’s worth soil or sand into a solid glassy lump for the duration of the spell (useful for stopping sand timers). If cast upon a solid stone it will turn it to a translucent crystalline material for the duration of the spell.
short_description: This will change up to a sackful’s worth soil or sand into a solid glassy lump for the duration of the spell (useful for stopping sand timers).

description: Will cause a small but secure step or projection to appear from the ground or a wall at any location the caster indicates within range. The projection will be roughly the size of a farmhouse doorstep up to a 1Sd long and can be oriented in any way the caster indicates at the time of casting. When the spell ends the projection will crumble or collapse under its own weight.
short_description: Will cause a small but secure step or projection to appear from the ground or a wall at any location the caster indicates within range.

description: Will protect the caster and their clothing from dirt, mud, dust etc. Regardless of how much covers them it will simply slide off leaving them clean.
short_description: Will protect the caster and their clothing from dirt, mud, dust etc. Regardless of how much covers them it will simply slide off leaving them clean.

description: Enables the caster to tell solid ground from unstable or marshy areas. The spell will also give a vague idea of the direction of the nearest land or island at sea and the depth of water below the caster.
short_description: Enables the caster to tell solid ground from unstable or marshy areas.

description: Summons a small fist sized rock to do the caster’s bidding. The rock may roll in any direction at a rate of 4Sd per round, it can jump up to 1Sd high, it can be asked to guard a particular person or thing, or it may be ordered to attack a target. It will have STR and AG of 8 and 50% accuracy to attack: doing 1D2-1 damage. Once the rock has completed a task it will usually return to the enchanter for further instruction.
short_description: Summons a small fist sized rock to do the caster’s bidding.

description: This will lower the stamina of the target causing them to tire quickly walking or running. They will need to rest after only half the distance they might travel carrying a similar load.
short_description: This will lower the stamina of the target causing them to tire quickly walking or running. They will need to rest after only half the distance they might travel carrying a similar load.

description: This will raise the stamina of the target, enabling them to travel for twice the distance they might normally before needing to rest.
short_description: This will raise the stamina of the target, enabling them to travel for twice the distance they might normally before needing to rest.

description: Enables the caster to share the strength of the earth, giving them up to +4STR when making resistance rolls involving strength and +2STR generally. This spell will also add +1 to the caster’s damage bonus whilst active.
short_description: Enables the caster to share the strength of the earth, giving them up to +4STR when making resistance rolls involving strength and +2STR generally.

description: Causes the chosen weapon to take on a stone-like caste. This will double its effective HP for the duration of the spell. Every time weapon is parried, its normal damage should still be rolled and, if it exceeds the HP of the parrying weapon, the excess damage should be deducted from the HP of the parrying weapon.
short_description: Causes the chosen weapon to take on a stone-like caste. This will double its effective HP for the duration of the spell.

description: Will help to keep the caster’s footing on treacherous or shaky ground, doubling any AG or balance roll chance needed to remain steady. It will allow them to resist any knockback or blast effect at double chance. The spell will also give a much greater grip on any stone or earthly surface with the fringe benefit of adding +20% to climb rolls.
short_description: Will help to keep the caster’s footing on treacherous or shaky ground, doubling any AG or balance roll chance needed to remain steady.

description: Allows the caster to hear sounds made upon the ground, such as hoof beats or footsteps. The caster must make a successful listen roll to identify what they are hearing. The spell will also provide the caster with an approximate idea of the direction and distance of the source of the sound. To work the spell the caster must place their ear to the ground. The ranges for each level are as follows: level 120Sd level 2100Sd level 3500Sd level 43 mille level 510 mille
short_description: Allows the caster to hear sounds made upon the ground, such as hoof beats or footsteps. The caster must make a successful listen roll to identify what they are hearing.

description: Causes a small volume of earth or stone, no more than the size of a fist, to violently explode in a cloud of dust and sand leaving a permanent hole. Though the explosion is unlikely to harm anyone it will certainly be loud, surprising all within hearing distance. Anyone within 1Sd should roll for a stun. Most spectators will run or take cover, horses and other animals will be terrified. If cast upon a manifest earth spirit it will cause that creature 1D6 HP physical damage.
short_description: Causes a small volume of earth or stone, no more than the size of a fist, to violently explode in a cloud of dust and sand leaving a permanent hole.

description: Changes a quantity of soil or sand into a solid translucent lump for the duration of the spell. The area of material affected can be up to roughly 1Sd in all dimensions. If cast upon solid stone it will turn it to a transparent crystalline material for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Changes a quantity of soil or sand into a solid translucent lump for the duration of the spell. The area of material affected can be up to roughly 1Sd in all dimensions.

description: A more powerful version of GONDE-CYA that will create a flat topped horizontal projection of rock and earth up to 1Sd long and 1Lk wide and deep per level of the caster. The projection may be used to bridge rivers or chasms. The angle may be varied a little to match both banks. Thus a level 3 enchanter might create a bridge 3Sd long, 3Lk wide and 3Lk deep. It should be noted that such projections cannot be added to; however if one projection is insufficient to bridge a given gap it may be possible to create a second from the other side to meet the first, provided the other side is in range. Once the spell ends the projection will usually begin to crumble and eventually collapse under its own weight.
short_description: A more powerful version of GONDE-CYA that will create a flat topped horizontal projection of rock and earth up to 1Sd long and 1Lk wide and deep per level of the caster.

description: Enables the caster to share deeply of the strength of the earth, giving them up to +8STR when making resistance rolls involving strength and +4STR generally. This spell will also add +2 to the caster’s damage bonus whilst active.
short_description: Enables the caster to share deeply of the strength of the earth, giving them up to +8STR when making resistance rolls involving strength and +4STR generally.

description: Causes the blade or head of the chosen weapon to become chunky and stone-like in appearance. If cast upon a bladed weapon it will reduce the weapon’s damage by half. If cast upon a bludgeoning weapon it will increase that weapon’s damage by 1 point per level of the caster. As with GONDE-XAMA the HP of the weapon will double and any parrying weapon will take the Earth weapon’s rolled damage against its HP. The affected weapon will make a great groaning and rumbling noise when used, if the caster makes a critical attack the weapon will cause double damage to the opponent’s weapon.
short_description: Causes the blade or head of the chosen weapon to become chunky and stone-like in appearance. If cast upon a bladed weapon it will reduce the weapon’s damage by half.

description: Allows the caster to call a jumble of crystalline spikes from the ground wherever the indicates within range. The spikes will occupy an area roughly 1Sd across and will cause 1D10 damage to anyone standing in the area as they emerge. The caster may repeat this once each round for the duration of the spell, each calling counting as a (spell) combat action. Opponents may dodge the spikes. They may also be parried like a weapon attack, as they are brittle and may be snapped or smashed. While the spell is active the clumps of spikes will remain where summoned and will still cause damage to anyone else stumbling into them. Once the spell ends the spikes will lose much of their strength and will easily shatter or collapse under their own weight. The crystals may also dissolve in water or rain.
short_description: Allows the caster to call a jumble of crystalline spikes from the ground wherever the indicates within range.

description: To be set upon a small stone or rock that the caster can place in any suitable location or throw at a target. Should anyone else disturb or come into contact with the stone it will explode causing 2D8 damage to anyone within 1Sd, and 1D8 damage to anyone within 2Sd. Because the spell is very similar to creating a magic object the caster’s key spent will take a week to regenerate, and the stone will remain active indefinitely until set off.
short_description: To be set upon a small stone or rock that the caster can place in any suitable location or throw at a target.

description: Causes the caster’s lower arm to become encased in a relatively lightweight crystal growing outwards to form a shield. The shield can resist up to ten points of damage on a successful parry roll (at the caster’s normal shield skill, or basic if they have none). pieces of the shield will break off as it is struck, but will re-form by the start of the next round. Should the shield’s full protection of 10 points be exceeded by a single blow, the shield will shatter and any excess will be suffered by the caster. However, the shield will still re-form for the start of the following round if the spell is in effect.
short_description: Causes the caster’s lower arm to become encased in a relatively lightweight crystal growing outwards to form a shield.

description: Makes an area of earth, rock or sand impervious to digging, chiselling, impact, lava or creatures which move through earth or stone. It can include stone or earth built buildings and walls. The defence may be created as a sphere of 1Sd radius per level of the caster. If cast from above ground it can be a hemisphere in the earth below. Alternatively the caster may choose to create a flat barrier 2Sd wide by 2Sd high per level of the caster. In both cases the barrier will be roughly 1Sd thick.
short_description: Makes an area of earth, rock or sand impervious to digging, chiselling, impact, lava or creatures which move through earth or stone. It can include stone or earth built buildings and walls.

description: Will provide a triggered defence for the target from falling or thrown rocks. Should the target be about to be struck the spell will be triggered and the rock will be deflected and any other rocks for the following 6R. After the spell has been triggered it will need to be re-cast to regain its protection. Should the target be struck by many rocks, a cave-in or collapsing building they are still likely to survive within an air pocket beneath.
short_description: Will provide a triggered defence for the target from falling or thrown rocks.

description: This spell will hide any tracks made on the ground by the caster and other creatures travelling within a 4Sd range of them. It may also be used to hide tracks made by the caster before the spell was cast within the 4Sd radius.
short_description: This spell will hide any tracks made on the ground by the caster and other creatures travelling within a 4Sd range of them.

description: Enables the caster to create the illusion of stone, sand or earth over an area up to 4Sd across in all dimensions. The illusion will be a duplication of another area of earth, sand or stone within range of the spell as indicated by the caster during casting. The illusion will be convincingly three dimensional until walked through. It should be noted that if the illusion is of something made with stone blocks, the pattern will invariably fail to match up at the edges and the illusion will be less convincing as a result.
short_description: Enables the caster to create the illusion of stone, sand or earth over an area up to 4Sd across in all dimensions.

description: Allows the caster to hear footfalls or hoofbeats made upon the ground some considerable distance away. A range of 1 mille per level. The caster will gain a rough idea of direction as well as numbers and even type of animal. The caster must place their ear to the ground and make a listen roll to be able to interpret what they are hearing.
