short_description: Allows the caster to hear footfalls or hoofbeats made upon the ground some considerable distance away. A range of 1 mille per level.

description: Causes the ground at the caster’s feet to yield enough edible earthly food items to feed one person for one day. The feast may include uncooked mushrooms, root vegetables, insects, worms, rabbits or snakes, depending on the locality.
short_description: Causes the ground at the caster’s feet to yield enough edible earthly food items to feed one person for one day.

description: Will cause a 2Sd tall menhir to project from the ground where the caster indicates. The menhir will have a diameter of roughly 4Lk at its widest point and will weigh several tons. This menhir will remain quite solid for the duration of the spell but will become crumbly once the spell is ended. It will still amount to a substantial pile of gravel. The created projection may be used to block an opening and may even be caused to appear horizontally from a (rock or earthen) wall or face to provide a step up or small bridge.
short_description: Will cause a 2Sd tall menhir to project from the ground where the caster indicates. The menhir will have a diameter of roughly 4Lk at its widest point and will weigh several tons.

description: This will cause a Lesser Earth elemental to manifest before the enchanter. The elemental will use any earth, rocks, soil, sand available in the locality to create its body. The manifestation will obey simple commands and perform tasks within its scope, such as: carrying objects or clearing rubble. The elemental may be ordered to attack, but will be dispelled as soon as its effective Hit Points reach 0. Such manifest elementals will not cross water nor leave the ground.
short_description: This will cause a Lesser Earth elemental to manifest before the enchanter. The elemental will use any earth, rocks, soil, sand available in the locality to create its body.

description: Will ward the caster from direct attacks by Gonde magic and earth spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 3 glyph Gonde spells and attacks by manifest lesser earth spirits for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 4 glyph Gonde spells and attacks by standard earth elementals for 1R before being dispelled. It will be dispelled by any 5 glyph spells or earth drake attacks.
short_description: Will ward the caster from direct attacks by Gonde magic and earth spirits.

description: Enables the caster to scry a distant place using a polished crystal or gemstone. The crystal must be flawless and transparent although it does not matter if it is coloured. The caster must have a small sample of material from the area to be scried, a chip of stone or a pinch of dirt. The sample must be pushed and ground into the ground at the caster’s feet when casting the spell and is consumed by the earth in the process. The vision is from the nearest stone or earth and is often a worm’s eye view from the ground. No sound will be heard. The ranges for each level are as follows: level 1 1 mille level 2 5 mille level 3 25 mille level 4 100 mille level 5 unknown
short_description: Enables the caster to scry a distant place using a polished crystal or gemstone. The crystal must be flawless and transparent although it does not matter if it is coloured.

description: Enables the caster to ‘hear’ the spirits of the earth. To do so the caster must put their ear to the ground or a rock face. Earth spirits are notoriously uncommunicative, but the caster may gain insights as to weather or not they are restless, angry or just quiet. The caster may also, if they are lucky pick up insights about large movements of men horses, mining or building that has been going on within a broad area about the caster. Sometimes earth spirits talk about earth shaping historical events in an area dating back hundreds, even thousands of years.
short_description: Enables the caster to ‘hear’ the spirits of the earth. To do so the caster must put their ear to the ground or a rock face.

description: Will cause a volume of earth or stone, up to 1Sd across, to violently explode in a cloud of dust and sand leaving a permanent hole. Anyone stood within 1Sd will take 1D8 points of damage, and will automatically be knocked off their feet. Anyone within 2Sd will a suffer a knockback attack with a strength of 50 from the force of the explosion. Most spectators will probably believe it to be terrifying and will probably run or take cover accordingly. If cast upon a manifest earth spirit it will cause that creature 3D6 HP of physical damage. If cast on GONDE-NANU-Gis-CYA armour it will cause 1D8 damage and reduce the armour’s protection by that amount.
short_description: Will cause a volume of earth or stone, up to 1Sd across, to violently explode in a cloud of dust and sand leaving a permanent hole.

description: Enables earthly materials to be worked by hand. Sand may be built into cohesive structures 1-2Sd high without collapse. Stone or metal may be worked bent, pulled or pressed as if it was stiff clay. The softer and less dense the original material the easier it will be to alter and the larger the piece that can be worked. By the same token only small areas or pieces of strong or hard stone or metal can be worked. Thus a block of chalk or soapstone the size of a keg might be manipulated, while only a fist sized piece of cast bronze might be altered. When the spell ends the material will become as hard as it was originally. Sculpted sand may remain until disturbed, or simply collapse under its own weight.
short_description: Enables earthly materials to be worked by hand. Sand may be built into cohesive structures 1-2Sd high without collapse.

description: This spell will act as a more effective form of GONDE-CHOM. It will stop a landslide that has already started, it will protect the caster from taking damage from a cave-in and stop the rocks from falling. It will also secure a much larger ceiling or floor area from collapse; up to 8Sd across.
short_description: This spell will act as a more effective form of GONDE-CHOM.

description: Encases the caster in an articulated layer of stones earth and rock up to 1Lk thick. The armoured layer will halve the caster’s AG but will give them 10 points of armour protection against cutting and impaling attacks and 5 points against smashing attacks. The stone encasing will work with other, non-magically active, armour. It will provide protection from fire and heat damage up to a total of 50 points and will also afford the caster complete protection from Lightning damage. The caster will be able to see and breathe through a slit left for the eyes but their vision will be greatly reduced, causing all sight based skills including attack and parry to be halved. Whilst the character will not have to bear the weight of the rocky armour their effective weight and SIZ will increase hugely and checks should be made if they attempt to walk across any ground or floor that may be unable to bear the weight. Such armour cast by Prime level casters may appear as beautiful crystalline armour.
short_description: Encases the caster in an articulated layer of stones earth and rock up to 1Lk thick.

description: For this spell to work the recipient must be placed in a specially prepared cavity or hole in the ground and interred there for at least a day. The spell will cure the recipient of a number of ailments such as bruising, sprains, broken bones, swelling, toothache, and wasting disease. If the recipient has suffered a loss to their STR attribute, this process will heal the attribute back to its normal level. If a cavity or hole is already created it will only take 1D6 minutes to prepare, with suitable chanting and marking the hole with the caster’s own hair, nail clippings or soil. The recipient is be placed in the cavity which should then be covered by a stone lid or filled in with earth. The recipient will not suffocate but may need to make an INTx3 roll to avoid panicking and attempting to exit, if they do so the cavity will need to prepared again and the spell re-cast. Even if a broken bone is not set correctly the recipient will emerge with the break healed correctly
short_description: For this spell to work the recipient must be placed in a specially prepared cavity or hole in the ground and interred there for at least a day.

description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to stone. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired. The target will maintain roughly their normal form, but chiselled and lumpen. Whilst in this form they will not be able to move. In this form will they be able to see, although they will be able to hear and feel hot or cold. They will not feel pain if struck and will take no damage from fire, lightning, liquid or gas whilst the spell is in effect. The recipient will have an effective skin armour of 15 points and a blow will need to exceed this to do any damage. NB a critical simply causes double damage, the critical tables cannot be used to ignore armour.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to stone. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired.

description: Enables the caster to turn a non-magical object up to a 1Sd across to stone. The object will maintain roughly its normal form, but chiselled and lumpen. It will take no damage from normal fire, lightning or acid whilst the spell is in effect. The object will have an effective armour of 15 points and a blow will need to exceed this to do any damage. A critical simply causes double damage.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a non-magical object up to a 1Sd across to stone. The object will maintain roughly its normal form, but chiselled and lumpen.

description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of earth tremors as well as deflecting avalanches or damage from stone projectiles. The spell will also protect from the physical results of attacks by earth elementals or GONDE spells that would otherwise cause damage. The spell will be effective on objects such as a large building or ship that would fit within the radius of the spell’s area of effect.
short_description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of earth tremors as well as deflecting avalanches or damage from stone projectiles.

description: Sends out a visible shockwave travelling outwards through the ground in the direction the caster is facing. To activate this combination the caster must punch their fist on the ground. The shockwave will spread out in a rough fan shape spreading out and reducing in effect as it travels Depending on the range from the caster its effects are as follows: range 2Sd violently thrown into the air, 2D6 damage plus stun. 5Sd thrown off feet 1D6 damage. 10Sd knockback (STR50) 2Sd. 20Sd balance roll needed. The shockwave moves rapidly and will have dissipated by the end of the round. It can cause damage to structures within 20Sd Building protected by bloodsilver may be able to resist the effect. The shockwave may be felt up to a mille away.
short_description: Sends out a visible shockwave travelling outwards through the ground in the direction the caster is facing. To activate this combination the caster must punch their fist on the ground.

description: Causes long crystalline spikes to randomly erupt from the ground anywhere within a 20Sd radius of the point of casting. The chances of anyone within the area being hit by such a spike is 10% on any given round Anyone hit by a spike will suffer 1D10 damage The erupting spikes may be dodged or parried like a weapon attack, they are brittle and may be snapped or smashed. With the exception of the caster, the spikes are indiscriminate, harming both friend and foe alike. While the spell is active the crystalline spikes will remain where they appeared and will still cause damage to anyone else stumbling into them. Once the spell ends the spikes will lose much of their strength and will easily shatter or collapse under their own weight. The crystals may also dissolve in water or rain.
short_description: Causes long crystalline spikes to randomly erupt from the ground anywhere within a 20Sd radius of the point of casting.

description: Causes a steep dyke, of earth, stones or sand etc. to be thrown up anywhere the caster indicates within range of the spell. The dyke will have a steep side facing away from the caster and a sloping side facing towards them. The dyke will be roughly 2Sd deep, 1Sd high, and 2Sd in length for each level of the caster, and for each further casting another such dyke may be added to the existing one. The dyke rises rapidly from the ground and any individual stood upon the affected area must make an AGx2 roll or fall over. When the spell ends the dyke will slowly sink back into the ground over the course of 1R.
short_description: Causes a steep dyke, of earth, stones or sand etc. to be thrown up anywhere the caster indicates within range of the spell.

description: Creates a 1Sd wide by 2Sd high tunnel the ground in a sandy or earthern bank where indicated by the caster. The tunnel will extend for up to 1Sd per level of the caster. If cast upon a solid rock face the tunnel will only be 1Sd high and extend for 1Lk per level of the caster. The effect on the walls of buildings is often less successful –many are built with blood silver pins mixed into the mortar. . Once the spell is finished the waters will crash back into the space stunning anyone unlucky enough to remain within.
short_description: Creates a 1Sd wide by 2Sd high tunnel the ground in a sandy or earthern bank where indicated by the caster. The tunnel will extend for up to 1Sd per level of the caster.

description: Dismisses a manifest lesser earth elemental (GONDE MEAF EYAMA). If cast upon a standard earth elemental (GONDE MEAF GHAN EYAMA) it will keep it at bay for 6R. If cast at an earth drake it will keep it at bay for 1R (ie it will not attack the caster and remain some 10Sd distant).
short_description: Dismisses a manifest lesser earth elemental (GONDE MEAF EYAMA). If cast upon a standard earth elemental (GONDE MEAF GHAN EYAMA) it will keep it at bay for 6R.

description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by GONDE magic and earth spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 4 symbol GONDE spells and attacks by manifest greater earth elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 5 symbol GONDE spells and attacks by earth drakes for 1R before being dispelled. If the caster moves, the area protected will move with them.
short_description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by GONDE magic and earth spirits.

description: Causes an Earth spirit to manifest before the caster. It will appear as a vaguely humanoid figure composed of stone, earth, soil or sand depending upon the materials available. The spirit may be asked by the caster to attack a foe. It will not pursue a fleeing opponent, nor will it continue to attack someone lying unmoving upon the ground unless specifically ordered to by the caster. Once it has dealt with a task allotted to it the elemental spirit will stop moving until given another task. Such spirits will not cross water nor leave the ground.
short_description: Causes an Earth spirit to manifest before the caster. It will appear as a vaguely humanoid figure composed of stone, earth, soil or sand depending upon the materials available.

description: Turns the caster to a pile of free flowing sand, soil or gravel and allow them to move across the floor in any direction they choose. They may even flow up low steps or other obstacles. They may move at 8Sd each round across a level surface, and 4Sd each round uphill. The caster may see but cannot cast spells in this form. In this form the caster will take no damage when struck by a weapon and may re-form if broken up in some way (If allowed to). The sand may flow through small cracks or holes provided that they can get all of their material through before the spell ends. This may take 1D10+4 rounds to complete depending upon the size of holes the sand is flowing through. On the round that the spell ends the caster will re-form into their normal shape.
short_description: Turns the caster to a pile of free flowing sand, soil or gravel and allow them to move across the floor in any direction they choose. They may even flow up low steps or other obstacles.

description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by GONDE magic and earth spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol GONDE spells and attacks by manifest earth drakes for the duration of the spell. If the sentinel is killed then the spell will cease to function. Having their body imbued with such power for such a period of time has its cost. The skin of the sentinel will appear to crust over with a calcified layer continually crumbling as they move. This will slowly reduce their AG(DEX) by roughly 2 points per hour over the course of the spell. It will concurrently increase their skin armour by 1 point each time. Once the sentinel’s AG is reduced to 0 they will be locked in position like a statue. When the spell ends the calcified layer will begin to crumble away and their AG(DEX) will start to recover at a rate of 1 point each hour.
short_description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by GONDE magic and earth spirits.

description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by GONDE magic and earth spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol GONDE spells and attacks by manifest earth drakes for the duration of the spell. Statues or carved stones can often be found on the walls of ancient buildings or cities to be used for this purpose.
short_description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by GONDE magic and earth spirits.

description: Causes long crystalline spikes to randomly erupt from the ground in a ring around the point of casting. Initially the ring will be in a 40Sd radius circle about of the point of casting. But the caster may push the width of the whole ring outwards creating an unaffected area in the centre. Doing this will reduce the width of the band of affected ground at the same time. Thus if the ring is pushed out to a 50Sd radius, a 20Sd radius unaffected area could be made in the centre but the width of the affected band would have been reduced to just 30Sd The chances of anyone within the area being hit by such a spike is 10% on any given round. Anyone hit by a spike will suffer 1D10 damage. The erupting spikes may be dodged or parried like a weapon attack, they are brittle and may be snapped or smashed. With the exception of the caster, the spikes are indiscriminate, harming both friend and foe alike. While the spell is active the crystalline spikes will remain where they appeared and will still cause damage to anyone else stumbling into them. Once the spell ends the spikes will lose much of their strength and will easily shatter or collapse under their own weight. The crystals may also dissolve in water or rain.
short_description: Causes long crystalline spikes to randomly erupt from the ground in a ring around the point of casting. Initially the ring will be in a 40Sd radius circle about of the point of casting.

description: Dismisses a lesser (GONDE MEAF EYAMA) or standard (GONDE MEAF GHAN EYAMA) earth elemental. If cast at an earth drake (GONDE MEAF GHAN OVET EYAMA) it will keep it at bay for 6R (ie it will not attack the caster directly and will remain some 10Sd distant).
short_description: Dismisses a lesser (GONDE MEAF EYAMA) or standard (GONDE MEAF GHAN EYAMA) earth elemental.

description: Summons a high earth spirit which will flow through the ground in the form of the great earth drake. The Serpent may be asked by the caster to attack a foe. It will not pursue a fleeing opponent, nor will it continue to attack someone lying unmoving upon the ground unless specifically ordered to by the caster. Such spirits will not cross water nor leave the ground.
short_description: Summons a high earth spirit which will flow through the ground in the form of the great earth drake. The Serpent may be asked by the caster to attack a foe.

description: Dismisses a lesser, standard or high earth elemental spirit.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser, standard or high earth elemental spirit.
Spell Glyphs: Gonde + Maef + Ghan + Ovet + Eyama + Chom

description: Allows the caster to keep cool in hot conditions. It will also halve the amount of water they would normally need while the spell is in effect.
short_description: Allows the caster to keep cool in hot conditions. It will also halve the amount of water they would normally need while the spell is in effect.

description: Protects the caster and their accoutrements from normal to heavy rain as well as splashes from other liquids. The water will simply run off like droplets from the back of a duck.
short_description: Protects the caster and their accoutrements from normal to heavy rain as well as splashes from other liquids. The water will simply run off like droplets from the back of a duck.

description: Changes approximately 1 skinfull of water into a mild ale, for the duration of the spell. Once the spell is ended the liquid will change back into water, even if it has been consumed. The caster may also choose to cancel the spell at any time whilst it is running to the same effect.
short_description: Changes approximately 1 skinfull of water into a mild ale, for the duration of the spell. Once the spell is ended the liquid will change back into water, even if it has been consumed.

description: Creates about a 1 skin of water in any given container which the caster indicates. There need not be a source of water nearby. The water is pure and refreshing and will supply the needs of one individual for one day. If desired (and sometimes when not desired), the spell will also create water outside a container, above someone’s head, or even over a fire.
short_description: Creates about a 1 skin of water in any given container which the caster indicates. There need not be a source of water nearby.

description: Protects the caster and their accoutrements from rain and splashes of other liquid, preventing any from even landing upon them. The caster could be completely submerged and their accoutrements and goods (even food or paper) will remain quite dry for the duration of the spell. This spell will also protect against damage caused by acid. It will help protect the caster against drowning if they are sufficiently buoyant, but if they sink they will suffocate instead.
short_description: Protects the caster and their accoutrements from rain and splashes of other liquid, preventing any from even landing upon them.

description: Allows the caster to detect the presence of water, above ground, or below it, within range of the spell. The elemental spiritis will give the caster a ‘feeling’ of distance and direction for the water. The spell will not tell the caster if the water is drinkable or not. The ranges for each level are as follows: Level 1up to 20Sd Level 2up to 100Sd Level 3up to 500Sd Level 4up to 3 mille Level 5up to 10 mille
short_description: Allows the caster to detect the presence of water, above ground, or below it, within range of the spell.

description: Summons a blob of water to obey simple instructions by the caster. The spell must be cast with some water or any other liquid (including acid or oil) in range, even just a skinfull. On land, the blob will move as a puddle up to 4Sd per round. On water, it will appear as a ripple and can flow at up to 10Sd per round. Surprisingly, the water may also flow up walls and across the ceiling at a rate of 1Sd per round. On land it may also be asked to carry any small item which would normally float. On water it may gently push small floating objects. The liquid can be ordered to attempt to soak someone (as an attack at 50%)though the blob will be dissipated in the process.
short_description: Summons a blob of water to obey simple instructions by the caster. The spell must be cast with some water or any other liquid (including acid or oil) in range, even just a skinfull.

description: Sets the current or resistance of the water against a swimming or floating target. If the target is a person, then their Key must first be overcome in a Key vs Key struggle. The effect is subtle, but the target’s Move in the water will slow by 1D4+2 points. A swimmer will find they will tire sooner than expected. This spell will work on a target up to the size of a small fishing boat.
short_description: Sets the current or resistance of the water against a swimming or floating target. If the target is a person, then their Key must first be overcome in a Key vs Key struggle.

description: Causes the currents in the water to help pull the target along. If the target is unwilling, then their Key must first be overcome by the caster. The effect will increase the target’s Move in water by 1D4+2. A swimmer will find they can continue for longer before tiring. This spell will also push a small rowing boat or small fishing skiff through the water at normal speed.
short_description: Causes the currents in the water to help pull the target along. If the target is unwilling, then their Key must first be overcome by the caster.

description: Enables the caster to share the powers of the waves giving them +2AG and +2STR when in the water. It will also give the caster +50% on their swim skill – a non-swimmer will gain a skill of 50% as a result. The caster must be actually floating in water to gain these powers, it is not enough to simply paddle in a bucket.
short_description: Enables the caster to share the powers of the waves giving them +2AG and +2STR when in the water.

description: Causes a weapon which the caster touches to run with water for the duration of the spell, This will continually wash the weapon whilst in effect. It may also be used if cast upon an opponents weapon to remove a poison coating. The water is often salt water and will cause opponents armour and weapons to rust by the next day unless cleaned.
short_description: Causes a weapon which the caster touches to run with water for the duration of the spell, This will continually wash the weapon whilst in effect.

description: Causes the caster to exude a thick layer of watery slime from all over their body. The slime will find its way through porus clothing or squeeze out around less permeable items. Though disgusting to view the slime will protect the caster from touch based magic and attacks. It will also give protection of up to 5 points each round against fire and heat. It will also prevent bites and stings from small insects while the spell is running.
short_description: Causes the caster to exude a thick layer of watery slime from all over their body. The slime will find its way through porus clothing or squeeze out around less permeable items.

description: Enables the caster to see clearly when below water as if in air, as far as visibility will permit.
short_description: Enables the caster to see clearly when below water as if in air, as far as visibility will permit.

description: Violently vaporises about a skin-full of water or other liquid. Whilst the explosion will not harm anyone it will certainly be surprising and anyone within 1Sd should attempt to roll for stun. The spell will have no effect on normal living creatures, but will cause 2D6 points of damage to the physical form of a manifest water spirit.
short_description: Violently vaporises about a skin-full of water or other liquid. Whilst the explosion will not harm anyone it will certainly be surprising and anyone within 1Sd should attempt to roll for stun.

description: Changes approximately 1 skin-full of water into a potent liquor. Once the spell is ended the liquor will return to being water even if it has been consumed. The caster may also choose to cancel the spell at any time whilst it is running to the same effect. The spirit produced will not burn on contact with flame.
short_description: Changes approximately 1 skin-full of water into a potent liquor. Once the spell is ended the liquor will return to being water even if it has been consumed.

description: Neutralises the alcohol in 1 skin-full of liquor or up to a barrel of beer. Once the spell is ended the alcohol will return to its former strength. If it has been consumed it will not.
short_description: Neutralises the alcohol in 1 skin-full of liquor or up to a barrel of beer. Once the spell is ended the alcohol will return to its former strength.

description: Creates a floating sphere of water emanating from the caster’s hand. The sphere will be roughly 1Lk diameter per level of the caster. Thus at level 4 an enchanter could create a volume of water 4Lk across. The volume will remain floating for the round it takes to form after which it will drop onto or into whatever is below it. The water will be pure and drinkable.
short_description: Creates a floating sphere of water emanating from the caster’s hand. The sphere will be roughly 1Lk diameter per level of the caster.

description: Gives the recipient the ability to swim like a dolphin. at double normal speed on or under the water. The spell increases the swimmer’s speed to double their normal Move in water and increases their AG and STR by +4 The spell will also enable the caster to only suffer half damage when falling into water from a height.
short_description: Gives the recipient the ability to swim like a dolphin. at double normal speed on or under the water.

description: Causes a weapon which the caster is holding to gush water for the duration of the spell. Each time the caster hits an opponent they may make a knockback attack with a strength of 50 on top of their normal damage due to the force of water slamming into the opponent. If the caster lets go of the weapon the water will stop flowing. It should be noted that both caster and anyone within 10Sd are liable to get very wet whilst this spell is in operation. This spell will only work in areas where water is in plentiful supply, if cast in a desert for example the weapon will barely “sweat”.
short_description: Causes a weapon which the caster is holding to gush water for the duration of the spell.

description: Allows the caster to channel water so that it forms a cohesive high pressure whip emanating from their casting hand with a range of 4Sd. The whip may be strafed causing little damage but knocking back targets (STR 25). The whip may also be directed at a specific target (at 3xAG chance) causing 1D6 damage plus a knockback (STR 50). The whip may be dodged, but may only be parried by a shield and the target will still suffer the knockback effect. The caster must be within 4Sd of a substantial source of water to sustain the flow for the spell each round (a water trough would only be sufficient for 1D4 rounds supply).
short_description: Allows the caster to channel water so that it forms a cohesive high pressure whip emanating from their casting hand with a range of 4Sd.

description: Creates a fist sized blob of transparent liquid which the caster may place on any surface. If anyone else touches or disturbs the blob it will explode covering anyone stood within a 1Sd radius with a corrosive acid similar to Carathic water. Victims will suffer 1D4+4 damage. If they are wearing armour they can roll for protection the acid will however do its damage to the armour instead. Damage is taken at a rate of 2 points each round and if washed off quickly the damage taken will be halved. Should the blob created be placed in water it will maintain its cohesion and float on the surface of the water barely visible as a slight bump.
short_description: Creates a fist sized blob of transparent liquid which the caster may place on any surface.

description: Causes a radial spray of water to emanate from the caster’s hand. The spray will be strong enough to reduce an attacker’s chance to hit by 20, it will also deflect most missiles if the caster makes a 2xbasic parry roll. The spray will protect against frontal flame attacks up to 20 points. It may also suppress a small fire.
short_description: Causes a radial spray of water to emanate from the caster’s hand.

description: Creates a solid barrier under the water. The barrier will be made of water but will not let anything pass through it including strong currents. The barrier may be created as a sphere around the caster of 1Sd diameter per level or as a wall 2Sd high and 2Sd wide and 2lk thick per level of the caster.
short_description: Creates a solid barrier under the water. The barrier will be made of water but will not let anything pass through it including strong currents.

description: Acts to prevent the target from sinking should they fall into water or other liquid. The spell will enable the target to float with their head above water even if unconscious. The spell will also help to stop the target’s clothing from becoming wet, as well as any hazardous effects of contact with the liquid itself. The spell will remain active for the full duration offering its protection whether the target is immersed or not.
short_description: Acts to prevent the target from sinking should they fall into water or other liquid. The spell will enable the target to float with their head above water even if unconscious.

description: Enables the caster to render a volume of water invisible for the duration of the spell. The volume can be up to 4Sd across and 4Sd deep. The invisibility will affect just the one volume and any additional water flowing in will become invisible and any flowing out will turn visible. The spell will not affect creatures or objects floating or swimming in the water. Thus a fish may appear to be suspended in space. A smaller volume may also be affected by this spell. It has even been used simply to hide tears.
short_description: Enables the caster to render a volume of water invisible for the duration of the spell. The volume can be up to 4Sd across and 4Sd deep.

description: Enables the caster to create the illusion of water or other liquid over an area up to 4Sd across in all dimensions. The illusion may be a duplication of another area of water within range of the spell as indicated by the caster during casting or it can simply be a generic appearing liquid based on a small sample the caster uses at the time of casting. The illusion will not move, but will be convincingly three dimensional until walked through.
short_description: Enables the caster to create the illusion of water or other liquid over an area up to 4Sd across in all dimensions.

description: Allows the caster to hear and interpret the many and distorted sounds under the waters of the sea. For this to be effective the caster will need to put their head below the water for a full round. The caster may determine the sound of a ship moving through the water, a large sea creature or a shoal of fish. They may be able to hear waves upon the shore. They may also gain a rough idea how deep the water is. Sounds may be heard up to 5mille per level of the caster.
short_description: Allows the caster to hear and interpret the many and distorted sounds under the waters of the sea. For this to be effective the caster will need to put their head below the water for a full round.

description: Allows the caster to breathe water without drowning. It will require them to breathe lungfulls of water which is an entirely unnatural thing to do, and they may need to be on the point of drowning before they will do so. Once the spell ends the caster must evacuate all the water from their lungs to breathe air again, which will leave them coughing and retching for a further 2D6 rounds.
short_description: Allows the caster to breathe water without drowning.

description: Allows the recipient to talk as normal when below water and for their words to be understood by anyone else within range as if they were in air.
short_description: Allows the recipient to talk as normal when below water and for their words to be understood by anyone else within range as if they were in air.

description: Causes any large body of water to yield into the caster’s hands enough edible items which live or grow in water to feed 1 person per level of the caster for one day. The food will be uncooked and may include: fish, shellfish, roe, and weed etc. The nature, variety, and edibility will depend upon the nature of the locality.
short_description: Causes any large body of water to yield into the caster’s hands enough edible items which live or grow in water to feed 1 person per level of the caster for one day.

description: Summons a lesser water spirit and allow it to manifest using any large amount of liquid available, e.g. a stream, pond, lake etc. Lesser water spirits may be ordered to do various tasks within their capabilities such as pull objects across water, prevent individuals from drowning, or retrieving sunken objects. Lesser water spirits will not move more than 1Sd away from a source of water.
short_description: Summons a lesser water spirit and allow it to manifest using any large amount of liquid available, e.g. a stream, pond, lake etc.

description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by LUCHA magic and water spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 3 symbol LUCHA spells and attacks by manifest lesser water elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 4 symbol LUCHA spells and attacks by greater water elementals for 1R before being dispelled. It will be dispelled by any 5 symbol spells or the attack of an water drake.
short_description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by LUCHA magic and water spirits.

description: Enables the caster to scry using a bowlful of clear acid. Vinegar or citrus juice will do, but the stronger the acid, the sharper the vision will be. The caster must have a small sample of material from the person, object or place to be scried, such as hair or stone chips. It is necessary to dissolve the material in the acid for the spell to be effective. The person or place will only be seen if they are near some water (or other liquid), though even a droplet is usually sufficient. Once the spell has ended the acid will be of no use to cast the spell again and must be discarded. The ranges for each level are as follows: Level 1 1 mille Level 2 5 mille Level 3 25 mille Level 4 100 mille Level 5 unknown
short_description: Enables the caster to scry using a bowlful of clear acid. Vinegar or citrus juice will do, but the stronger the acid, the sharper the vision will be.

description: Enables the caster to ‘hear’ the water spirits and possibly gain insights into what they may have seen or what may come to pass. To hear the spirits it is necessary for the caster to immerse their head in a body of water such as the sea, a lake or river. The caster should make a luck roll to see if they actually hear anything beyond the normal background of simple phrases about fluid dynamics. What they do hear is entirely at the discretion of the GM and will not necessarily be of any use or relevance to the caster. The information that the spirits know is often limited to movements of many fish, ships, storms, elemental magic and, very occasionally, historical insights about a place. They will rarely be concerned with individuals, or their activities. Whilst water spirits may be able to understand the words of the caster, they will rarely deign to interact even if questioned. Although politeness and respect are always worthwhile as water is a capricious element.
short_description: Enables the caster to ‘hear’ the water spirits and possibly gain insights into what they may have seen or what may come to pass.

description: Allows the caster to coax a small volume of water into whatever 3 dimensional shape they care to form. The spell will support an object of roughly 1Sd diameter per level of the caster. The shape is not solid and could be walked through, although if formed under water might seem much thicker than normal water. Even if attacked the shape will simply re-form whilst the spell lasts.
short_description: Allows the caster to coax a small volume of water into whatever 3 dimensional shape they care to form. The spell will support an object of roughly 1Sd diameter per level of the caster.

description: Similar effect to LUCHA-YLG but will destroy a volume of water equivalent to a sphere 1Sd across in a violent explosion. Anyone stood within 1Sd will take 1D4 points of damage, and will automatically be knocked off their feet. Anyone within 2Sd will a suffer a knockback attack with a strength of 50 from the force of the explosion. It will cause 2D10 points of damage to a manifest water spirit’s HP.
short_description: Similar effect to LUCHA-YLG but will destroy a volume of water equivalent to a sphere 1Sd across in a violent explosion.

description: Holds back a volume of water. A larger hole in a ship, a stream, a small flood. It will generally hold off rain about 2Sd around the caster, it might also create a dry passage through a waterfall or even part the waters of a pond.
short_description: Holds back a volume of water. A larger hole in a ship, a stream, a small flood.

description: Creates currents in water to pull the caster along. If they are swimming, it will pull them along at double speed. If they are in a small ship or trade vessel they will be pulled at a normal speed. If they are in a smaller rowing boat or skiff, they will be pulled at double the normal speed for such a vessel. The spell might also nudge an even larger ship very slowly, perhaps to aid with docking.
short_description: Creates currents in water to pull the caster along. If they are swimming, it will pull them along at double speed.

description: Surrounds the caster with a 1Lk thick layer of water. The caster will have enough air inside the layer to breathe for the duration of the spell, if the spell is lengthened they may start to drown. The water will slow the caster down slightly reducing their AG by 4 points. The armour will work with other armour and due to the refraction of the water will reduce an attacker’s chance to hit by 20%. It will also act as 5 point armour against missiles and smashing weapons. The watery coat protects from fire and heat, absorbing all fire damage up to a total of 50 points after which the caster will start to be boiled, and will continue to take damage even if no longer exposed directly to the fire itself.
short_description: Surrounds the caster with a 1Lk thick layer of water. The caster will have enough air inside the layer to breathe for the duration of the spell, if the spell is lengthened they may start to drown.

description: Heals the recipient of a number of ailments including blood loss, urinary infections, chronic internal bleeding, blood poisoning and kidney failure. The procedure is also said to leave the skin in excellent condition. The recipient of this spell must spend at least a day in a specially prepared pool or bath. The pool will take around 10 minutes to prepare must be marked with the caster’s own fluids, and allowed to become perfectly still before the spell is cast. The recipient should then enter the water causing as little disturbance as possible. The recipient must be totally submerged in the water but will not drown. Although they should roll INTx3 to avoid panicking and trying to surface for air. If the water is badly disturbed the spell may need to be re-cast. The spell will treat specifically VGR loss through bleeding, including from a damaged internal organ. Once in the pool the bleeding will heal at the same rate as it is lost for the first half of the day, then slowly improve until all VGR is healed and the bleeding stops. If the bleeding is particularly severe the victim may still die in the first few minutes before the pool takes full effect. It should be noted that the spell is also effective against a pierced stomach which would ordinarily be untreatable. NB if both the victim’s kidneys have already failed the spell will only treat the associated blood poisoning, and will need to be recast periodically to keep them alive. The spell is also effective against type 1 poisons , halving the rate of attack for the first hour, then halting the progress of the poison completely.
short_description: Heals the recipient of a number of ailments including blood loss, urinary infections, chronic internal bleeding, blood poisoning and kidney failure.

description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to water. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired. The recipient will maintain roughly their normal form, although perhaps a little shorter and squatter due to the weight of the water. On land, the recipient will only be able to writhe, and cannot move far from the spot where the spell was cast, but in water may be moved by currents. In water they will be virtually invisible, and will not drown. They may see, but will only hear at half chance, and will be unable to speak. Moreover, they will be unable to cast spells involving other elements and other spells, which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing), may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If they are struck by a cutting or impaling weapon, it will pass harmlessly through their body. If the they are struck by a large smashing weapon (half their HP or more in one blow) they should attempt to roll Keyx4 to maintain their form. If they should fail this, parts of them may be ‘splashed’. Should this happen they will begin to loose cohesion and must gain more fluid from some source and attempt to roll Keyx4 on the following rounds. If the recipient is still not whole by the end of the spell they will lose cohesion entirely and their soul will be lost amongst the water spirits. The recipient may attempt to dodge an object placed within them to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to water. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired.

description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to water. The beast will maintain roughly its normal form, although perhaps a little shorter and squatter due to the weight of the water. On land, the beast will only be able to writhe, and cannot move far from the spot where the spell was cast, but in water may be moved by currents. In water it will be virtually invisible, and will not drown. It may see, but will only hear at half chance, and will be unable to make any sound. If it is struck by a cutting or impaling weapon, it will pass harmlessly through the watery body. If the it is struck by a large smashing weapon (half its HP or more in one blow) it should attempt to roll Keyx4 to maintain its form. If it should fail this, parts of it may be ‘splashed’. Should this happen the beast will begin to loose cohesion and must gain more fluid from some source and attempt to roll Keyx4 on the following rounds. If the beast is still not whole by the end of the spell it will lose cohesion entirely and its soul will be lost amongst the water spirits. The beast may attempt to dodge an object placed within it to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to water.

description: Enables the caster to turn a non-magical object up to a 1Sd across to water. The object will maintain roughly its normal form although perhaps a little shorter and squatter due to the weight of the liquid. If already in water it will be virtually invisible. If it is struck by a weapon, it will pass harmlessly through it. If it is struck by a large smashing weapon (half its HP or more in one blow) parts of it may be ‘splashed’. Should this happen the object may begin to loose cohesion and must be given more fluid from some source to regain its full form. Another object placed within it will become embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a non-magical object up to a 1Sd across to water.

description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of damage from high seas, tidal waves or flooding. Rising water will break against the object but cannot penetrate it whilst the spell is in operation. The spell will also protect from the physical results of attacks by water elementals or water spells that would otherwise cause damage. The spell will be effective on objects such as a large building or ship that would fit within the radius of the spell’s area of effect.
short_description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of damage from high seas, tidal waves or flooding.

description: Creates a wave in water that moves ahead of the caster. If they are in a large ship or trade vessel they will be pulled at a normal speed. Smaller vessels will be pulled much faster.
short_description: Creates a wave in water that moves ahead of the caster. If they are in a large ship or trade vessel they will be pulled at a normal speed.

description: Allows the caster to share themselves with the watery elements, allowing them walk upon the surface of any normal liquid for the duration of the spell. It will not, however calm a stormy sea for the caster’s benefit and using this spell they might find themselves unable to balance upon the shifting surface and tossed about like a toy.
short_description: Allows the caster to share themselves with the watery elements, allowing them walk upon the surface of any normal liquid for the duration of the spell.

description: Produces a fast moving liquid mass when the caster slaps their hand on the surface of the water. The mass will cause a wave-like disturbance on the surface as it moves away from the caster in a straight line, travelling at roughly 40Sd each round. If the mass hits a solid object it will explode in spray and foam causing 2D10+20 damage. This is usually sufficient to destroy a rowing boat or cause structural damage to a larger vessel. The explosion is unlikely to be triggered by a small or flexible object in the water like a sea creature or swimmer. The further the wave travels the lower its accuracy. As follows: Range Accuracy 10Sd 70% 20Sd 65% 40Sd 60% 80Sd 55% 120Sd 50% 160Sd 45% 200Sd 40% 240Sd 35% 280Sd 30% 320Sd 25% 360Sd 20% 400Sd 15% 440Sd 10% 480Sd 5% Accuracy will also be appropriately reduced depending on the size of the target and if it is end-on or broadside.
short_description: Produces a fast moving liquid mass when the caster slaps their hand on the surface of the water.

description: Causes violent spouts of water to shoot up randomly anywhere within a 20Sd radius of the point of casting. The spell must be cast over open water to be effective. The chances of anyone or any floating object being hit by such a spout will be 10% on any given round. Anyone hit my such a spurt will be thrown into the air and take 1D8 points of damage (they may also need to make a swim roll). Small vessels struck will take damage and may be swamped or capsized. Larger vessels may take light damage. If cast on land (not in an arid or frozen area) geysers will erupt from the ground over a similar 20Sd radius area. The chances of being struck on any particular round will still be 10% but they force of a geyser will only be enough to knock someone over causing just 1D6 damage. With the exception of the caster the spouts or geysers are indiscriminate, striking both friend and foe alike.
short_description: Causes violent spouts of water to shoot up randomly anywhere within a 20Sd radius of the point of casting. The spell must be cast over open water to be effective.

description: Causes a tall stationary wave to be thrown up anywhere that the caster indicates within range. This spell must be cast over a body of open water or other liquid to be effective. The wave will have a steep side with a foaming overhang facing away from the caster, and a gentle slope facing towards them. The wave will be about 3Sd wide, 2Sd high, and 4Sd long. For each further casting the wave may be doubled in any one dimension. The wave rises rapidly from the water and any swimmers must make a swim -20 roll to avoid going under, also any boats will require a seamanship roll to prevent them from capsizing. Anyone trying to move through the wave will be buffeted and dragged 1D4 Sd below the water by strong currents within the wave. When the spell ends the wave will break and crash back into the surrounding liquid.
short_description: Causes a tall stationary wave to be thrown up anywhere that the caster indicates within range. This spell must be cast over a body of open water or other liquid to be effective.

description: Creates a 1Sd wide by 2Sd high tunnel under the water where indicated by the caster. The tunnel will extend for up to 1Sd per level of the caster and as a rule will run along the bed of the water body that the caster is messing around with. Although such a portal could be created through a waterfall. Once the spell is finished the waters will crash back into the space stunning anyone unlucky enough to remain within.
short_description: Creates a 1Sd wide by 2Sd high tunnel under the water where indicated by the caster.

description: Dismisses a manifest lesser water spirit. If cast at a greater or high water spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a manifest lesser water spirit. If cast at a greater or high water spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by water magic and water spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 4 symbol LUCHA spells and attacks by manifest greater water elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 5 symbol LUCHA spells and attacks by water drakes for 1R before being dispelled. If the caster moves, the area protected will move with them.
short_description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by water magic and water spirits.

description: Enables the caster to summon a greater water spirit and allow it to manifest. The spell should be cast near or over a large body of water such as a lake, river or stream. Once summoned a greater water spirit may leave the body of water with no ill effects. The spirit may be asked to attack a foe by the caster. They will not normally chase a fleeing opponent unless ordered to but will continue to fight someone on the ground. Greater water spirits may be asked straightforward questions by the caster giving a yes or no answer. They may be asked to move large objects through the water as well as preventing individuals from drowning.
short_description: Enables the caster to summon a greater water spirit and allow it to manifest. The spell should be cast near or over a large body of water such as a lake, river or stream.

description: Turns the caster (and non-magically protected accoutrements) to water and allows them to flow as a moving puddle across the floor in any direction they choose. The puddle may even flow up low steps. They may move at 12Sd each round across a level surface, and 1Sd each round uphill. In this form the caster may see but will only hear at half chance, and will be unable to speak. Moreover they will be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. As with other watery forms the caster will take no damage when struck by a weapon and may re-form if splashed. The puddle may flow through porous materials and small cracks provided that they can get all of their water through before the spell ends. This may take 1D10+4 rounds to complete depending upon the size of holes the water is flowing through (a porous material may take 1D10+4 minutes at the GM’s discretion). On the round that the spell ends the caster will re-form into their normal shape.
short_description: Turns the caster (and non-magically protected accoutrements) to water and allows them to flow as a moving puddle across the floor in any direction they choose. The puddle may even flow up low steps.

description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by water magic and water spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol LUCHA spells and attacks by manifest water drakes for the duration of the spell. If the sentinel is killed then the spell will cease to function. The sentinel will appear to drip a transparent slime for the spell’s duration, often copiously from their eyes nose and mouth. Having their body imbued with such power for such a period of time has its cost. Whilst the sentinel will feel few ill effects whilst the spell is active, they will begin drowning in the slime as soon as the spell ends. They will need help from a healer to void the slime from their throat and ungs or take a point of VGR damage from asphyxiation each round that they cannot breathe. Their nose may continue to run, as from a heavy cold, for several days after.
short_description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by water magic and water spirits.

description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by water magic and water spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol LUCHA spells and attacks by manifest water drakes for the duration of the spell. Carved figureheads on ships are often used for this purpose.Such an object will run with water whilst the spell is active.
short_description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by water magic and water spirits.

description: Will dismiss a lesser or greater Water elemental. If cast at a high Water spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Will dismiss a lesser or greater Water elemental. If cast at a high Water spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Summons a High Water spirit and allows it to appear from any large body of water in range the spouts or geysers are indiscriminate, as a huge watery dragon. Once summoned striking both friend and foe alike. the water dragon may leave the water and walk upon the land or fly through the air. The spirit may be directed to attack a foe by the caster. Lucha Meaf Ghan -
short_description: Summons a High Water spirit and allows it to appear from any large body of water in range the spouts or geysers are indiscriminate, as a huge watery dragon.

description: Causes violent spouts of water to shoot up randomly in a ring around the point of casting. The spell must be cast over open water or liquid. Initially the ring will be in a 40Sd radius circle about of the caster. But the caster may push the width of the whole ring outwards, creating an unaffected area in the centre. Doing this will reduce the width of the band of affected area at the same time. Thus if the ring is pushed out to a 50Sd radius, a 20Sd radius unaffected area could be made in the centre but the width of the affected band would have been reduced to just 30Sd The chances of anyone or any floating object being hit by such a spout will be 10% on any given round. Anyone hit my such a spurt will be thrown into the air and take 1D8 points of damage (they may also need to make a swim roll). Small vessels struck will take damage and may be swamped or capsized. Larger vessels may take light damage. If cast on land (not in an arid or frozen area) geysers will erupt from the ground over a similar 20Sd radius area. The chances of being struck on any particular round will still be 10% but they force of a geyser will only be enough to knock someone over causing just 1D6 damage. With the exception of the caster the spouts or geysers are indiscriminate, striking both friend and foe alike.
short_description: Causes violent spouts of water to shoot up randomly in a ring around the point of casting. The spell must be cast over open water or liquid.

description: Gives the caster improved vision in dim conditions. They may see double the distance illuminated by a weak light source, like a torch, and be able to see well in partial moonlight.
short_description: Gives the caster improved vision in dim conditions. They may see double the distance illuminated by a weak light source, like a torch, and be able to see well in partial moonlight.

description: Protects the caster’s vision from bright sunlight and their skin from sunburn. The caster’s eyes will appear to darken while this spell is running.
short_description: Protects the caster’s vision from bright sunlight and their skin from sunburn. The caster’s eyes will appear to darken while this spell is running.

description: Enables the caster to leave glowing marks on any surfaces they touch, like a phosphorescent ink from their fingertip. The marks will not illuminate much but can be seen from about 10Sd away in complete darkness. The marks can be used for writing, or direction signs etc. They can be drawn onto living creatures and even the surface of still liquids.
short_description: Enables the caster to leave glowing marks on any surfaces they touch, like a phosphorescent ink from their fingertip.

description: Creates a small, intense point of light on a non-living object which the caster touches at the time of casting. The light will illuminate an area of approximately 4Sd in radius. If the object is moved the light will move with it.
short_description: Creates a small, intense point of light on a non-living object which the caster touches at the time of casting. The light will illuminate an area of approximately 4Sd in radius.

description: Effectively hides any form of illumination held by the caster, as viewed from the front. Thus anyone stood behind or to the side of the caster will see the light and the area that it illuminates, but anyone stood in-front of them would see only darkness unless the caster is lit by another light source.
short_description: Effectively hides any form of illumination held by the caster, as viewed from the front.

description: Enables the caster to plant a single, dimly glowing fingerprint on any suitable surface. Should any new source of light then fall upon the fingerprint whilst the spell is still running the enchanter will become aware. This will work even if the caster has moved a great distance from where they left the fingerprint.
short_description: Enables the caster to plant a single, dimly glowing fingerprint on any suitable surface.

description: Summons a tiny floating wisp of light to obey the commands of the caster. It may be asked to move around at a rate of 10Sd per round. The light may also be asked to investigate an area, reporting with simple yes or no answers by moving up and down or from side to side. Barely stronger than marsh gas, the light will not illuminate much beyond 2Sd.
short_description: Summons a tiny floating wisp of light to obey the commands of the caster. It may be asked to move around at a rate of 10Sd per round.

description: Causes the target to lose their sparkle, making them seem dull and less engaging to others. The spell effectively reduces the target’s charisma by 2 points whilst the spell is running.
short_description: Causes the target to lose their sparkle, making them seem dull and less engaging to others. The spell effectively reduces the target’s charisma by 2 points whilst the spell is running.

description: Gives the recipient that extra bit of razzle dazzle. They will seem that bit more interesting and charming to others. This effectively adds +2 to the recipient’s charisma.
short_description: Gives the recipient that extra bit of razzle dazzle. They will seem that bit more interesting and charming to others.

description: Allows the caster to draw upon the power of the light allowing them to run much faster for the duration of the spell. This effectively allows the caster to add 5 to their Move for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Allows the caster to draw upon the power of the light allowing them to run much faster for the duration of the spell.

description: Causes a weapon which the caster touches to glow with a flickering light. The affected weapon will dazzle and distract any opponents: reducing their chance to parry the weapon each time by 1D20. The glowing weapon will also intermittently illuminate the area up to 2Sd for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Causes a weapon which the caster touches to glow with a flickering light. The affected weapon will dazzle and distract any opponents: reducing their chance to parry the weapon each time by 1D20.

description: Protects the caster from key flaying attacks of darkness spells or creatures aligned with darkness, such as wraiths.
short_description: Protects the caster from key flaying attacks of darkness spells or creatures aligned with darkness, such as wraiths.

description: Causes the caster’s eyes to glow with a pale eldritch light. This will not affect the caster’s vision. The glow is not bright enough to do more than perhaps aid reading.
short_description: Causes the caster’s eyes to glow with a pale eldritch light. This will not affect the caster’s vision.

description: A more powerful version of Ynn-LERRU. The glowing marks created will be much brighter and each will illuminate a 2Sd radius area.
short_description: A more powerful version of Ynn-LERRU. The glowing marks created will be much brighter and each will illuminate a 2Sd radius area.

description: Creates an intense source of light similar to the light created by Ynn-CYA. However the light will be much more powerful and will effectively illuminate an area of 20Sd radius.
short_description: Creates an intense source of light similar to the light created by Ynn-CYA. However the light will be much more powerful and will effectively illuminate an area of 20Sd radius.

description: Gives the recipient the ability to run at double normal speed without tiring. Even the caster actually run for the duration of the entire spell they will not be out of breath.
short_description: Gives the recipient the ability to run at double normal speed without tiring. Even the caster actually run for the duration of the entire spell they will not be out of breath.

description: Causes the weapon that the caster is holding to glow with an intense white light. The weapon cannot be parried by a non-magical weapon, but may be parried by a shield or dodged. Normal non-magical armour will only give half protection against the glowing weapon which can pass right through and cause 1D6 damage to the VGR. The light from the weapon will illuminate up to 8Sd radius.
short_description: Causes the weapon that the caster is holding to glow with an intense white light. The weapon cannot be parried by a non-magical weapon, but may be parried by a shield or dodged.

description: Causes a 1Sd glowing shaft of pure white light to emanate from the caster’s hand. The shaft has no weight and may be used at 2xAG/DFT or the caster may develop an attack skill for the weapon. When thrust towards a target the shaft will instantly extend up to 20Sd, although the chance to hit is reduced by 10% for every 5Sd the target is from the caster. The light will do 1D6 damage at level 1, plus 1 extra point of damage for each further level of the caster. The shaft cannot be used to strafe as it resumes its original length almost instantaneously. The light cannot be parried by any other weapons except a shield although it may be dodged. Armour will give normal protection against damage caused by the shaft. The shaft cannot be used to parry, as weapons will pass straight through it.
short_description: Causes a 1Sd glowing shaft of pure white light to emanate from the caster’s hand. The shaft has no weight and may be used at 2xAG/DFT or the caster may develop an attack skill for the weapon.

description: Creates a small glowing mark where the caster touches at the time of casting. Once set the mark will remain indefinitely until someone else’s shadow falls across the lit mark. Once this happens the mark will for flare up briefly, but so brightly that it can blind anyone within 1Sd (unless they were specifically looking away or protecting their eyes at the time). It will halve the sight based skills of anyone within 3Sd. The blinding effects will last for 30-VGR minutes. As a side effect the flare will also momentarily light up the area up to 100Sd.
short_description: Creates a small glowing mark where the caster touches at the time of casting. Once set the mark will remain indefinitely until someone else’s shadow falls across the lit mark.

description: Creates a small but pure white light on any object that the caster touches at the time of casting. The light will effectively illuminate an area of 2Sd radius. The object may be moved or carried while the spell is in effect and the light will move with it. Anyone in the area of illumination will be protected from key flaying attacks by darkness spells or creatures. The light will also repel creatures bound to darkness such as revenants and wraiths.
short_description: Creates a small but pure white light on any object that the caster touches at the time of casting. The light will effectively illuminate an area of 2Sd radius.

description: Creates a shimmering barrier of light anywhere within range of the spell. The barrier can be up to 1Sd high, 2Sd wide and 1Sd thick for each level of the caster, or it may be wrapped round into a hemisphere 2Sd in diameter and 1Sd high for each level of the caster. The barrier will not prevent passage but any sighted creatures will be blinded as they pass through and will only be able to use all sight based skills at half chance for 1D6+1 rounds afterwards. Attempts to protect their eyes as they pass through will have little or no effects as the light pierces even metal. Only magic (and blood silver) can protect against the blinding effects. Darkness elementals and creatures bound to darkness such as revenants and wraiths cannot pass through the barrier.
short_description: Creates a shimmering barrier of light anywhere within range of the spell.

description: Gives the target immunity from magically created light attacks as well as any severe forms of damage caused by natural, or concentrated light and other forms of radiant energy.
short_description: Gives the target immunity from magically created light attacks as well as any severe forms of damage caused by natural, or concentrated light and other forms of radiant energy.

description: Hides the caster’s reflection in any kind of surface such as a mirror or water.
short_description: Hides the caster’s reflection in any kind of surface such as a mirror or water.

description: Creates an illusory snapshot of a scene in an area up to 4Sd in across. Thus a the way a room appeared at a particular time of day could be preserved as an illusion for anyone entering the room. Even static images of people within the area at the time the spell was cast will be taken as part of the tableau.
short_description: Creates an illusory snapshot of a scene in an area up to 4Sd in across. Thus a the way a room appeared at a particular time of day could be preserved as an illusion for anyone entering the room.

description: Causes the caster’s skin to turn a vibrant shade of green. As a result the caster need not eat for that day, provided they spend some hours in daylight. Additionally, if the caster spends the day in daylight they may heal any lost VGR at double normal rate.
short_description: Causes the caster’s skin to turn a vibrant shade of green. As a result the caster need not eat for that day, provided they spend some hours in daylight.

description: Creates a large sphere of soft light approximately 1Sd in diameter at any point that the caster indicates within range of the spell. Once created the sphere will float in the same place for the duration of the spell softly illuminating an area of 10Sd in radius. Such a sphere will last for approximately 1 day per level of the caster before vanishing. They are often used to illuminate large spaces.
short_description: Creates a large sphere of soft light approximately 1Sd in diameter at any point that the caster indicates within range of the spell.

description: Summons a lesser light spirit and allow it to manifest. If summoned in daylight the spirit will appear much brighter than in darkness. A lesser light spirit will appear as a formless wispy blob of light floating in the air. It may be asked by the caster to move around and illuminate any area within range, in complete darkness such an spirit will illuminate an area of up to 5Sd radius. Such spirits may be ordered to change their shape and cover or envelop something like a glowing skin. They may also be asked to fill carved text on a surface or other indentations to highlight it.
short_description: Summons a lesser light spirit and allow it to manifest. If summoned in daylight the spirit will appear much brighter than in darkness.

description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 3 symbol Ynn spells and attacks by manifest lesser light elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 4 symbol Ynn spells and attacks by greater light elementals for 1R before being dispelled. It will be dispelled by any 5 symbol spells or the attack of an light drake.
short_description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits.

description: Enables the caster to scry using a highly reflective surface like a mirror or even a pool of liquid. The caster must have seen the person or area to be scried at least once and must make a successful memorise roll to recall the image accurately to serve as a focus, the person or place will only be seen if they are in full or partial sunlight. The vision granted by the light spirits is sometimes current and sometimes a view of past events. This is more likely if the person being scried is with the caster at the time of the scrying.
short_description: Enables the caster to scry using a highly reflective surface like a mirror or even a pool of liquid.

description: Allows the caster to ask simple questions of the light. Light spirits offer yes or no answers by changing the quality of the light that is shining. There is no guarantee that any spirit will give an answer or understand the question. This spell will only work in daylight, strong sources of illumination or bright moonlight.
short_description: Allows the caster to ask simple questions of the light. Light spirits offer yes or no answers by changing the quality of the light that is shining.

description: Enables the caster to pull beams of light around. This may be used artistically, or simply to direct a source of light to a spot it is needed. With skill an entire view might be bent through 90 degrees.
short_description: Enables the caster to pull beams of light around. This may be used artistically, or simply to direct a source of light to a spot it is needed.

description: Wraps the caster in a bright cloak of light. The cloak will illuminate up to 10Sd and is painful for others to look at directly. Because the cloak is so difficult to look at directly any attacks made upon the caster will be halved (unless the attacker uses a different sense to attack than vision). The cloak will also offer complete protection from magical darkness attacks and the attacks of darkness elementals (unless such an attack is a critical).
short_description: Wraps the caster in a bright cloak of light. The cloak will illuminate up to 10Sd and is painful for others to look at directly.

description: Requires the subject to be laid down in a pool of strong light, preferably daylight for as long as the spell takes to work. The spell will cure the subject of any fear effects caused by darkness magic. It will also help those suffering from the memories of traumatic events–although this may not work in all cases. The healing light will also restore any lost points of Charisma at a rate of 1 point each hour.
short_description: Requires the subject to be laid down in a pool of strong light, preferably daylight for as long as the spell takes to work.

description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to an insubstantial body of light. If the target is unwilling, the caster must successfully overcome the target’s Key first. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired. The recipient will appear as a glowing semblance of their normal form. In this form the recipient will be able to writhe, but not move far from the spot where the spell was cast. They will illuminate an area of 6Sd radius about them. They may see and hear, but will be unable to talk. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If the recipient is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them, likewise they will take no damage from falling, fire, cold, acid, gas, drowning or lightning. They may be affected by magic depending upon its effect. The recipient may attempt to dodge an object placed within them to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to an insubstantial body of light. If the target is unwilling, the caster must successfully overcome the target’s Key first.

description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to an insubstantial body of light. The caster must successfully overcome the target’s Key first. The beast will appear as a glowing semblance of its normal form. In this form the beast will be able to writhe, but not move far from the spot where the spell was cast. It will illuminate an area of 6Sd radius about it. It may see and hear, but will be unable to make sounds. If the beast is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through it, likewise it will take no damage from falling, fire, cold, acid, gas, drowning or lightning. It may be affected by magic depending upon its effect. The beast may attempt to dodge an object placed within it to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to an insubstantial body of light. The caster must successfully overcome the target’s Key first.

description: Turns an object up to 1Sd across into a glowing, but insubstantial, version of its normal form. The object will illuminate an area of roughly 4Sd radius but may be seen from some considerable distance. If the object is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through it.
