The object will also take no damage from falling, fire, cold, acid, water or lightning. The object cannot be moved whilst in this form. Another object placed within it will become embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Turns an object up to 1Sd across into a glowing, but insubstantial, version of its normal form.

description: Allows the caster to throw a small and intensely bright ball of light in a high arc towards a distant target. Once thrown the ball can reach targets at a considerable distance and at night it will illuminate the area beneath as it passes. On impact the ball will expand over the course of one round into a large bright white hemisphere 10Sd across. Anyone caught within the hemisphere of light will be stunned and suffer 1D4 burn damage to exposed skin. They will also be temporarily blinded and should make a roll against their key to determine the duration, as follows: key roll under key 30-VGR rounds. under key x3 30-VGR minutes. over key x3 30-VGR hours. After one round the light will blink out. The maximum range for the spell is 480Sd, the minimum is 0. Curiously the ball will always take 12R to reach its target regardless of which range. If it is 0 the ball will simply ascend slowly and then slowly float down. Given the broad nature of the resulting hemisphere this spell needs no accuracy. It will always hit the general area it is aimed at.
short_description: Allows the caster to throw a small and intensely bright ball of light in a high arc towards a distant target.

description: Causes random shafts of bright burning hot light to stab down from above, anywhere within the spell’s range. The chances of a target being struck within the area of the spell are 10% on any given round and the light will do 1D6+4 damage should it hit a target. It is almost impossible to parry or dodge such a shaft as there is no way to anticipate it.
short_description: Causes random shafts of bright burning hot light to stab down from above, anywhere within the spell’s range.

description: Creates a shimmering barrier of light anywhere within range of the spell. The barrier can be up to 1Sd high, 4Sd wide and 2Sd thick for each level of the caster, or it may be wrapped round into a hemisphere 4Sd in diameter and 2Sd high for each level of the caster. The barrier will not prevent passage but any sighted creatures will be blinded as they pass through and will only be able to use all sight based skills at 10% chance for 1D6+1 rounds afterwards. Attempts to protect their eyes as they pass through will have little or no effects as the light pierces even metal. Only magic (and blood silver) can protect against the blinding effects.
short_description: Creates a shimmering barrier of light anywhere within range of the spell.

description: Dismisses a lesser light spirit. If cast at a greater or high light spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser light spirit. If cast at a greater or high light spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 4 symbol Ynn spells and attacks by manifest greater light elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 5 symbol Ynn spells and attacks by light drakes for 1R before being dispelled. If the caster moves, the area protected will move with them.
short_description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits.

description: Allows a greater light spirit to manifest. If cast in daylight the spirit will be twice the SIZ and brightness as one summoned in the dark. The caster may ask such a creature to attack a foe. Any creature of the darkness must roll under its KEY x7 or flee from the spirit. A light spirit can be asked to scout from the air and answer straightforward questions with yes or no answers, although it will be unable to lift up any object larger than a small child.
short_description: Allows a greater light spirit to manifest. If cast in daylight the spirit will be twice the SIZ and brightness as one summoned in the dark.

description: Enables the caster (and their accoutrements) to turn to an insubstantial body of light and allow them to float about like a spirit. The caster will appear as a glowing semblance of their normal form and will illuminate an area of 4Sd radius about them. They may move unhindered in any direction through air, glass or water at their normal move. In this form the caster may see and hear but will not be able to talk. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If the caster is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them, likewise they will take no damage from falling, fire, cold, acid, drowning or lightning. They may be affected by magic, depending upon its effect. They may also pass through transparent surfaces like glass or water but must make a KEYx4 roll to reform their form as they move from one material to another. The caster requires at least one other light source to be within range if this is extinguished or goes out of range they must make a KEYx4 roll to maintain their form. If they fail this roll they will loose their form. They may try again on successive rounds to regain their form but cannot undertake any other actions. If the caster is still not whole by the end of the spell they will lose cohesion entirely and their soul will be lost amongst the light spirits.
short_description: Enables the caster (and their accoutrements) to turn to an insubstantial body of light and allow them to float about like a spirit.

description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol Ynn spells and attacks by manifest light drakes for the duration of the spell. If the sentinel is killed then the spell will cease to function. The sentinel will appear as a humanoid figure of bright light illuminating the entire 20Sd area about them. Having their body imbued with such power for such a period of time has its cost. Although the sentinel will feel no ill effects whilst the spell is active, their skin will be red and peeling all over by the time the spell ends they will also be blinded for 30-VGR (or CON) hours. When their sight starts to return all sight based skills will be reduced by 60%, recovering at in 20% increments over the following days.
short_description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits.

description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol Ynn spells and attacks by manifest light drakes for the duration of the spell. Statues, beacons or carved stones can often be found on the walls of ancient buildings or cities to be used for this purpose. The object affected by the spell will glow brightly, illuminating the entire 20Sd radius area.
short_description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by light magic and light spirits.

description: Dismisses a lesser or greater light elemental. If cast at a high light spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser or greater light elemental. If cast at a high light spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Summons a high light spirit and enable it to manifest anywhere within the spell’s range. The spirit will appear in the form of a great glowing Light Drake difficult to look at directly, lighting up an area of 20Sd with bright white or sometimes coloured light. The Light Dragon will attack any foes as directed by the caster whilst the spell remains in effect..
short_description: Summons a high light spirit and enable it to manifest anywhere within the spell’s range.

description: Causes random shafts of bright burning hot light to stab down from above, anywhere within a ring around the point of casting. Initially the ring will be in a 40Sd radius circle about of the point of casting. But the caster may push the width of the whole ring outwards creating an unaffected area in the centre. Doing this will reduce the width of the band of affected ground at the same time. Thus if the ring is pushed out to a 50Sd radius, a 20Sd radius unaffected area could be made in the centre but the width of the affected band would have been reduced to just 30Sd The chances of a target being struck within the area of the spell are 10% on any given round and the light will do 1D6+4 damage should it hit a target. It is almost impossible to parry or dodge such a shaft as there is no way to anticipate it.
short_description: Causes random shafts of bright burning hot light to stab down from above, anywhere within a ring around the point of casting.

description: Dismisses a lesser, greater or high Light elemental.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser, greater or high Light elemental.
Spell Glyphs: Ynn + Maef + Ghan + Ovet + Eyama + Chom

description: Allows the caster to hold their breath for 12R longer than normal. The average time for a character to be able to hold their breath is 6R or VGR-10 rounds, whichever is highest..
short_description: Allows the caster to hold their breath for 12R longer than normal. The average time for a character to be able to hold their breath is 6R or VGR-10 rounds, whichever is highest..

description: Protects the caster from the worst effects of winds. The spell will reduce the force the caster is exposed to by one order of wind severity. Thus in a hurricane the caster would only feel storm force winds, in a storm they would experience gale force and so on. The spell is effective against magically generated winds, such as those produced by air elementals, but not against non air-based magical forces.
short_description: Protects the caster from the worst effects of winds. The spell will reduce the force the caster is exposed to by one order of wind severity.

description: Creates a ground mist of roughly 1Sd radius per level of the caster. The mist can be blown away by high winds and its duration will be severely reduced in warm and sunny conditions.
short_description: Creates a ground mist of roughly 1Sd radius per level of the caster. The mist can be blown away by high winds and its duration will be severely reduced in warm and sunny conditions.

description: Creates air directly in the caster’s lungs, enabling them to breathe even if they cannot draw air directly through their mouth or nose. The spell may be used to breathe underwater, in gas, or if the caster’s airway is blocked in some way.
short_description: Creates air directly in the caster’s lungs, enabling them to breathe even if they cannot draw air directly through their mouth or nose.

description: Creates an zone of still air about the caster, even in the highest wind. The affected area will be of roughly 1Sd radius. It will halve the effect of magically created wind, but not force blasts. If cast in already still air the spell will cause all sound entering or made within to be dulled. Move silently rolls will be increased by 20% but listen rolls reduced by 20%.
short_description: Creates an zone of still air about the caster, even in the highest wind. The affected area will be of roughly 1Sd radius.

description: Enables the caster to enhance their navigation and scent skills by scenting the air, adding 20% to any navigate and scent rolls for the duration of the spell. The spell will also allow the caster to scent where good air and bad air might be in a noxious environment. It will also tell the caster if there are any air pockets (although not the nature) down a water filled tunnel.
short_description: Enables the caster to enhance their navigation and scent skills by scenting the air, adding 20% to any navigate and scent rolls for the duration of the spell.

description: Summons an invisible zephyr to obey the caster’s commands. Even if the caster is in an enclosed space the zephyr can sweep away any fumes, smoke or stale air, replenishing it with fresh clean air (about 1D6R for a 2Sd space). The zephyr may be asked to blow light objects in a particular direction, e.g. feathers, papers, hats, hinged doors etc. or blow out a candle or lantern for the caster. The zephyr can also fan a fire to make it burn quicker or brighter or fan the caster to cool them.
short_description: Summons an invisible zephyr to obey the caster’s commands.

description: Will seem to set the air and wind itself against the target when moving towards the caster. The caster must overcome the target’s Key. Effectively this will reduce the target’s Agility by 2 points when moving towards the caster or when attacking them.
short_description: Will seem to set the air and wind itself against the target when moving towards the caster. The caster must overcome the target’s Key.

description: Makes it feel like the wind is acting for the caster, helping pull them along, and flowing with all their actions. This will effectively give them +2 on their Agility for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Makes it feel like the wind is acting for the caster, helping pull them along, and flowing with all their actions. This will effectively give them +2 on their Agility for the duration of the spell.

description: Allows the caster to share the forces of the air as they leap into it. This gives the caster extra support as they jump, enabling them to leap up to 1Sd higher and 2Sd further than they might ordinarily.
short_description: Allows the caster to share the forces of the air as they leap into it.

description: Causes any missile which the caster fires or throws whilst the spell is in effect to fly through the air with greater speed and accuracy. The caster’s chance to hit will be increased by 15.
short_description: Causes any missile which the caster fires or throws whilst the spell is in effect to fly through the air with greater speed and accuracy. The caster’s chance to hit will be increased by 15.

description: Causes the caster to immediately swell up, increasing their bulk armour to 1D4. It will also halve the damage taken from smashing weapons or by falling. This will reduce AG by 3 points.
short_description: Causes the caster to immediately swell up, increasing their bulk armour to 1D4. It will also halve the damage taken from smashing weapons or by falling.

description: Enables the enchanter to see through any obscuring fog, smoke or haze up to the limits of the spell’s range. This will not increase the caster’s ability to see in poor light, or darkness.
short_description: Enables the enchanter to see through any obscuring fog, smoke or haze up to the limits of the spell’s range. This will not increase the caster’s ability to see in poor light, or darkness.

description: Allows the caster to hear or be heard as normal even in the highest wind or storm up to the range of the spell. The spell is also against loud background noise, battles, machinery, singing etc.
short_description: Allows the caster to hear or be heard as normal even in the highest wind or storm up to the range of the spell. The spell is also against loud background noise, battles, machinery, singing etc.

description: Changes the air to form a mist of roughly 1Sd radius per level of the caster extending to 2Sd in the air. The mist can be blown away by high winds and its duration will be severely reduced in warm and sunny conditions. Visibility within the mist will be reduced to 2Sd.
short_description: Changes the air to form a mist of roughly 1Sd radius per level of the caster extending to 2Sd in the air.

description: Creates air directly in the caster’s lungs, enabling them to breathe even if they cannot draw air directly through their mouth or nose. This spell will also remove any stale air from the lungs so that the caster need not expel any breath. The spell may be used to breathe underwater, in gas, or if their airway is blocked in some way.
short_description: Creates air directly in the caster’s lungs, enabling them to breathe even if they cannot draw air directly through their mouth or nose.

description: Allows the caster to share themselves more fully with the forces of air when leaping. The spell enables the caster to jump up to 1Sd in height or 2Sd in distance per level of the caster, on top of what they would normally. Thus a level 3 enchanter may leap a further distance of 6Sd and 3Sd into the air.
short_description: Allows the caster to share themselves more fully with the forces of air when leaping.

description: Causes the weapon which the caster is holding to make loud whomping and wooshing sounds when wielded. Whenever the caster hits an opponent, in addition to the normal damage, they will also cause a knockback attack on the opponent with a strength of 42.
short_description: Causes the weapon which the caster is holding to make loud whomping and wooshing sounds when wielded.

description: Summons a tight, yet barely visible, vortex of air about the caster’s hand. The weapon may be used to punch an opponent for 1D8 damage. Moreover when making a punch attack the vortex is able to extend up to 3Sd from the caster’s hand and hit targets that would normally be out of range. The caster may use the weapon at basic attack (or 2xAG/ DFT) +5% per level, or an existing punch skill +5% per level, whichever is higher. Additionally the caster may attempt to use the vortex to deflect missile weapon attacks at their basic parry. This can include missiles directed at others within the 3Sd range.
short_description: Summons a tight, yet barely visible, vortex of air about the caster’s hand. The weapon may be used to punch an opponent for 1D8 damage.

description: Creates an invisible pocket of compressed air about 1/2 Sd across. The caster may place it anywhere they touch even mid-WOH. If anyone or anything else should touch the pocket the compressed WOH will explode causing 2D6 damage to anyone within 1Sd and 1D6 to anyone within 2. It will also have a knockback force of 42. The explosion will be very loud and will cause almost total hearing loss for 30-VGR hours to anyone who has taken damage. All within 5Sd will also have their listen skill reduced by half for the same time. NB whilst the pocket is invisible, it is possible to detect it using mist, smoke or magical means.
short_description: Creates an invisible pocket of compressed air about 1/2 Sd across. The caster may place it anywhere they touch even mid-WOH.

description: Creates an invisible shield of rushing air directly in front of the caster, from just ahead of their outstretched casting hand. The shield will deflect arrows and small missiles away from the caster. Larger missiles such as javelins or rocks will hit at half chance. It will also deflect flame or liquid.
short_description: Creates an invisible shield of rushing air directly in front of the caster, from just ahead of their outstretched casting hand. The shield will deflect arrows and small missiles away from the caster.

description: Creates a wall of rushing wind anywhere in range, like a small whirlwind with a calm eye at the centre. The wall will be 1Sd in radius for each level of the caster, the eye being about 1Sd in diameter for each level. Anyone attempting to pass through the wall will suffer a knockback attack with a strength of 40 against the SIZ+AG of the opponent. All sight based skills including attack and parry will be reduced to basic due to tearing of the eyes and any exposed flesh will suffer from wind-burn resulting in -1 VGR. No missiles may be shot with any accuracy through the barrier. Once cast the barrier cannot be moved.
short_description: Creates a wall of rushing wind anywhere in range, like a small whirlwind with a calm eye at the centre.

description: Offers a triggered protection from falling damage. Once cast the spell will remain dormant until the target starts to fall. The triggered spell will significantly reduce the speed at which the target is falling such that they will suffer little or no damage when they land. If the target falls without the protection of the spell, it may be cast at the start of the next round. To determine if this is quick enough to save them a D10 should be rolled. If the number rolled is higher than the number of Sd the target has to fall then they will have struck the ground before the spell could be cast.
short_description: Offers a triggered protection from falling damage. Once cast the spell will remain dormant until the target starts to fall.

description: This will hide the caster’s scent from anything that might detect it. The spell will conceal any air current from the caster’s breath and its vapour in cold conditions.
short_description: This will hide the caster’s scent from anything that might detect it. The spell will conceal any air current from the caster’s breath and its vapour in cold conditions.

description: Will create a haze or fog up to limit of the spell’s range. It can be a circular haze centred on the point of casting, a wall of fog, or even the illusion of dense cloud or smoke overhead if desired. The fog may be used to obscure anything behind it. It is just an illusion, however, and anyone passing out of the range of the spell will be in clear air once again.
short_description: Will create a haze or fog up to limit of the spell’s range. It can be a circular haze centred on the point of casting, a wall of fog, or even the illusion of dense cloud or smoke overhead if desired.

description: Causes a small area of greatly thickened air to form anywhere that the caster indicates within range. The area will be approximately 1Sd on each side for each level of the caster. Thus at level 4 it could be made fill a passage that is 4Sd long 4Sd wide and 4Sd high. It will take roughly a round to push through 1Sd of the thickened air. Anything trying to pass through the area will only be able to do so at a roughly a half of their normal move, and actions within will be at half normal AG/DEX. Anyone falling through the block will be slowed so that they only take half damage, missiles passing through the block will similarly only cause half damage.
short_description: Causes a small area of greatly thickened air to form anywhere that the caster indicates within range. The area will be approximately 1Sd on each side for each level of the caster.

description: Summons a lesser air spirit and allows it to manifest in the form of a small vortex of a wind or light breeze. Such an spirit can be commanded to perform tasks within its capabilities such as fill the sails of a ship so that it moves at a gentle pace or scout ahead for the caster giving answers yes or no by changing pitch.
short_description: Summons a lesser air spirit and allows it to manifest in the form of a small vortex of a wind or light breeze.

description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 3 symbol WOH spells and attacks by manifest lesser air elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 4 symbol WOH spells and attacks by greater air elementals for 1R before being dispelled. It will be dispelled by any 5 symbol spells or the attack of an air drake.
short_description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits.

description: Enables the caster to scry through smoke or misty vapours. The neither smoke or vapours may be generated with a naked flame, or by boiling liquid but smouldering material or warming a volatile substance is acceptable. The caster must have a small sample of material from the person, object or place to be scried, such as hair or dirt. The sample must be ground to a fine powder and blown into the vapours. The person or place will only be seen if they are in an open space, or airy room. The ranges for each level are as follows: Level 1 1 mille Level 2 5 mille Level 3 25 mille Level 4 100 mille Level 5 unknown
short_description: Enables the caster to scry through smoke or misty vapours.

description: Enables the enchanter to listen to the air spirits, or ask a question of them, to gain insights into what they may have seen upon their wanderings. If the caster is simply listening for general news they should make a luck roll to see if they actually hear anything beyond the normal background of simple phrases about shear and thermals. What they do hear will not necessarily be of any use or relevance. If asked a single clear question a spirit may decide to answer. Whilst politeness and respect are always worthwhile, air elementals do not understand flowery language or obsequiousness. A question in the form of “Spirits of the air, have you passed any other ships to the South?” is all that is required. The elementals will not answer more than one question for each casting of the spell. It is often worth going to a high or open area to cast the spell. Information that the elementals know is often limited to mass movements, ships, smoke or burning, storm, elemental magic, and very occasionally historical insights about a place. They are much less likely to be concerned with individuals, or their activities.
short_description: Enables the enchanter to listen to the air spirits, or ask a question of them, to gain insights into what they may have seen upon their wanderings.

description: Enables the caster to act as a channel to alter the direction of the wind within the area of the spell (and to some extent beyond). Depending how the caster positions their arms indicates which direction the wind is to flow. This can include upwards or even reversing its direction entirely. The caster can change the wind’s direction as many times as they which whilst the spell is in effect.
short_description: Enables the caster to act as a channel to alter the direction of the wind within the area of the spell (and to some extent beyond).

description: Creates a volume of completely still low pressure air, even in the highest wind. It will halve the effect of magically created winds. The area affected will be of approximately 1Sd radius per level of the caster (this is a volume rather than an area and if cast in a more confined space like a corridor the air will extend further down the corridor as appropriate). When the spell ends the wind will continue moving as before. The spell will cause all sound entering or made within to be dulled. Move silently rolls will be increased by 40% and listen rolls reduced by 40%. If cast over the source this may also be used to prevent fumes or smoke from passing escaping for the duration of the spell. This spell will also force back fumes or smoke from the area. The area can be created anywhere within range of the spell in a specific location.
short_description: Creates a volume of completely still low pressure air, even in the highest wind. It will halve the effect of magically created winds.

description: Causes the air to move against anyone, except the caster, trying to approach the point on which the spell is cast. Anyone moving towards the point will find their Agility reduced by half. If they stop moving towards the point or move away their AG will return to normal.
short_description: Causes the air to move against anyone, except the caster, trying to approach the point on which the spell is cast. Anyone moving towards the point will find their Agility reduced by half.

description: Destroys a volume of air roughly 1Sd in diameter. Under most circumstances this will cause a loud thunderclap to sound and a small rush of air about the affected area. If the spell is cast in a sealed vessel, depending upon its strength, it may cause the vessel to implode or to remain airless within . Cast in a shut room the spell will effectively lower the pressure with all the effects that can go with that. Cast at a manifest air elemental it will cause it 2D10 damage.
short_description: Destroys a volume of air roughly 1Sd in diameter. Under most circumstances this will cause a loud thunderclap to sound and a small rush of air about the affected area.

description: Creates almost invisible vortices of air about the caster’s body like a defensive suit. The armour may be cast over existing mundane armour. The air armour will reduce the chance of being struck by any missiles by 75%. The armour will offer +1 armour protection from the cushioning effect, add +20% to dodge rolls and will also protect the caster against noxious fumes, rain, small flying creatures, and liquid splashes for the duration of the spell. In water, their buoyancy will be increased enough to float without effort. Should the caster be submerged for whatever reason, the armour will provide them with breathable air whilst the spell is in effect.
short_description: Creates almost invisible vortices of air about the caster’s body like a defensive suit. The armour may be cast over existing mundane armour.

description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to an insubstantial vapour. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired. The recipient will maintain a misty version of their normal form, albeit about twice their normal size . They may only be seen with difficulty and in poor light will be virtually invisible. In this form the recipient may drift if blown about by winds. If the recipient was already moving when the spell was cast like riding a horse or falling, the air resistance will cause them to stop moving and float were they are. In this form the caster will be unable to speak but may see and hear. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If the caster is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them. The recipient may attempt to dodge an object placed within them to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends. If the recipient is subject to strong turbulence they must make a KEYx4 roll to maintain their form, if they fail they will loose their form. They may try again on successive rounds to regain their form but cannot undertake any other actions. If the recipient is still not whole by the end of the spell, they will lose cohesion entirely and their soul will be lost amongst the air spirits.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to an insubstantial vapour. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired.

description: Enables the caster to keep someone alive who cannot breathe for themselves for whatever reason. Even if the subject has stopped breathing and appears dead, this spell will be effective as long at the individual’s soul has not parted the body. It is necessary for the caster to prepare the subject by sharing their own air, breathing it directly into the subject’s mouth as soon as the spell is cast. Once this is done the spell will begin to restore any VGR lost through asphyxiation or drowning at a rate of 1 point each minute.
short_description: Enables the caster to keep someone alive who cannot breathe for themselves for whatever reason.

description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to an insubstantial vapour. The beast will maintain a misty version of its normal form, albeit about twice normal size . It may only be seen with difficulty and in poor light will be virtually invisible. In this form the beast may drift if blown about by winds. If the beast was already moving when the spell was cast, like riding a horse or falling, the air resistance will cause it to stop moving and float were it is. In this form the beast will be unable to make sounds but may see and hear. If the beast is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through it. The beast may attempt to dodge an object placed within it to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends. If the beast is subject to strong turbulence it must make a KEYx4 roll to maintain its form, if it fails, it will loose its form. It may try again on successive rounds to regain its form but cannot undertake any other actions. If the beast is still not whole by the end of the spell, it will lose cohesion entirely and its soul will be lost amongst the air spirits.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to an insubstantial vapour. The beast will maintain a misty version of its normal form, albeit about twice normal size .

description: Turns an object (without magic already upon it) up to 1Sd across to a misty vapour. The object will appear as a misty version of its normal form although about twice normal size. In poor light will be it may only be seen with a heavy modifier on any see rolls. If the object is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through it. The object cannot be moved whilst in this form and strong turbulence or wind will make it appear to stream vapour, but it will not lose integrity. Another object placed within it will become imbedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Turns an object (without magic already upon it) up to 1Sd across to a misty vapour. The object will appear as a misty version of its normal form although about twice normal size.

description: Creates an area of still air over the target object. Protecting the object and its contents from the effects of even storm force winds. as well as from harm by bad odours, smoke or fumes. The spell will also protect the object from the physical results of attacks from air elementals or spells that would otherwise cause damage. The spell will be effective on objects up to the size of a large ship (which will lose headway if under sail) or building that would fit within the radius of the spell’s area of effect.
short_description: Creates an area of still air over the target object. Protecting the object and its contents from the effects of even storm force winds.

description: Enables the caster to appear to walk on air as if they weighed very little allowing them to leap 2-3 times normal distances and glide down from heights of up to 4Sd without harm. The slightest jumps and kicks off walls or trees can bring the caster up to the level of the treetops or rooftops. Someone in very heavy armour or burdened will find the effects of this spell diminished.
short_description: Enables the caster to appear to walk on air as if they weighed very little allowing them to leap 2-3 times normal distances and glide down from heights of up to 4Sd without harm.

description: Allows the caster to throw a expanding wall of elemental force from their hand. The force travels over the course of the first round gaining in potency and size. This will then fall off during the second round. If cast parallel to the ground the force will appear as a misty ripple in the air as it travels, slamming into people and objects with the force of a storm. If cast into the air, the turbulence may knock down flying creatures or objects, (or a least cause them to make a flight ability check) and will appear as an expanding misty taurus as it passes. distance width effect 2Sd 1Sd Knocks people back 1D2Sd (make roll to resist knockback attack). Light materials blown about and candles snuffed out. 5Sd 2Sd knocks people over, dragging them 1D4Sd –1D4 damage (Roll under AG/DEX+STR to resist). Trees sway. Flimsy structures damaged. 10Sd 5Sd Knocks people off feet, dragging them 1D6Sd –1D6 damage (Roll under AG/DEX+STR to resist). Knocks over flimsy structures. Branches torn from trees. May cause damage to sails of ships. 20Sd 10Sd Lifts people into the air and blows them 2D6 Sd –1D10 damage (Roll under AG/DEX+STR to resist). Destroys flimsy structures, damages roofing etc on stronger ones. Trees may be uprooted. Can rip off sails on ships and may cause damage to masts or rigging. 40Sd 20Sd Knocks people off feet, dragging them 1D6Sd –1D6 damage (Roll under AG/DEX+STR to resist). Knocks over flimsy structures. Branches torn from trees. May cause damage to sails of ships. 60Sd 30Sd knocks people over, dragging them 1D4Sd –1D4 damage (Roll under AG/DEX+STR to resist). Trees sway. Flimsy structures damaged. 80Sd 40Sd Knocks people back 1D2Sd (make roll to resist knockback attack). Light materials blown about and candles snuffed out. Aiming is approximate and when used against a flying creature, it should be allowed a luck roll to avoid flying in to the path of the force. Similarly, when used against a moving ship, the skipper of the vessel should be able to make a half seamanship or luck roll to avoid being hit.
short_description: Allows the caster to throw a expanding wall of elemental force from their hand. The force travels over the course of the first round gaining in potency and size.

description: Causes the formation of random whirlwinds anywhere within the spell’s range. A whirlwind can last 2R and will suck up any loose material and cause damage to structures and plants. People or animals caught within are liable to be pelted with debris, while being lifted and thrown 1D4Sd across the ground, taking 1D8 damage. The chance of someone in the affected area of being struck by a whirlwind as it forms is 10% on any given round.
short_description: Causes the formation of random whirlwinds anywhere within the spell’s range. A whirlwind can last 2R and will suck up any loose material and cause damage to structures and plants.

description: Creates a wall of rushing air to be created anywhere within range of the spell. The wall can be made to project into other non-solid elements like water, fire (and smoke), which makes it particularly effective against boats or swimming creatures. The wall itself will be roughly 3Sd wide, 4Sd long and 2Sd high and may be doubled in any one dimension for each further casting. The wall will appear rapidly enough that a fast moving vessel may plummet in and founder. The air inside the wall is moving rapidly enough to cause -1 VGR wind-burn damage and to knockback anyone entering it with a STR of 40, it will also deflect any missiles entering.
short_description: Creates a wall of rushing air to be created anywhere within range of the spell.

description: Dismisses a lesser air spirit. If cast at a greater or high air spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser air spirit. If cast at a greater or high air spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 4 symbol WOH spells and attacks by manifest greater air elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 5 symbol WOH spells and attacks by air drakes for 1R before being dispelled. If the caster moves, the area protected will move with them.
short_description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits.

description: Summons a greater air spirit and enable it to fully manifest. Such an spirit may be asked to attack opponents by the caster. The spirit may also be asked to perform other tasks within its capabilities such as carry any individual to any location within range of the spell or prevent them from taking damage in a fall.
short_description: Summons a greater air spirit and enable it to fully manifest. Such an spirit may be asked to attack opponents by the caster.

description: Enables the caster to turn themselves (and accoutrements) into an insubstantial vapour and allow them to float about in a wraithlike fashion. The caster will maintain a misty version of their normal form although about twice their normal size . They may only be seen with a successful -50% see roll and in poor light will be virtually invisible. They may move unhindered in any direction through air at their normal move. In this form the caster will only be able to moan but may see and hear. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If the recipient is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them. They may also pass through tiny holes but must make a KEYx4 roll to reform their cohesion on the other side. However the smaller the hole the longer this can take and a hole the size of a finger may take the entire duration of the spell. If the caster is subject to strong turbulence they must make a KEYx4 roll to maintain their form, if they fail they will loose their form. They may try again on successive rounds to regain their form but cannot undertake any other actions. If the caster is still not whole by the end of the spell they will lose cohesion entirely and their soul will be lost amongst the air spirits.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn themselves (and accoutrements) into an insubstantial vapour and allow them to float about in a wraithlike fashion.

description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol WOH spells and attacks by manifest air drakes for the duration of the spell. If the sentinel is killed then the spell will cease to function. The sentinel will appear to be wrapped in swirling winds that will affect anything within a 1Sd radius about them. Having their body imbued with such power for such a period of time has its cost. Whilst the sentinel will feel no ill effects whilst the spell is active, their lungs and throat will be left raw and burned by the air making it difficult to breathe. This will effectively reduce their VGR by half, recoverable at the normal rate.
short_description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits.

description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol WOH spells and attacks by manifest air drakes for the duration of the spell. Statues with windpipes or carved stones can often be found on the walls of ancient buildings or cities to be used for this purpose. The sentinel object will appear to be wrapped in swirling winds that will affect anything within a 1Sd radius about them.
short_description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by air magic and air spirits.

description: Dismisses a lesser or greater air spirit. If cast at a high air spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser or greater air spirit. If cast at a high air spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Summons a high air spirit and allow it to manifest in the form of a great gale drake at any point within range of the spell. The drake will obey the caster’s commands and will attack foes or buildings etc. as directed by the caster.
short_description: Summons a high air spirit and allow it to manifest in the form of a great gale drake at any point within range of the spell.

description: Forms random whirlwinds in a ring around the point of casting. Initially the ring will be in a 40Sd radius circle, but the caster may push the width of the whole ring outwards creating an unaffected area in the centre. Doing this will reduce the width of the band of affected ground at the same time. Thus, if the ring is pushed out to a 50Sd radius, a 20Sd radius unaffected area could be made in the centre but the width of the affected band would have been reduced to just 30Sd A whirlwind can last 2R and will suck up any loose material and cause damage to structures and plants. People or animals caught within are liable to be pelted with debris, while being lifted and thrown 1D4Sd across the ground, taking 1D8 damage. The chance of someone in the affected area of being struck by a whirlwind as it forms is 10% on any given round.
short_description: Forms random whirlwinds in a ring around the point of casting.

description: Dismisses a manifest lesser, greater or high air elemental spirit.
short_description: Dismisses a manifest lesser, greater or high air elemental spirit.
Spell Glyphs: Woh + Maef + Ghan + Ovet + Eyama + Chom

description: Creates shade or will deepen shadows in a 1Sd area that the caster indicates within the spell’s range.
short_description: Creates shade or will deepen shadows in a 1Sd area that the caster indicates within the spell’s range.

description: Improves the caster’s natural night vision, enabling them to see at double the normal range and effectiveness, given the conditions. As with normal night vision, exposure to a bright light may negate the ability for 1D6+6R.
short_description: Improves the caster’s natural night vision, enabling them to see at double the normal range and effectiveness, given the conditions.

description: Enables the caster to alter the appearance of their own shadow. The caster need only concentrate to change its length or shape. The caster may make their shadow give signals whilst they remain still. It can be lengthened to 20Sd before it fades. The caster may even hide their shadow under their feet. The enchanter must be casting a shadow to be effective.
short_description: Enables the caster to alter the appearance of their own shadow. The caster need only concentrate to change its length or shape.

description: Using this combination will create an area of darkness anywhere that the caster specifies within range of the spell. The shadow will be roughly 1Sd diameter per level of the caster, when cast in partial darkness, and half that size in daylight. Little can be seen within the shadow and torches or other illumination will yield little light.
short_description: Using this combination will create an area of darkness anywhere that the caster specifies within range of the spell.

description: Gives the caster protection from the feelings of terror produced by nightmares, the whispering or screaming of darkness spells and creatures of shadow such as darkness elementals.
short_description: Gives the caster protection from the feelings of terror produced by nightmares, the whispering or screaming of darkness spells and creatures of shadow such as darkness elementals.

description: Enables the caster to detect the presence of anyone hiding in shadows or darkness for the duration of the spell., giving them a vague idea of distance and direction. It also enables them to detect the presence of any magical type shadows.
short_description: Enables the caster to detect the presence of anyone hiding in shadows or darkness for the duration of the spell., giving them a vague idea of distance and direction.

description: Enables the caster to detach part or all of their shadow to do their bidding. The shadow may be asked to move in any direction at a rate of 20. The shadow will spy up to the range of the spell for the caster and answer questions by a nod or shake of the ‘head’. The shadow cannot attack but may engulf a light up to the size of a small campfire halving its area of illumination. Such shadows may change their shape, but not their size. It should be noted that as the shadow is part of the caster’s own shadow, that they can make them vulnerable to shadow based attacks.
short_description: Enables the caster to detach part or all of their shadow to do their bidding. The shadow may be asked to move in any direction at a rate of 20.

description: Rejects the clear darkness in the mind of the target, filling their head with random thoughts and clouding their thinking: effectively reducing their INT by 2 points for the duration of the spell. To be successful the caster must overcome the target’s Key.
short_description: Rejects the clear darkness in the mind of the target, filling their head with random thoughts and clouding their thinking: effectively reducing their INT by 2 points for the duration of the spell.

description: Pulls the void into the recipient’s mind, clearing their head of confusion. It will give the recipient a cool calm for the duration of the spell. It will help them to make clear decisions and keep their temper, giving them +2 INT and a +1 multiplier on INT rolls for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Pulls the void into the recipient’s mind, clearing their head of confusion. It will give the recipient a cool calm for the duration of the spell.

description: This enables the caster to share themselves with the deep and dispassionate forces of the true dark. This will leave the caster clear-headed and rational whilst the spell is in effect. It will also leave them to make decisions untroubled by emotion, loyalty or virtue. Effectively this will give the caster +4 INT for the duration of the spell.
short_description: This enables the caster to share themselves with the deep and dispassionate forces of the true dark. This will leave the caster clear-headed and rational whilst the spell is in effect.

description: Cast upon a weapon, this spell will cause it to become wrapped in a dark aura. As it is swung or moved it will trail ragged shadow in its wake. The spell seems to slow time a little for anyone wielding it, enough for them to make better choices to attack. The spell effectively adds +1D20 to their attack chance each time.
short_description: Cast upon a weapon, this spell will cause it to become wrapped in a dark aura. As it is swung or moved it will trail ragged shadow in its wake.

description: Wraps the caster in a cloak of shadow which will protect them fully from any harmful rays of the sun. It will also increase the caster’s chance to hide in shadow by half again.
short_description: Wraps the caster in a cloak of shadow which will protect them fully from any harmful rays of the sun. It will also increase the caster’s chance to hide in shadow by half again.

description: Allows the caster to see at night at half their normal effectiveness with a range of 5Sd. The spell will not enable the caster to see in total darkness, a tiny amount of light is needed, even if it is just starlight. It should be noted that if any bright lights are shone in front of the recipient they will only be able to see at one quarter effectiveness, and all fighting skills will be reduced by half, whilst the light shines. Should the caster emerge into full daylight, they will be blinded for 1D6 rounds.
short_description: Allows the caster to see at night at half their normal effectiveness with a range of 5Sd.

description: If cast in darkness, this spell will cause a number of frightening noises occur: slithers, bumps, screeches, or footsteps, spaced out so that the silence between seems like an eternity. The noises will do nothing but unnerve anyone hearing them. They may be directed to seem to come from a particular direction, or simply left to occur randomly.
short_description: If cast in darkness, this spell will cause a number of frightening noises occur: slithers, bumps, screeches, or footsteps, spaced out so that the silence between seems like an eternity.

description: Creates an area of impenetrable darkness anywhere that the caster specifies within range of the spell. When cast in daylight, the darkness will be roughly 1Sd per level of the caster across, if cast gloomier conditions it will be twice as large. Nothing can be seen within the pool of darkness and torches or other illumination will yield little light within (only up to a few Lk).
short_description: Creates an area of impenetrable darkness anywhere that the caster specifies within range of the spell.

description: A spell that is only effective at night or in a place of darkness, it will cause an almost imperceptible shadowy mist to creep over the ground to where the caster indicates within the range of the spell. Anyone caught within the mist must resist against the caster’s Key or find a weight of gloom and dark thoughts settling upon them. Anyone sleeping will experience nightmares and any enchanters who have expended key will not regenerate any new key whilst within the area affected.
short_description: A spell that is only effective at night or in a place of darkness, it will cause an almost imperceptible shadowy mist to creep over the ground to where the caster indicates within the range of the ...

description: Truly connects the caster’s mind to the deep void beyond the ephemeral world of matter and light. This void knows. It knows acting on something is often pointless, it knows the individual or self is a brief vanity, it also knows that patience is all that is really needed, for in the end all will return to the dark. That said, this spell will effectively add +8 to the caster’s INT, but at the cost of any and all humanity or compassion. There may also be issues of sanity to deal with when the spell ends…when you gaze long into an abyss the abyss also gazes into you.
short_description: Truly connects the caster’s mind to the deep void beyond the ephemeral world of matter and light. This void knows.

description: Causes the weapon which the caster is holding darken and trail insubstantial ragged wisps of darkness. The weapon itself will not change and will still cause normal damage to a foe and may be parried. However the shadow of the weapon may be used by the caster to inflict damage on the shadow of a target if it is visible. The weapon will cause 1D6 damage to the target’s VGR and will appear as dark bruising and welts where blows have struck. The target’s armour will not count against such the shadow of the weapon. Unless the target realises and specifically makes their shadow the weapon’s shadow they will fail to avoid such a blow.
short_description: Causes the weapon which the caster is holding darken and trail insubstantial ragged wisps of darkness. The weapon itself will not change and will still cause normal damage to a foe and may be parried.

description: Causes a flail of darkness to manifest about the caster’s hand. The flail may be used at normal basic chance or at the caster’s flail attack skill if they have one. The flail cannot be used to parry as weapons will simply pass through it. The flail ignores non-magically protected armour and will cause 1D4+1 VGR damage which will show as darks welts and bruising on the skin. When the flail hits a target they must also make a Key roll vs. the caster’s key. If the target fails they will lose 1D4 points of key. The caster does not gain this key, it is simply lost to the void. The caster may remove the last (soul) point of a target’s key with this weapon.
short_description: Causes a flail of darkness to manifest about the caster’s hand. The flail may be used at normal basic chance or at the caster’s flail attack skill if they have one.

description: Creates a small round shadow of impenetrable darkness. The shadow may be placed on walls floors, even on ceilings. If anyone else should touch the shadow it will envelop the victim in shade leaving them blinded for 30-VGR minutes.
short_description: Creates a small round shadow of impenetrable darkness. The shadow may be placed on walls floors, even on ceilings.

description: Creates a swirling void of darkness in the ground up to 3Sd across where the caster indicates at the time of casting (even at the caster’s own feet, who will be unaffected). Anyone that steps of falls into the void must make a key vs that of the caster. If they resist they will only have their sight based skills reduced by half while in the area of the void, and may simply walk out. If they fail they will feel themselves falling into the endless darkness, with all the numb terror that accompanies such sensory deprivation. When the spell ends any such victims will be found on the floor wriggling. Anyone attempting to leap across the void will still be sucked in if they fail to resist.
short_description: Creates a swirling void of darkness in the ground up to 3Sd across where the caster indicates at the time of casting (even at the caster’s own feet, who will be unaffected).

description: Causes a nebulous barrier of complete darkness anywhere within range of the spell the caster indicates. The barrier can be up to 1Sd high, 2Sd wide and 1Sd thick for each level of the caster, or it may be wrapped round into a hemisphere 2Sd in diameter and 1Sd high for each level of the caster. The type of barrier must be selected at the time of casting. Torches or other light sources will shed no light within the barrier, and even creatures which can normally see in the dark will be unable to see within it. Thus at level 5 a barrier 5Sd high, 10Sd wide and 5Sd thick could be created, or a circle 10Sd in diameter.
short_description: Causes a nebulous barrier of complete darkness anywhere within range of the spell the caster indicates.

description: Provides the target with a triggered immunity to magically created darkness attacks whilst the spell is in effect. Should the target be subject to a magical darkness attack, the spell will be triggered giving the target complete immunity to screams, key flaying or other effects. The spell will not allow the target to see in darkness, but will prevent them from being totally blinded by shadow attacks if there is a form of light nearby.
short_description: Provides the target with a triggered immunity to magically created darkness attacks whilst the spell is in effect.

description: Allows the caster to see in complete darkness at their normal effectiveness with a range of 20Sd. If any bright lights are shone in front of the recipient they will only be able to see at one half effectiveness, and all fighting skills will be reduced by 20%, whilst the light shines. Should the caster suddenly emerge into full daylight they will be blinded for 1D6 rounds.
short_description: Allows the caster to see in complete darkness at their normal effectiveness with a range of 20Sd.

description: This spell does nothing but hide the caster’s shadow for the spell’s duration. A spell seen by many as somewhat pointless, but extremely useful against magics and creatures of the dark that attack shadows.
short_description: This spell does nothing but hide the caster’s shadow for the spell’s duration.

description: Enables a moving record of the shadows within an area up to 4Sd across to be captured anywhere in the range of the spell. The record will be of any shadows within the chosen area,12R after the spell is first cast. If the shadows in the area move during that time, the movement will be captured. The 12R illusion will then replay over and over for the rest of the duration of the spell.
short_description: Enables a moving record of the shadows within an area up to 4Sd across to be captured anywhere in the range of the spell.

description: Causes a block of tangible darkness to form anywhere that the caster indicates within range. The block appears to be solid but is completely insubstantial. The block will be approximately 1Sd in all dimensions per level of the caster. The created object may be used to block a doorway and may even be caused to appear on a ceiling or wall. Should anyone attempt to pass through the block they will find themselves disorientated. As a result they must make a luck roll of Keyx3. If they succeed they will emerge from a random side 1D10 rounds later (roll 1D4, where 1 is the side that they entered). If they fail their luck, they will be lost within for the duration of the spell..
short_description: Causes a block of tangible darkness to form anywhere that the caster indicates within range. The block appears to be solid but is completely insubstantial.

description: Summons a lesser darkness spirit and allow it to manifest in the form of a gliding shadow. The spirit can be ordered to spy things out for the caster within range or to envelop a light to prevent it from shining. The spirit may also be asked to envelop a person or object within range effectively hiding them in its shadow. If summoned during the day a darkness spirit will appear smaller and less substantial.
short_description: Summons a lesser darkness spirit and allow it to manifest in the form of a gliding shadow.

description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 3 symbol VOLN spells and attacks by manifest lesser Darkness elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 4 symbol VOLN spells and attacks by greater Darkness elementals for 1R before being dispelled. It will be dispelled by any 5 symbol spells or the attack of an Darkness drake.
short_description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits.

description: Enables the caster to scry a living person or creature using a special black ichor made from the juice of small cave dwelling creatures which have never seen light. The ichor is poured into a dish or flat surface and may be saved and used again and again. The caster must speak the name of the person to be scried and have seen the person at least once. It may be necessary to make a successful memorise roll to recall the image accurately to serve as a focus. The caster must be in at least partial darkness to be able to view the dim image in the oil. The vision granted by the darkness spirits is sometimes current and sometimes prophetic. This is more likely if the person being scried is with the caster at the time the spell is being used.
short_description: Enables the caster to scry a living person or creature using a special black ichor made from the juice of small cave dwelling creatures which have never seen light.

description: Darkness spirits like to whisper but what they say is often confusing misleading or simply untrue. There are however rare occasions when they may genuinely have information to pass on. This spell will only work in the dark.
short_description: Darkness spirits like to whisper but what they say is often confusing misleading or simply untrue. There are however rare occasions when they may genuinely have information to pass on.

description: Allows the caster to manipulate the apparent form of shadows including their own. The caster may pull tear or recombine the cloth of the shadows to look like anything they can artistically represent. Such shadows will move with whatever was throwing them in the first place and can be made to wiggle or shake. Such shadows can also be scaled up by pushing them further from the source, within the range of the spell, but the larger the shadow is made the more indistinct and fuzzy it will appear.
short_description: Allows the caster to manipulate the apparent form of shadows including their own. The caster may pull tear or recombine the cloth of the shadows to look like anything they can artistically represent.

description: Wraps a cloak of nebulous shadow about the caster’s body. The shifting shadows will reduce an opponents chance to hit by half and will also increase hiding in poor light to 100%. This will allow the caster to hide and make a surprise attack for one round and then run off and hide again. The cloak will offer full protection the caster from magical light attacks, including those made by a light elemental (unless the attack is a critical). The cloak will also conceal the wearer from scrying spells.
short_description: Wraps a cloak of nebulous shadow about the caster’s body. The shifting shadows will reduce an opponents chance to hit by half and will also increase hiding in poor light to 100%.

description: This spell will treat a person affected by many hurts of the mind, including the effects of trauma, some temporary losses of sanity, some forms of amnesia and some forms of dementia. To be effective the subject must be laid down in a place of darkness with no direct light sources present. The place must remain dark for the duration of the spell or it will not be effective and the spell will have to be re-cast and the procedure begun again. Once laid down the caster must cast the spell which will cause the subject to fall into a fitful sleep lasting for one whole day. The spell will restore any points of INT lost through magic, disease and the attacks of certain creatures. Once the subject has awoken it should be noted that the mind is an odd thing, some people will be cured and suffer no further issues, others may improve but never be fully cured, others may see a temporary remission from their trouble, only to fall back into it at some later date.
short_description: This spell will treat a person affected by many hurts of the mind, including the effects of trauma, some temporary losses of sanity, some forms of amnesia and some forms of dementia.

description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to an insubstantial shadow. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired. The recipient will appear as a shadowy semblance of their normal form. They may be difficult to see in certain conditions, and in poor light will be virtually invisible. In this form the recipient will be able to writhe, but cannot move far from the spot where the spell was cast. The recipient may see and hear, but will only be able to whisper quietly. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If the recipient is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them. The recipient may attempt to dodge an object placed within them to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to an insubstantial shadow. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired.

description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to an insubstantial shadow. The beast will appear as a shadowy semblance of its normal form. It may be difficult to see in certain conditions, and in poor light will be virtually invisible. In this form the beast will be able to writhe, but cannot move far from the spot where the spell was cast. The beast may see and hear, but will only be able to make whispering sounds. If the beast is struck by a weapon, it will pass harmlessly through it. The beast may attempt to dodge an object placed within it to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn an animal target, and its accoutrements, to an insubstantial shadow. The beast will appear as a shadowy semblance of its normal form.

description: Turns an object up to 1Sd across to darkness. The object will appear as a shadowy version of its normal form. In poor light will be it may only be seen with a heavy modifier to any see rolls. In darkness the object may be walked through without knowing it is there. If the object is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through it. The object cannot be moved whilst in this form. Another object placed within it will become imbedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Turns an object up to 1Sd across to darkness. The object will appear as a shadowy version of its normal form.

description: Allows the caster to launch a high-arcing cloud of darkness through the air. The cloud will appear ragged and wisp-like and, as it passes overhead, even the most resolute soul will feel a momentary disquiet. The cloud will travel at roughly 20Sd each round and can reach targets up to 240Sd distance. The spell has no particular accuracy as it hits roughly the area where it was cast. On impact the cloud will erupt into tangled strands of shadow, expanding up to 6Sd across. Anyone caught within will have 1D10 points of key stripped away from them (unless they can make a key resistance roll vs a darkness drake –roughly 4D6+20). If a victim is low on key this may even include their soul. Victims will also suffer from the lingering despair which will have a deleterious effect on their morale, motivation and self-esteem. They should make a roll against their key to determine the duration. key roll effect duration under key 30-key rounds. under key x3 30-key minutes. over key x3 30-key hours.
short_description: Allows the caster to launch a high-arcing cloud of darkness through the air.

description: Causes the entire area within the range of the spell to be covered by a barely perceptible shadowy ground mist. The mist will swirl and coil in disturbing patterns. Anyone within the area (except the caster) risks being hit by a tendril of misty shadow, with a 15% chance on any given round. The tendril will cause little damage, but the target must make a Key vs. Key resistance roll against the caster or lose 1D4 points of key. The caster does not gain this key, it is simply lost to the void. If someone loses their last (soul) point of key to this spell they will be dead.
short_description: Causes the entire area within the range of the spell to be covered by a barely perceptible shadowy ground mist. The mist will swirl and coil in disturbing patterns.

description: Causes a nebulous barrier of complete darkness anywhere within range of the spell the caster indicates. The barrier can be up to 1Sd high, 4Sd wide and 2Sd thick for each level of the caster, or it may be wrapped round into a hemisphere 1Sd radius for each level of the caster. The type of barrier must be selected at the time of casting. Anyone entering the darkness will be confused by whispering and creepy noises and will find themselves disorientated either becoming trapped for the duration of the spell or finding themselves coming back out the same place they entered 1D10 rounds later (or a random side roll 1D4). Torches or other light sources will shed no light within the barrier, and even creatures which can normally see in the dark will be unable to see within it.
short_description: Causes a nebulous barrier of complete darkness anywhere within range of the spell the caster indicates.

description: Dismisses a lesser darkness spirit. If cast at a greater or high darkness spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser darkness spirit. If cast at a greater or high darkness spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 4 symbol Darkness spells and attacks by manifest greater Darkness elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 5 symbol VOLN spells and attacks by Darkness drakes for 1R before being dispelled. If the caster moves, the area protected will move with them.
short_description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits.

description: Summons a greater darkness spirit and enable it to manifest. If cast in darkness the spirit will be twice the SIZ of one summoned in daylight. Such an spirit may be asked to attack opponents by the caster. The spirit may also be asked to perform other tasks within its capabilities such as scouting or concealing things.
short_description: Summons a greater darkness spirit and enable it to manifest. If cast in darkness the spirit will be twice the SIZ of one summoned in daylight.

description: Enables the caster to turn themselves (and accoutrements) into an insubstantial shadow and allow them to float about in a wraithlike fashion. The caster will maintain a shadowy version of their normal form. They may only be seen with a successful -50% see roll and in poor light will be virtually invisible. They may move unhindered in any direction through air, glass or water at their normal move. In this form the caster will may see and hear but will only be able to whisper. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If the recipient is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them. They may also pass through transparent surfaces like glass or water but must make a KEYx4 roll to reform their form as they move from one material to another. If the caster is subject to strong sunlight they must make a KEYx4 roll to maintain their form, if they fail they will loose their form. They may try again on successive rounds to regain their form but cannot undertake any other actions. If the caster is still not whole by the end of the spell they will lose cohesion entirely and their soul will be lost amongst the darkness spirits.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn themselves (and accoutrements) into an insubstantial shadow and allow them to float about in a wraithlike fashion.

description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol VOLN spells and attacks by manifest Darkness drakes for the duration of the spell. If the sentinel is killed then the spell will cease to function. The sentinel will appear to be a terrifying being of ragged shadow which will have the side effect of lowering the moral of anyone within the area of effect. Having their body imbued with such power for such a period of time has its cost. Whilst the sentinel will feel no ill effects whilst the spell is active, when the spell ends they will appear pale and drawn. They will hear imaginary whispers and noises and will suffer nightmares for some time after.
short_description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits.

description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol VOLN spells and attacks by manifest Darkness drakes for the duration of the spell. Statues or carved stones can often be found on the walls of ancient buildings or cities to be used for this purpose. When such an object is active it will be wrapped in streaming shadow and the moral of anyone within the protected area will be lowered. The sentinel object will appear to be engulfed in terrifying ragged shadow which will have the side effect of lowering the moral of anyone within the area of effect.
short_description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by Darkness magic and Darkness spirits.

description: Dismisses a lesser or greater darkness spirit. If cast at a high darkness spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R..
short_description: Dismisses a lesser or greater darkness spirit. If cast at a high darkness spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R..

description: Summons a high darkness spirit and enable it to manifest anywhere within range of the spell. The spirit will appear in the form of a huge shadowy dragon with scales that seem to absorb light and wings that cast a dim twilight beneath. The spirit will obey directions from the caster and will attack any foes as ordered.
short_description: Summons a high darkness spirit and enable it to manifest anywhere within range of the spell.

description: This will cause the entire area within a ring around the caster to be covered by a barely perceptible shadowy ground mist. Initially the ring will cover a 40Sd radius circle about of the point of casting. But the caster may push the width of the whole ring outwards creating an unaffected area in the centre. Doing this will reduce the width of the band of affected ground at the same time. Thus if the ring is pushed out to a 50Sd radius, a 20Sd radius unaffected area could be made in the centre but the width of the affected band would have been reduced to just 30Sd The mist will swirl and coil in disturbing patterns. Anyone within the area (except the caster) risks being hit by a tendril of misty shadow, with a 15% chance on any given round. The tendril will cause little damage, but the target must make a Key vs. Key resistance roll against the caster or lose 1D4 points of key. The caster does not gain this key, it is simply lost to the void. If someone loses their last (soul) point of key to this spell they will be dead.
short_description: This will cause the entire area within a ring around the caster to be covered by a barely perceptible shadowy ground mist.

description: This spell will dismiss a manifest lesser, greater or high darkness spirit.
short_description: This spell will dismiss a manifest lesser, greater or high darkness spirit.
Spell Glyphs: Voln + Maef + Ghan + Ovet + Eyama + Chom

description: Dries and quickly warms the caster and any clothing that they are wearing. It will keep them warm for the duration of the spell, even in bitterly cold conditions.
short_description: Dries and quickly warms the caster and any clothing that they are wearing. It will keep them warm for the duration of the spell, even in bitterly cold conditions.

description: Can prevent the caster being scalded by hot water or food and will also protect their hair and clothing from being scorched by brief exposure to flame (reducing fire/heat damage by 1 point).
short_description: Can prevent the caster being scalded by hot water or food and will also protect their hair and clothing from being scorched by brief exposure to flame (reducing fire/heat damage by 1 point).

description: Enables the caster to warm a small object using their casting hand. In this way they might make a dagger too hot to hold or bring a cup of water to boiling point. Putting their hand on a living being will have no effect.
short_description: Enables the caster to warm a small object using their casting hand. In this way they might make a dagger too hot to hold or bring a cup of water to boiling point.

description: Renders the caster and their accoutrements more resistant to fire and heat, such that the caster will only suffer half damage if exposed. This will not protect the caster from damage by lightning.
short_description: Renders the caster and their accoutrements more resistant to fire and heat, such that the caster will only suffer half damage if exposed. This will not protect the caster from damage by lightning.

description: Any object, creature or person can be caused to burn with magical blue flame at the point where the caster is touching with their casting hand. The caster must keep their hand in contact with the object for a full round or the flame will be extinguished. If the caster touches a living creature for a round that creature will take 1D4 damage for each round that the contact remains. Normally the flame will only last for 6R, but if the material which the caster was touching is readily flammable, such as cloth or paper, the object will catch light and continue to burn with normal flame thereafter.
