The magical flame will not cause any harm to the caster, but if the material should catch light as a result, the caster may take damage once the spell has ended if they should remain in contact with the object. The magical flame cannot be extinguished whilst it lasts, even in storm conditions.
short_description: Any object, creature or person can be caused to burn with magical blue flame at the point where the caster is touching with their casting hand.

description: This spell requires a fire, even a candle flame to be within range of the spell when cast. It allows a flame up to the size of a torch flame to detach itself from the fire and obey the caster’s commands. The flame will move in the same way as a ground fire hopping from one flammable object to another at Move 10. It may also travel along the ground or up vertical surfaces at Move 4. The flame will not ignite anything or attack anyone unless instructed by the caster. The flame can attack with a 30% chance of remaining in contact with them long enough to do 1D4 damage. It will have a dodge skill of 40%. The flame may be put out if water is thrown on it or a sufficiently heavy fabric is held over it for 1R or longer.
short_description: This spell requires a fire, even a candle flame to be within range of the spell when cast.

description: Takes the fiery energies from the target, calming a panicking beast, cooling someone’s temper or sobering them up, though the target may feel less certain and their morale may suffer. Effectively their VGR will drop by 2 and they will lose 1HP whilst the spell is in effect, but they may add a multiplier to any INT rolls. Thus a target might roll INTx4 rather than INTx3 to keep calm. The caster must overcome the target’s Key for the spell to take effect.
short_description: Takes the fiery energies from the target, calming a panicking beast, cooling someone’s temper or sobering them up, though the target may feel less certain and their morale may suffer.

description: Makes the target more sanguine in their outlook and appearance, less restrained and more outward.. This will raise their VGR by 2 points and they will gain 1HP. However any INT rolls needed will drop by one multiplier. Thus if the target needed to roll INTx3 ordinarily to avoid losing their temper, they would only be able to roll INTx2.
short_description: Makes the target more sanguine in their outlook and appearance, less restrained and more outward.. This will raise their VGR by 2 points and they will gain 1HP.

description: Enables the caster to draw on spirit of fire. It will give them a feeling of wellbeing, cheerfulness and with less restraint. Some enchanters have likened it to getting somewhat drunk without the resulting hangover. Whilst the spell is running the caster will effectively gain 4 points of VGR and 2HP. It will not help with judgement or control and any INT rolls will be made at one less multiplier.
short_description: Enables the caster to draw on spirit of fire. It will give them a feeling of wellbeing, cheerfulness and with less restraint.

description: Causes flickering red magical flame to run across the surface of the weapon that the caster is holding. This will enable it to cause +1 extra damage per level of the caster. The fire will not affect the handle or the caster, although it will consume the shafts of any arrows used. If the weapon is dropped the fire will be extinguished on contact with the ground. The fire may also be used in the same way as a torch to illuminate an area or to ignite flammable materials if kept in contact for 1D4 rounds.
short_description: Causes flickering red magical flame to run across the surface of the weapon that the caster is holding. This will enable it to cause +1 extra damage per level of the caster.

description: Keeps the caster warm even in extreme cold, including being immersed in cold water. The caster will only take half damage from cold based magical attacks. The caster is likely to feel hot to the touch and they may appear to smoke or steam slightly in cold conditions..
short_description: Keeps the caster warm even in extreme cold, including being immersed in cold water. The caster will only take half damage from cold based magical attacks.

description: Enables the caster to use their casting hand to heat a mass of a specific material. The size of the mass will determine how hot it becomes. Thus the caster could warm a small pool by plunging their hand into the water, or the caster could bring a trough of water up to boiling point. They might melt a lead box, a few ingots of silver or gold or just the blade of a steel hand knife. To work the caster must keep their hand in contact with the material for most of the duration of the spell. While the spell is running the caster will be unaffected by the heat they generate, but will need to remove their hand quickly to avoid being burned by the heated material once the spell ends. Touching a living person will have no effect.
short_description: Enables the caster to use their casting hand to heat a mass of a specific material. The size of the mass will determine how hot it becomes.

description: Enables the caster to use their casting hand to cool down a mass of a specific material. The size of the mass will determine how cool it can be made over the course of the spell. Thus a small pool may be brought almost to freezing point from an ambient temperature. A trough of boiling water could be brought to an ambient temperature. A red hot axe head from a forge could be quenched. A small amount of molten metal could be cooled to touchable temperature. To work, the caster must put their casting hand in contact with the hot material for the duration of the spell. Their hand will not be harmed whilst the spell is running, though other parts of their body could be.
short_description: Enables the caster to use their casting hand to cool down a mass of a specific material. The size of the mass will determine how cool it can be made over the course of the spell.

description: Produces a bright blue flame from the caster’s hand without harming the caster. This flame may be daubed as writing or patterns onto any solid surface where it will continue to burn for the duration of the spell. Any readily flammable material may catch light as a result. If it is daubed onto a person their clothing will quickly start to smoulder and they will take 1D4 damage for each round that the flames are allowed to burn against their skin. Such flames may be extinguished like a normal fire.
short_description: Produces a bright blue flame from the caster’s hand without harming the caster.

description: Enables the caster to call the spirit of fire into themselves and fully embrace it. It will give them a feeling of euphoria, making highly optimistic, lusty and quick of temper. Some enchanters have likened it to getting mightily drunk without the resulting hangover. Whilst the spell is running the caster will effectively gain 2 points of VGR and +1HP per level of the caster. It will not help with judgement or control and any INT rolls will be made at straight INT with no multipliers. The spell is very useful when resisting the effects of poisons and diseases that attack the VGR. It should be noted that this spell can prove addictive simply for the exhilaration it brings.
short_description: Enables the caster to call the spirit of fire into themselves and fully embrace it. It will give them a feeling of euphoria, making highly optimistic, lusty and quick of temper.

description: Causes the blade or head of the weapon that the caster is holding to become a fierce white magical flame (a whip may also be used). The weapon will cause an additional 1D6 damage each time it hits. Whilst armour is effective it will begin to heat up each time it is hit the additional fire damage should be deducted from the armour’s full protection. Once this is reduced to zero, whilst the armour will continue to protect against normal weapon damage, the fire damage will ignore the target’s armour. The magical fire will not harm the caster or their weapon. As with normal fire the weapon will illuminate the same area as a torch and will ignite flammable material that it is kept in contact with for a round or more.
short_description: Causes the blade or head of the weapon that the caster is holding to become a fierce white magical flame (a whip may also be used). The weapon will cause an additional 1D6 damage each time it hits.

description: Enables the caster to produce a 3Sd long burst of flame by blowing across their casting hand. The caster may chose to strafe multiple targets in range, causing 1D6 damage to each. Alternatively the caster may chose to direct the flame at a specific target with a 50% (or 2xbasic attack) chance to hit for 2D6. As with any fire attack, the flames will only ignite readily flammable material such as volatile oils or dry thatch.
short_description: Enables the caster to produce a 3Sd long burst of flame by blowing across their casting hand. The caster may chose to strafe multiple targets in range, causing 1D6 damage to each.

description: Allows the caster to set a Raghe glyph upon an object in soot or charcoal. Should anyone come within 1Sd of the glyph it will explode in a ball of magical fire. The 2Sd ball will last for less than one round and anyone caught within it will suffer 1D10 damage (armour will count). The ball of flame will not catch light to anything unless it is readily flammable.
short_description: Allows the caster to set a Raghe glyph upon an object in soot or charcoal. Should anyone come within 1Sd of the glyph it will explode in a ball of magical fire.

description: Creates a roaring circle of blue/white flame emanating from the palm of the caster’s hand (which hand is up to the caster). The flames will cause 1D4 damage to anyone they are thrust at with a basic attack. They will also ignite anything with which they are kept in contact with for 1R or more. The shield of flame will offer a huge distraction to anything attacking the caster, reducing the attack by 15%. In darkness the effect will be doubled to 30%. The fire will provide similar illumination to a torch.
short_description: Creates a roaring circle of blue/white flame emanating from the palm of the caster’s hand (which hand is up to the caster).

description: Creates a barrier within an existing fire (magical or natural). The barrier will be of flame so intense and fierce that it will drive anyone back who attempts to cross through it. The barrier will take the form of a sphere 1Sd diameter per level of the caster or a wall 2Sd high and 2Sd wide and 2lk thick per level of the caster. Anyone who attempts to actually pass the barrier (not including any damage taken from the rest of the fire) will suffer 6D damage. Additionally it will render the protected area of the fire immune to being extinguished (magical or otherwise) for the duration of the spell. NB if cast upon a torch it will only cause 3D6 damage and will be consumed after 1R
short_description: Creates a barrier within an existing fire (magical or natural). The barrier will be of flame so intense and fierce that it will drive anyone back who attempts to cross through it.

description: Provides a triggered defence against fire whilst the spell is in effect. Should the target be struck by damaging flame, magical or otherwise, the spell will be triggered and give the target complete immunity from any fire or heat damage for 6R. Once the spell has been triggered in this way it will need to be re-cast to give further protection.
short_description: Provides a triggered defence against fire whilst the spell is in effect.

description: Creates an illusion of moving flames. The caster may create the flames anywhere in range and they may be just the size of a candle or occupying an area up to 4Sd across. The flames are merely illusory and will give off no heat and will not burn anything they touch. They will, however provide illumination in keeping with the size of the illusion.
short_description: Creates an illusion of moving flames. The caster may create the flames anywhere in range and they may be just the size of a candle or occupying an area up to 4Sd across.

description: Creates a 1Lk ball of blue/white fire that can be thrown, rolled or kicked up to 5Sd. The ball may continue to roll if there is an incline or be blown by high winds. It may ignite anything readily flammable it comes into contact with and can cause 1D4 flame damage to anyone it strikes directly. If the ball is doused with water it will be extinguished, but will re-ignite the following round, if the spell is still in effect.
short_description: Creates a 1Lk ball of blue/white fire that can be thrown, rolled or kicked up to 5Sd. The ball may continue to roll if there is an incline or be blown by high winds.

description: Enables the caster to pull wads of flame from a fire, immediately toss them into the air, whereupon they burst in brightly coloured flashes. Throwing such a flare at a person will be a surprise but will not cause them any damage. The caster will take no damage from touching the fire they manipulate during this spell.
short_description: Enables the caster to pull wads of flame from a fire, immediately toss them into the air, whereupon they burst in brightly coloured flashes.

description: Holds back an area of fire. It will work against an area of flame roughly 2Sd diameter per level of the caster, either to clear a safe area through or to hold back an advancing firestorm.
short_description: Holds back an area of fire. It will work against an area of flame roughly 2Sd diameter per level of the caster, either to clear a safe area through or to hold back an advancing firestorm.

description: Immediately extinguishes a normal non-magical fire up to roughly 2Sd diameter. It will cause 2D10 damage to a manifest fire spirit.
short_description: Immediately extinguishes a normal non-magical fire up to roughly 2Sd diameter. It will cause 2D10 damage to a manifest fire spirit.

description: Summons a lesser fire spirit. The spirit will fizzle into being as wispy tendrils of flame radiating from a central point. The spirit will creep across the ground or hop from one object to another. The fire spirit will not generally ignite anything unless it is very flammable. If the spirit is ordered to it may envelop any stationary object and cause normal fire damage. Such an spirit will may also be asked to envelop an individual and protect them from any other form of fire damage.
short_description: Summons a lesser fire spirit. The spirit will fizzle into being as wispy tendrils of flame radiating from a central point.

description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by fire magic and fire spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 3 glyph Raghe spells and attacks by manifest lesser Fire elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 4 glyph Raghe spells and attacks by greater Fire elementals for 1R before being dispelled. It will be dispelled by any 5 glyph spells or the attack of an Fire drake.
short_description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by fire magic and fire spirits.

description: Enables the caster to scry a person, object or place using a small fire. The fire need not be a special type but it should be laid in such a way that it gives off little smoke. The caster must have a small sample of material from the person, object or place to be scried, such as hair or dirt, which is consumed by the fire and cannot be re-used. The person or place will only be seen if they are near some other source of fire. Even a candle is sufficient. The ranges for each level are as follows: Level 1 1 mille Level 2 5 mille Level 3 25 mille Level 4 100 mille Level 5 unknown
short_description: Enables the caster to scry a person, object or place using a small fire. The fire need not be a special type but it should be laid in such a way that it gives off little smoke.

description: Enables the caster to hear the voices of fire spirits in the hissing and crackling of flames. Any fire will do for this. Fire spirits are garrulous and may simply chatter for the entire duration of the spell about inconsequential things they have consumed. They are however more communicative than most elemental spirits and may answer questions that relate to fires and things in the immediate vicinity. They may also be quizzed about historical events, recent or otherwise, in the area that are somehow fire related.
short_description: Enables the caster to hear the voices of fire spirits in the hissing and crackling of flames. Any fire will do for this.

description: Allows the caster to set a Raghe glyph upon an object in soot or charcoal. Should anyone come within 1Sd of the glyph it will explode in a ball of magical fire. The conflagration will have a radius of 1Sd for each level of the caster. The ball will last for no more than a round and anyone caught within it will suffer 2D10 fire damage. The ball of flame will not catch light to anything unless it is readily flammable.
short_description: Allows the caster to set a Raghe glyph upon an object in soot or charcoal. Should anyone come within 1Sd of the glyph it will explode in a ball of magical fire.

description: Immolates the caster in blue flames. The caster and their accoutrements will not be harmed by this. The flame armour will allow the caster to dodge at +20% and anything attacking the caster with natural weapons (biting, punching, grappling etc.) will take 1D4 damage when they hit or for each round they remain in contact. Should the caster attack using natural weapons they may cause 1D4 flame damage over the natural weapon damage. Most wild animals would most likely be terrified of the fire and avoid the caster or run away. Water will extinguish the flames for 1R, after which they will re-ignite.
short_description: Immolates the caster in blue flames. The caster and their accoutrements will not be harmed by this.

description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to a pillar of living flame. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired. The recipient will appear as a burning shape of their normal form. In this form the recipient will be able to writhe, but not move far from the spot where the spell was cast although they may drift if blown about by winds. If the recipient was already moving when the spell was cast, like riding a horse or falling, the air resistance will cause them to stop moving and float were they are. They will illuminate an area of 3Sd radius about them. In this form the recipient may see and hear, but will be unable to talk. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. If the recipient is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them, if they wish they may attempt to dodge an object placed within them to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends. They will not take damage from falling, fire, or cold. They may be affected by magic depending upon its effect. Whilst being doused by water will do them no real harm, it will weaken their cohesion. They should attempt to roll Keyx3 to maintain their form. If they should fail this, parts of them may be extinguished. Should this happen, they will begin to loose cohesion and must attempt to roll Keyx3 on the following rounds to rekindle the affected areas. If totally immersed in water, they will have to roll Key rolls each round to keep their form. If the recipient is still not whole by the end of the spell, they will lose cohesion entirely and their soul will be lost amongst the elemental spirits.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to a pillar of living flame. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired.

description: This spell burns infection from the subject’s body. The spell will eliminate yellow wound and wound fever and can also help treat the effects of some poisons. Effectively the spell will heal any lost points of VGR at a rate of 1 point every ten minutes. The spell will burn for at least an hour and will continue until all VGR is healed. The subject will remain conscious whilst the spell is in effect, but will most likely be delirious. Once cast, the subject will get warmer and more feverish over a period of a few minutes. At some point small blue flames will burn on the skin of the subject, with greater size and intensity on any infected areas. The flames will not harm the recipient but will ignite clothing, hair, and any flammable material that the subject remains in to contact with, in the same way that a candle would. Hair lost to this spell will grow back as normal.
short_description: This spell burns infection from the subject’s body. The spell will eliminate yellow wound and wound fever and can also help treat the effects of some poisons.

description: Turns an animal target, and its accoutrements, to a pillar of living flame. The beast will appear as a burning shape of their normal form. In this form the beast will be able to writhe, but not move far from the spot where the spell was cast although it may drift if blown about by winds. If the beast was already moving when the spell was cast, like running or falling, the air resistance will cause it to stop moving and float were it is. It will illuminate an area of 3Sd radius about them. In this form the beast may see and hear, but will be unable to make sounds. If the beast is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them, it may attempt to dodge an object placed within it to avoid it becoming embedded when the spell ends. It will not take damage from falling, fire, or cold. It may be affected by magic, depending upon its effect. Whilst being doused by water will do the beast no real harm, it will weaken its cohesion. It should attempt to roll Keyx3 to maintain its form. If it should fail this, parts of it may be extinguished. Should this happen it will begin to loose cohesion and must attempt to roll Keyx3 on the following rounds to rekindle the affected areas. If totally immersed in water it will have to roll Key rolls each round to keep its form. If the beast is still not whole by the end of the spell it will lose cohesion entirely and its soul will be lost amongst the elemental spirits.
short_description: Turns an animal target, and its accoutrements, to a pillar of living flame. The beast will appear as a burning shape of their normal form.

description: Will turn a non-magically protected object up to a 1Sd across to fire. The object will maintain roughly its normal shape whilst aflame. If it is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through it. Anything brought into contact with the flames will suffer fire damage similar to that of a burning torch. The flame will not harm the object itself. Water thrown on the fiery object will douse the flames for 1R after which they will burst back to life. Another object placed within it will become imbedded when the spell ends.
short_description: Will turn a non-magically protected object up to a 1Sd across to fire. The object will maintain roughly its normal shape whilst aflame.

description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of damage fire and heat. Flames will be deflected away from the object. A fire already burning in or on the object will be suppressed, but not extinguished, and will return to its original ferocity when the spell ends. The spell will also protect from the physical results of attacks by fire elementals or fire spells that would otherwise cause damage. The spell will be effective on objects such as a large building or ship that would fit within the radius of the spell’s area of effect.
short_description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of damage fire and heat. Flames will be deflected away from the object.

description: Renders the caster immune to all effects of mundane fire and heat for the duration of the spell. Should the caster walk into an inferno the flames would appear to turn away rather than touch the caster. The caster might even walk across the surface of molten lava without sinking or taking damage.
short_description: Renders the caster immune to all effects of mundane fire and heat for the duration of the spell.

description: Allows the caster to throw a flaming bolt in a high arc towards a distant target. Once thrown the ball will fly on its own and can reach targets some distance away. On impact the fire-bolt will explode causing 4D6+6 damage to anything hit directly and 2D6+3 to anything within 4Sd. The fire may also ignite anything readily flammable such as thatch or dry, thin wood. The optimum range is 50Sd with other ranges yielding lower accuracy as shown. range accuracy 10Sd 30% 25Sd 40% 50Sd 50% 75Sd 40% 100Sd 30% 150Sd 20% 200Sd 10% This is an extremely powerful spell in a siege or open battle where accuracy is not so important. Because the fire-bolt must be propelled in a high arc it is almost unusable indoors.
short_description: Allows the caster to throw a flaming bolt in a high arc towards a distant target. Once thrown the ball will fly on its own and can reach targets some distance away.

description: Will spread a high, roiling cloud of smoke extending to the limits of the spell. Random bolts of fire will rain down from this cloud and burn upon the ground for 2R before going out. Such bolts will set fire to anything readily flammable that they remain in contact with. The chance of being struck by a fire-bolt is 15% for each round that someone remains in the area of the spell. Since each bolt falls from above, there would be a possibility to dodge on a successful perception roll. A fire-bolt will cause 2D6 damage to a target. The caster will be immune to being struck.
short_description: Will spread a high, roiling cloud of smoke extending to the limits of the spell. Random bolts of fire will rain down from this cloud and burn upon the ground for 2R before going out.

description: Raises a defensive curtain of flame anywhere in range which the caster indicates at the time of casting. The curtain will ignite any objects within it which are flammable, but will continue to burn for the duration of the spell even if there is no fuel. The curtain will be between 1 and 2Lk thick, 1Sd high and 2Sd long per level of the caster, thus at level 5 a curtain could be made between 1 and 2Sd thick, 5Sd high and 10Sd long. Anyone attempting to pass through such a curtain will receive 1D6 damage per level of the caster. If this spell is cast upon an individual it will render them immune to any damage from normal fire or heat for the duration of the spell.
short_description: Raises a defensive curtain of flame anywhere in range which the caster indicates at the time of casting.

description: Creates a 1Sd wide by 2Sd high passage through a firestorm, burning building or other major fire. The passage will be roughly 1Sd long per level of the caster. Anyone passing through will only feel a slight amount of heat from the inferno blazing about them. Once the spell ends the fires will close in burning anyone unlucky enough to remain.
short_description: Creates a 1Sd wide by 2Sd high passage through a firestorm, burning building or other major fire. The passage will be roughly 1Sd long per level of the caster.

description: Dismisses a lesser fire spirit. If cast at a greater or high fire spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser fire spirit. If cast at a greater or high fire spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by Fire magic and Fire spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 4 symbol RAGHE spells and attacks by manifest greater Fire elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 5 symbol RAGHE spells and attacks by Fire drakes for 1R before being dispelled. If the caster moves, the area protected will move with them.
short_description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by Fire magic and Fire spirits.

description: Summons a greater fire spirit and enable it to manifest. The spirit will require at least a small campfire in order to manifest. The spirit will not ignite things without being asked to but can envelop something and ignite it instantly if it is. The spirit may be asked to attack an opponent and will pursue any who flee up to the range of the spell.
short_description: Summons a greater fire spirit and enable it to manifest. The spirit will require at least a small campfire in order to manifest.

description: Enables the caster (and their accoutrements) to turn to a living flame and allow them to move across a surface. The caster may move at half their AG per round across a floor or ceiling in any direction. They may also move up a vertical surface but not down one. The caster will appear as a burning shape of their normal form. In this form they will illuminate an area of 2Sd radius about them. In this form the caster may see and hear, but will be unable to talk. They will also be unable to cast spells involving other elements, and other spells which might normally affect the body or accoutrements (for example healing) may fail as the spirits may not understand the relevance. They may pass through an aperture which a fire would normally be able to, but not through objects, or very small openings. If the caster is struck by a weapon it will pass harmlessly through them, nor will they take damage from falling, fire, or cold. They may be affected by magic depending upon its effect. Being doused by water will do them no real harm, but will weaken their cohesion. They should attempt to roll Keyx3 to maintain their form. If they should fail this parts of them may be extinguished. Should this happen they will begin to loose cohesion and must attempt to roll Keyx3 on the following rounds to rekindle the affected areas. If totally immersed in water they will have to roll Key rolls each round to keep their form. If the caster is still not whole by the end of the spell they will lose cohesion entirely and their soul will be lost amongst the water spirits.
short_description: Enables the caster (and their accoutrements) to turn to a living flame and allow them to move across a surface.

description: Causes the recipient to become a fiery sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by Fire magic and Fire spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol Raghe spells and attacks by manifest Fire drakes for the duration of the spell. If the sentinel is killed then the spell will cease to function. The sentinel will appear to be aflame for the entire duration of the spell and will burn things that they come into contact with in the same way as a torch. Having their body imbued with such power for such a period of time has its cost. Whilst the sentinel will feel no ill effects whilst the spell is active, they will have been burned all over by the time the spell ends and they will have been reduced to just 1HP. Such damage will recover at the normal rate, though the scarring may be permanent.
short_description: Causes the recipient to become a fiery sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by Fire magic and Fire spirits.

description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by Fire magic and Fire spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol RAGHE spells and attacks by manifest Fire drakes for the duration of the spell. Statues or carved stones can often be found on the walls of ancient buildings or cities to be used for this purpose. The sentinel object will appear to be aflame for the entire duration of the spell and will burn things that they come into contact with in the same way as a torch.
short_description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by Fire magic and Fire spirits.

description: Dismisses a lesser or greater fire elemental. If cast at a high fire spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser or greater fire elemental. If cast at a high fire spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Summons a high fire spirit and allow it to manifest anywhere within range of the spell. The spirit will appear in the form of a fire drake breathing flame and smoke. The fire drake may be directed to attack foes as directed by the caster or set fire to objects etc.
short_description: Summons a high fire spirit and allow it to manifest anywhere within range of the spell. The spirit will appear in the form of a fire drake breathing flame and smoke.

description: Spreads a high, roiling cloud of smoke in a ring above the caster. Random bolts of fire will rain down from this cloud and burn upon the ground for 2R before going out. Initially the ring will affect a 40Sd radius circle about of the point of casting. But the caster may push the width of the whole ring outwards creating an unaffected area in the centre. Doing this will reduce the width of the band of affected sky at the same time. Thus if the ring is pushed out to a 50Sd radius, a 20Sd radius unaffected area could be made in the centre but the width of the affected band would have been reduced to just 30Sd Such bolts will set fire to anything readily flammable that they remain in contact with. The chance of being struck by a fire-bolt is 15% for each round that someone remains below the area of the cloud. Since each bolt falls from above, there would be a possibility to dodge on a successful perception roll. A fire-bolt will cause 2D6 damage to a target. The caster will be immune to being struck.
short_description: Spreads a high, roiling cloud of smoke in a ring above the caster. Random bolts of fire will rain down from this cloud and burn upon the ground for 2R before going out.

description: Dismisses a manifest lesser, greater or high Fire elemental spirit.
short_description: Dismisses a manifest lesser, greater or high Fire elemental spirit.
Spell Glyphs: Raghe + Maef + Ghan + Ovet + Eyama + Chom

description: Helps to Keep the caster pleasantly cool even in tropical conditions. If cast in icy conditions this spell will halve the time between exposure or frostbite rolls.
short_description: Helps to Keep the caster pleasantly cool even in tropical conditions. If cast in icy conditions this spell will halve the time between exposure or frostbite rolls.

description: Helps to protect the caster from the effects of cold. It is the equivalent of wearing a thick coat. The spell will double the time between exposure and frostbite rolls, if the conditions are cold enough to warrant this.
short_description: Helps to protect the caster from the effects of cold. It is the equivalent of wearing a thick coat.

description: Allows the caster to turn rain over a 4Sd area into a flurry of snow for the duration of the spell. Alternatively, if it is not raining, this may be done by throwing hands-full of water or ice into the air. Though it might provide a temporary distraction the flurry will not seriously affect visibility.
short_description: Allows the caster to turn rain over a 4Sd area into a flurry of snow for the duration of the spell.

description: The caster may freeze a surface or the outside of an object up to a diameter of 1Sd, making it cold and slippery with ice rime. The surface of water may be frozen a ring thick with this spell. This will not freeze a living creature but it will coat their clothes, armour or fur with ice rime, reduce their AG by 2 points and will certainly make them feel chilled. Ice created this way will begin to thaw at a rate consistent with the surrounding temperature (e.g. on a hot day within 12R).
short_description: The caster may freeze a surface or the outside of an object up to a diameter of 1Sd, making it cold and slippery with ice rime. The surface of water may be frozen a ring thick with this spell.

description: Gives the caster increased resistance to cold damage, so that they only take half damage from cold or frost based attacks.
short_description: Gives the caster increased resistance to cold damage, so that they only take half damage from cold or frost based attacks.

description: Summons a chill vapour to do the enchanter’s bidding. The vapour cannot attack anyone directly but may create a patch of ice on any surface up to 1Sd in diameter, anyone stepping on such a patch must make a balance roll or slip and fall. The patch will only last 12R in non-freezing weather conditions. The chill vapour may also freeze objects together for 12R in non-freezing conditions, wheels to the ground, swords in scabbards doors in their frames etc. In freezing conditions the effects the vapour produces will remain until the temperature rises.
short_description: Summons a chill vapour to do the enchanter’s bidding.

description: Makes the target out of tune with the spirits of cold, slow the target down when traversing ice or snow by making it slippery or their feet sink. This will effectively reduce the target’s AG on ice or snow by 2 points.
short_description: Makes the target out of tune with the spirits of cold, slow the target down when traversing ice or snow by making it slippery or their feet sink.

description: Enables the recipient to embrace the spirit of ice and cold. This will allow the recipient to move sure footed across ice or snow. Effectively this will increase their AG by 2 points.
short_description: Enables the recipient to embrace the spirit of ice and cold. This will allow the recipient to move sure footed across ice or snow.

description: Enables the caster to share the inexorable force of the ice, giving them up to +4STR when making pushing or breaking rolls involving strength (but not resisting). The spell will add +2STR generally. This spell will also add +1 to the caster’s damage bonus whilst active.
short_description: Enables the caster to share the inexorable force of the ice, giving them up to +4STR when making pushing or breaking rolls involving strength (but not resisting). The spell will add +2STR generally.

description: Causes the blade or head of the weapon that the caster is holding to become frosted with ice rime. Or the caster may simply make touch attacks directly on a target. On a successful hit the weapon or touch will cause +1 frost damage and the target must make a stun roll. The weapon will also be able to cause 1 point of damage to magical fire creatures such as fire spirits. If used against a water spirit it will reduce its AG by 1 point on a successful hit.
short_description: Causes the blade or head of the weapon that the caster is holding to become frosted with ice rime. Or the caster may simply make touch attacks directly on a target.

description: Wraps the caster in a layer of light frost that will help to keep them cool, even in searing oven-like temperatures. The spell will protect against 2 points of fire damage.
short_description: Wraps the caster in a layer of light frost that will help to keep them cool, even in searing oven-like temperatures. The spell will protect against 2 points of fire damage.

description: Prevents a recipient from suffering from snow blindness, it will also cure anyone who is already suffering from the condition.
short_description: Prevents a recipient from suffering from snow blindness, it will also cure anyone who is already suffering from the condition.

description: Causes a tiny volume of snow or ice, no more than a few Rg on a side, to violently explode in a cloud of snow and vapour leaving a permanent hole. Whilst the explosion is unlikely to harm anyone it will certainly be loud, surprising all within hearing distance. Anyone within 1Sd should roll for a stun. Whilst the explosion will not generally do any real harm most spectators will probably believe it to be terrifying and will probably run or take cover accordingly. If cast upon a manifest ice spirit it will cause that creature 1D6 HP of physical damage.
short_description: Causes a tiny volume of snow or ice, no more than a few Rg on a side, to violently explode in a cloud of snow and vapour leaving a permanent hole.

description: Allows the caster to turn rain over a 20Sd area into a continual fall of snow fall for the duration of the spell. Alternatively, if it is not raining, this may be done by throwing a hands-full of water or ice into the air. The snowfall will be fairly steady and will leave a thin layer of snow on everything it falls on. The snow will melt at the rate expected for the ambient temperature.
short_description: Allows the caster to turn rain over a 20Sd area into a continual fall of snow fall for the duration of the spell.

description: Will turn snow falling up to the limit of the spell’s range into rain. If the ambient conditions are below freezing, then the rainwater may well freeze as it makes contact with the ground or other objects coating everything in a glaze of ice.
short_description: Will turn snow falling up to the limit of the spell’s range into rain.

description: Rapidly freezes an object up to 1Sd in diameter. The spell may also freeze the surface of something up to 2Sd in diameter to a depth of 1Lk including running water. Living creatures cannot be frozen in this manner although their clothing etc. may be frosted causing them to suffer 1 point of frost damage and halving their AG for 1R. Once frozen the object affected will begin to thaw at the normal rate depending upon the surrounding air temperature.
short_description: Rapidly freezes an object up to 1Sd in diameter. The spell may also freeze the surface of something up to 2Sd in diameter to a depth of 1Lk including running water.

description: Enables the caster to draw the spirit of ice and cold into themselves. The caster’s skin will feel cool to the touch. This will giving them up to +8STR when making pushing or breaking rolls involving strength and +4STR generally. This spell will also add +2 to the caster’s damage bonus whilst active.
short_description: Enables the caster to draw the spirit of ice and cold into themselves. The caster’s skin will feel cool to the touch.

description: Causes the blade or head of the weapon that the caster is holding to become intensely cold. This can include a missile weapon that they are holding such as an arrow or stone. When the weapon hits a target it will stick to them even if it did not penetrate their armour. Once stuck the weapon will cause 1 point of VGR damage, due to cold, per round that it remains in contact with the target. If the affected weapon parries or is parried by another weapon or shield it will stick to that, and the wielder will begin to take cold damage through their own weapon after one round as above, and will continue to do so until they remove the caster’s weapon or drop their own. The caster may un-stick their weapon at any time they choose, for anyone else to remove it they must make a STR vs the caster’s KEY roll to pull it off whatever it was stuck to. Such a frosted weapon will not cause any damage to the wielder unless it is someone other than the caster. (NB if the caster has no weapons but casts the spell whilst cupping water in their hands they can create a lump of ice which may be used in the same way as a thrown rock and still cause the same damage outlined in the spell).
short_description: Causes the blade or head of the weapon that the caster is holding to become intensely cold. This can include a missile weapon that they are holding such as an arrow or stone.

description: Allows the caster to call a jumble of icy spikes from the ground or water wherever they indicate within range. The spikes will occupy an area roughly 1Sd across and will cause 1D6 damage to anyone standing in the area as the spikes emerge. The caster may repeat this once each round for the duration of the spell, each calling counting as a (spell) combat action. Opponents may dodge or parry the spikes like a weapon attack; they are brittle and may be snapped or smashed. In freezing conditions the spikes will be longer and stronger, causing 2D6 damage. While the spell is active the clumps of spikes will remain where summoned and will still cause damage to anyone else stumbling into them. Once the spell ends the spikes will begin to quickly thaw and collapse. In icy conditions the spikes may remain indefinitely.
short_description: Allows the caster to call a jumble of icy spikes from the ground or water wherever they indicate within range.

description: Requires a ball of ice or compacted snow about the size of a man’s hand. The ice may be placed anywhere the enchanter requires. However, should anyone else touch or disturb the ice it will explode into shards causing 2D6+2 damage to anyone within 1Sd and 1D6+1 to anyone within 2Sd. It is also possible for the caster to throw the ball and should it hit another living creature the spell will be triggered. Once the ice has exploded the spell is finished. Because the spell is very similar to creating a magical object, the ice piece may remain active indefinitely, whilst the caster’s key spent will take a week to regenerate the three points used. Because the spell relies on a piece of ice, it will simply melt if the surrounding temperature rises above freezing, although a sudden burst of heat such as a torch flame is likely to set it off.
short_description: Requires a ball of ice or compacted snow about the size of a man’s hand. The ice may be placed anywhere the enchanter requires.

description: Creates thin plates of ice on each of the caster’s forearms. The ice may be used to parry attacks at the caster’s basic attack or a buckler shield skill if they have one. The effective shield HP are 4. If a blow parried overcomes the HP of the ice shield, the ice will shatter and cannot be used to parry again that round. The shield, however, will reform by the start of the next round. If a blow parried is less that the shield HP the weapon will strike into the shield and the ice will re-grow around it. The attacker must then spend a combat action tugging their weapon free. If the caster makes a critical parry, regardless of the damage the opponent did, the caster may elect to twist the opponent’s weapon from their grasp in this way.
short_description: Creates thin plates of ice on each of the caster’s forearms. The ice may be used to parry attacks at the caster’s basic attack or a buckler shield skill if they have one.

description: Renders an area of ice, snow or permafrost immune to digging chiselling, impact or melting. It will also protect against creatures normally able to move through ice physically. The defence may be created as a sphere around the caster (or if above ground a hemisphere below them). The sphere will have a radius of 1Sd per level of the caster. Alternatively the caster may choose to create it as a flat barrier 2Sd wide by 2Sd high per level of the caster, in both cases the barrier will be 1Sd thick. This spell has little or no effect in temperate conditions.
short_description: Renders an area of ice, snow or permafrost immune to digging chiselling, impact or melting. It will also protect against creatures normally able to move through ice physically.

description: Renders the target completely immune to the effects of cold for the duration of the spell. This includes exposure, frostbite and magic chill vapour attacks from ice spirits or similar.
short_description: Renders the target completely immune to the effects of cold for the duration of the spell. This includes exposure, frostbite and magic chill vapour attacks from ice spirits or similar.

description: This spell will hide any tracks made on snow or ice by the caster and other creatures travelling within a 4Sd range of them. It may also be used to hide tracks made by the caster before the spell was cast within the 4Sd radius.
short_description: This spell will hide any tracks made on snow or ice by the caster and other creatures travelling within a 4Sd range of them.

description: Enables the caster to create the illusion of snow and ice, over an area up to 4Sd across in all dimensions. The illusion may be a duplication of another area of ice or snow within range of the spell as indicated by the caster during casting. If no area is indicated or available the illusion will be of generic ice and snow. The illusion will be convincingly three dimensional until walked through.
short_description: Enables the caster to create the illusion of snow and ice, over an area up to 4Sd across in all dimensions.

description: Allows the caster to hear sounds made upon an ice sheet some considerable distance away. Depending on the size and continuous nature of the ice sounds up to 5mille away may be heard. The caster will gain a rough idea of direction as well as numbers and even type of animal. The caster must place their ear to the ice and make a listen roll to be able to interpret what they are hearing.
short_description: Allows the caster to hear sounds made upon an ice sheet some considerable distance away. Depending on the size and continuous nature of the ice sounds up to 5mille away may be heard.

description: Creates a man from snow roughly 1Sd high. The man will usually have stones for eyes and a root vegetable for a nose. It serves no useful purpose and will melt when the surrounding snow does.
short_description: Creates a man from snow roughly 1Sd high. The man will usually have stones for eyes and a root vegetable for a nose.

description: Defrosts a large frozen object over a period of 6 rounds. The spell will work on reasonably large areas such as a snowed up doorway, or the rigging of a ship, and whilst it may be used to free a ship from ice, it will not remove the ice from the surrounding sea.
short_description: Defrosts a large frozen object over a period of 6 rounds.

description: Causes a 2Sd long by 4Lk wide block of ice to form where the caster indicates. This ice block will remain quite solid for the duration of the spell but will become crumbly once the spell is ended. The created ice block may be used to block a doorway and may even be caused to appear horizontally from a crevasse wall or face to provide a step up or small bridge. If cast in non-freezing conditions the object will be half the size (or less) and will last a proportionally shorter time.
short_description: Causes a 2Sd long by 4Lk wide block of ice to form where the caster indicates. This ice block will remain quite solid for the duration of the spell but will become crumbly once the spell is ended.

description: Enables the caster to quickly thaw frozen food goods over a period of 6 rounds. The food will not spoil in the process and will taste as fresh as when it was originally frozen..
short_description: Enables the caster to quickly thaw frozen food goods over a period of 6 rounds. The food will not spoil in the process and will taste as fresh as when it was originally frozen..

description: Causes the ice or snow which the caster is touching to yield enough edible items to feed one person for one day. The food will appear within 1R of the spell being cast but may have to be dug or chipped out of the ice. The feast will be of a frozen nature and may include peas, assorted breaded fish or chicken pieces, or fruit glaçes depending on the locality.
short_description: Causes the ice or snow which the caster is touching to yield enough edible items to feed one person for one day.

description: Summons a lesser ice spirit and allow it to manifest. The spirit will normally appear as a chill vapour, although if there is already ice or snow available it may appear as a sort of moving lattice of ice and frost. The spirit may leave a trail of slippery ice to hinder someone’s passage. The vapour may also freeze an area of water up to 1Sd each round thick enough to walk upon. It can freeze objects together such as locks and cartwheels etc. A lesser ice spirit can also be ordered to create fissures in existing ice or snow to enable passage. Lesser Ice spirits may also be ordered to envelop a foe, causing them to suffer cold effects for each round that they remain within the spirit (see lesser ice spirit for description).
short_description: Summons a lesser ice spirit and allow it to manifest.

description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 3 symbol MU spells and attacks by manifest lesser ice elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 4 symbol MU spells and attacks by greater ice elementals for 1R before being dispelled. It will be dispelled by any 5 symbol spells or the attack of an ice drake.
short_description: Wards the caster from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits.

description: Enables the caster to scry a place using a pure clear piece of ice. Such ice is difficult to find since most ice contains impurities or air bubbles. Ice cleared using an MU-LERRU spell will also serve. The caster must use a small sample of material from the place to be scried, such as ice or dirt. The sample must be pushed and ground into the pure ice when casting the spell. Both the pure ice and the sample cannot be used again after. The place to be scried must also be somewhere cold or near ice. No sound will be heard. The ranges for levels of caster are as follows: level 1 1 mille level 2 5 mille level 3 25 mille level 4 100 mille level 5 unknown
short_description: Enables the caster to scry a place using a pure clear piece of ice. Such ice is difficult to find since most ice contains impurities or air bubbles.

description: Enables the caster to ‘hear’ the spirits of ice. To do so the caster must put their ear to the frozen ground, snow or ice. Ice spirits can be quite active and talkative amongst themselves and the caster to may listen to these exchanges. They have little regard for living creatures and will rarely respond to questions unless the caster is very high level and deals in ice magic regularly. Simply listening the caster may gain insights about what is happening in the environment around, what the weather will bring in the next few days.
short_description: Enables the caster to ‘hear’ the spirits of ice. To do so the caster must put their ear to the frozen ground, snow or ice.

description: Will make a volume of ice up to 1Sd on a side per level of the caster soft and malleable under the caster’s hands. They may sculpt the ice into any shape limited only by their own artistry. When the spell ends the ice will become as brittle as normal ice but will usually remain in the shape it has been sculpted into.
short_description: Will make a volume of ice up to 1Sd on a side per level of the caster soft and malleable under the caster’s hands. They may sculpt the ice into any shape limited only by their own artistry.

description: Acts to stop an avalanche that has already started, or secure an area of loose snow and ice to prevent it falling. If the caster is at sea it can protect their vessel from crushing icebergs or sea ice. It may also thin or weaken ice upon water so that it may be broken through.
short_description: Acts to stop an avalanche that has already started, or secure an area of loose snow and ice to prevent it falling.

description: Causes a volume of ice up to 1 Lk on a side, to violently explode in a cloud of snow leaving a permanent hole. Anyone stood within 1Sd will take 1D6 points of damage, and will automatically be knocked off their feet. Anyone within 2Sd will a suffer a knockback attack with a strength of 50 from the force of the explosion. Most spectators will probably believe it to be terrifying and will probably run or take cover accordingly. If cast upon a manifest ice spirit it will cause that creature 3D6 HP of physical damage.
short_description: Causes a volume of ice up to 1 Lk on a side, to violently explode in a cloud of snow leaving a permanent hole.

description: Causes the caster to become encased in an articulated layer of ice crystals up to 1Lk thick. The armoured layer will halve the caster’s AG but will give them 10 points of armour protection against cutting and impaling attacks and 5 points against smashing attacks. The icy encasing will work with other, non-magically active, armour. It will provide protection from fire and heat damage up to a total of 100 points. The caster will be able to see and breathe through the ice but their vision and hearing will be greatly reduced by half. Whilst the character will not have to bear the weight of the icy armour their effective weight will quadruple and checks should be made if they attempt to walk across any ground or floor that may be unable to bear the weight.
short_description: Causes the caster to become encased in an articulated layer of ice crystals up to 1Lk thick.

description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to ice. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired. The recipient will maintain roughly their normal form, but transparent and icy. Whilst in this form they will not be able to move. If they were already moving when the spell was cast, like riding a horse or falling, they will continue to do so. The recipient will be able to see and hear, but cannot cast magic. They will not feel pain if struck and will take no damage from normal water, lightning or acid whilst the spell is in effect. Fire will only cause normal fire damage. The recipient will have an effective skin armour of 15 points and a blow will need to exceed this to do any damage. NB a critical simply means the weapon does double damage, the critical tables cannot be used to ignore armour.
short_description: Enables the caster to turn a humanoid target, and their accoutrements, to ice. The caster may use the spell on themselves if desired.

description: Allows an individual, frozen through magical means, to be thawed out over 6 rounds without any harm befalling them. The spell has mixed results when used upon people who have been frozen naturally who may have died of cold before they became frozen, this is up to the GM. Such characters they may be brought back to life with a successful healing roll (if they were living at the time of being frozen).
short_description: Allows an individual, frozen through magical means, to be thawed out over 6 rounds without any harm befalling them.

description: For this spell to work the recipient must be placed in a specially prepared ice cave or snow hole and interred there for at least a day. The spell will heal the recipient of any burns they have suffered. This includes burns from fire, acid and frost. As long as the spell is cast before a burn has finished healing this spell will also ensure that no scarring is left as a result. It should also be noted that the spell will restore damaged skin tissue, but not muscle cartilage or bone. Thus it may restore fingers burned or frost bitten to the bone, but not a hand. The spell will effectively restore any HP lost as a result of burning, but not other kinds of wounds. The spell will not restore scarring or damaged digits from old burns that have already healed. If an ice cave or snow hole has already been created it will take 1D6 minutes to prepare the spell, with suitable chanting and markings. The recipient is be placed within and then packed in with loose snow and ice . The recipient will feel cold, but soon a warm hypothermic sleep will overcome them. If the subject should exit or be removed before the spell has run its course then the burns will only be partly healed and the cavity will need to prepared again and the spell re-cast.
short_description: For this spell to work the recipient must be placed in a specially prepared ice cave or snow hole and interred there for at least a day.

description: Turns an animal target, and their accoutrements, to ice. The beast will maintain roughly its normal form, but transparent and icy. Whilst in this form it will not be able to move. The beast will be able to see and hear, but cannot make any sound. It will not feel pain if struck and will take no damage from normal water, lightning or acid whilst the spell is in effect. Fire will only cause normal fire damage. The beast will have an effective skin armour of 15 points and a blow will need to exceed this to do any damage. NB a critical simply means the weapon does double damage, the critical tables cannot be used to ignore armour.
short_description: Turns an animal target, and their accoutrements, to ice. The beast will maintain roughly its normal form, but transparent and icy.

description: Turns an object up to 1Sd across to solid ice. The object will maintain roughly its normal form, but will appear translucent and be freezing to the touch. Whilst in this form it may be moved, but will weigh as much as an equivalent volume of solid ice. The object will float on water as ice and will take no damage from lightning or acid. If struck, the object will have an effective armour of 10 before taking damage. A critical attack will cause double damage rather than ignoring this armour. Damage made to the object in this form will remain on the object when it thaws at the end of the spell.
short_description: Turns an object up to 1Sd across to solid ice. The object will maintain roughly its normal form, but will appear translucent and be freezing to the touch.

description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of damage from ice, cold and frost. The object will not be warmed, but will not get any cooler whilst the spell is in effect. The spell will also protect from the physical results of attacks by ice elementals or ice spells that would otherwise cause damage. The spell will be effective on objects such as a large building or ship that would fit within the radius of the spell’s area of effect.
short_description: Protects the target object and its contents from the effects of damage from ice, cold and frost. The object will not be warmed, but will not get any cooler whilst the spell is in effect.

description: This combination enables the caster to slowly pass through any ice they touch at a rate of 1Sd every round. The caster will suffer no ill effects from cold whilst the spell is in effect. They may cast spells whilst within the ice. If the spell runs out before they have exited the ice then they will become entombed. The entombed individual will have been magically frozen and may be thawed magically and brought back to life.
short_description: This combination enables the caster to slowly pass through any ice they touch at a rate of 1Sd every round. The caster will suffer no ill effects from cold whilst the spell is in effect.

description: Dismisses a lesser ice spirit. If cast at a greater or high ice spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: Dismisses a lesser ice spirit. If cast at a greater or high ice spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits. The spell will give complete protection from any 4 glyph Mu spells and attacks by manifest greater ice elementals for the duration of the spell. It will protect from 5 glyph Mu spells and attacks by ice drakes for 1R before being dispelled. If the caster moves, the area protected will move with them.
short_description: Wards an area of 20Sd radius about the caster from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits.

description: Summons a standard ice spirit and allows it to manifest. Such an spirit will only appear as a larger chill vapour if the surrounding temperature is much above freezing. The spirit may be asked to attack a target or to cause one of the other abilities of which they are capable.
short_description: Summons a standard ice spirit and allows it to manifest. Such an spirit will only appear as a larger chill vapour if the surrounding temperature is much above freezing.

description: Whilst the spell is active, this causes jumbles of icy spikes to randomly erupt from the ground anywhere within a 20Sd radius of the point of casting. The chances of anyone within the area being hit by such a spike is 10% on any given round. Anyone hit by a spike will suffer 1D6 damage in normal conditions or 2D6 in freezing. Opponents may dodge or parry the spikes like a weapon attack; they are brittle and may be snapped or smashed. With the exception of the caster, the spikes are indiscriminate, harming both friend and foe alike. While the spell is active the clumps of icy spikes will remain where they appear and will still cause damage to anyone else stumbling into them. Once the spell ends the spikes will begin to quickly thaw and collapse. In icy conditions the spikes may remain indefinitely..
short_description: Whilst the spell is active, this causes jumbles of icy spikes to randomly erupt from the ground anywhere within a 20Sd radius of the point of casting.

description: If cast over snow or ice or snow this will produce a wall of ice, anywhere that the caster indicates within range. The wall will have a steep side facing away from the caster and a sloping side facing towards them. The wall will be 1Sd high, 2Sd thick and 2Sd long per level of the caster, and may be made higher thicker or longer with each further casting of the spell. The wall will be extremely slippery anyone attempting to climb up it may only do so at -50%. They will however take 1 VGR damage from cold for each round that they are on the wall. When the spell finishes the wall will split apart. If the spell is cast in warm conditions, a wall of freezing fog will be summoned of the same dimensions Anyone attempting to pass through the fog will take 1VGR damage for each round that they remain within it. The fog will not hinder anyone moving through it but will obscure anything behind it.
short_description: If cast over snow or ice or snow this will produce a wall of ice, anywhere that the caster indicates within range.

description: Sends a ball of frost from the caster’s hand. The icy ball will travel under its own power in a direct line at a speed of 10Sd each round until it hits the first obstruction in its path. Anything within 1Sd of its passage will be covered in a rime of frost and water will gain a thin covering of ice. When the ball hits a target it will burst in a large and freezing cloud engulfing an area up to 4Sd across. Anything caught within the cloud will be covered in a hard icy glaze and water will freeze solid. The glaze has STR/HP of 1D10+12. Any living creature covered will take 1D8+3 frost damage and will continue to take a further point of damage each round they remain trapped. Objects affected my become brittle. In warm conditions the ice will begin to melt as normal for the air temperature. In freezing conditions the missile will travel twice as fast (and as far), and the freezing effect can remain indefinitely. The accuracy of the missile is as follows: range accuracy 10Sd 60% 20Sd 50% 40Sd 40% 80Sd 30% 120Sd 20% 240Sd 10%
short_description: Sends a ball of frost from the caster’s hand. The icy ball will travel under its own power in a direct line at a speed of 10Sd each round until it hits the first obstruction in its path.

description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol MU spells and attacks by manifest ice drakes for the duration of the spell. If the sentinel is killed then the spell will cease to function. Having their body imbued with such power for such a period of time has its cost. An area of 1Sd about the sentinel will feel noticeably cooler. The skin of the sentinel will begin to turn blue and frost over. This will slowly reduce their AG and DFT(DEX) by roughly 1 point per hour over the course of the spell. Once the sentinel’s AG and DFT(DEX) are reduced to 0 they will be frozen in position like a statue. When the spell ends their AG(DEX) will start to recover at a rate of 1 point each hour. However, a D10 should be rolled for toes and a D10 for fingers. The number rolled for each will be the number of extremities affected by frostbite. The number of affected fingers will reduce DFT and the number of Toes AG, by 1 point each (or in the case of DEX the sum of the both divided by 2). A D100 should be rolled for each affected finger or toe, if 96-00 is rolled the frostbite damage and the points lost will be permanent. Otherwise these points will heal at a slower rate of 1 point a week.
short_description: Causes the recipient to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about them from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits.

description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits. The sentinel will give complete protection from any 5 symbol MU spells and attacks by manifest ice drakes for the duration of the spell. Statues or carved stones can often be found on the walls of ancient buildings or cities to be used for this purpose. The sentinel object will become frosted with ice rime.
short_description: Causes the target object to become a sentinel, warding an area of 20Sd radius about it from direct attacks by ice magic and ice spirits.

description: Turns the caster and their non-magical accoutrements, into an area of ice rime, able to creep across almost any surface in any direction they choose. They may even move across ceilings and up ropes. They may move at 4Sd each round, regardless of direction. The frost patch may move across the surface of cool liquid water but may take 1D4 damage for each skinfull of warm water thrown upon it and double damage from fire. The recipient may see but cannot cast spells in this form. In this form they do not take damage when struck by a weapon and may re-form if broken up in some way (If allowed to). The frost may grow through small cracks or holes provided that they can get all of their material through before the spell ends. This may take 1D10+4 rounds to complete depending upon the size of holes the frost is creeping through. On the round that the spell ends the recipient will re-form into their normal shape.
short_description: Turns the caster and their non-magical accoutrements, into an area of ice rime, able to creep across almost any surface in any direction they choose. They may even move across ceilings and up ropes.

description: Whilst the spell is active, this causes jumbles of icy spikes to randomly erupt from the ground anywhere in a ring around the caster. Initially the ring will be in a 40Sd radius circle about of the point of casting. But the caster may push the width of the whole ring outwards creating an unaffected area in the centre. Doing this will reduce the width of the band of affected ground at the same time. Thus if the ring is pushed out to a 50Sd radius, a 20Sd radius unaffected area could be made in the centre but the width of the affected band would have been reduced to just 30Sd The chances of anyone within the area being hit by such a spike is 10% on any given round. Anyone hit by a spike will suffer 1D6 damage in normal conditions or 2D6 in freezing. Opponents may dodge or parry the spikes like a weapon attack; they are brittle and may be snapped or smashed. With the exception of the caster, the spikes are indiscriminate, harming both friend and foe alike. While the spell is active the clumps of icy spikes will remain where they appear and will still cause damage to anyone else stumbling into them. Once the spell ends the spikes will begin to quickly thaw and collapse. In icy conditions the spikes may remain indefinitely.
short_description: Whilst the spell is active, this causes jumbles of icy spikes to randomly erupt from the ground anywhere in a ring around the caster.

description: This spell will dismiss a lesser or greater ice spirit. If cast at a high ice spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.
short_description: This spell will dismiss a lesser or greater ice spirit. If cast at a high ice spirit it will cause it to stop its actions for 1R.

description: Summons a high ice spirit which will erupt from the nearest body of ice or snow within range in the form of a great white dragon. The spirit may be asked by the caster to attack a foe. It may pursue a fleeing opponent and will obey any instructions given by the caster.
short_description: Summons a high ice spirit which will erupt from the nearest body of ice or snow within range in the form of a great white dragon. The spirit may be asked by the caster to attack a foe.

description: Dismisses a manifest lesser, greater or high ice elemental spirit.
short_description: Dismisses a manifest lesser, greater or high ice elemental spirit.
Spell Glyphs: Mu + Maef + Ghan + Ovet + Eyama + Chom

description: Enables the caster to sense in which direction North lies..
short_description: Enables the caster to sense in which direction North lies..

description: Halves the chance of the caster being struck by random electrical discharges, including lightning strikes.
short_description: Halves the chance of the caster being struck by random electrical discharges, including lightning strikes.

description: Enables the caster to attract and slowly move small iron or steel items by gesturing with their casting hand up to the range of the spell. Items may even be moved on the other side of another material like wooden boards. Items up to the size/weight of a large knife may be moved in this way. The effect is dependent on the will of the caster and can be switched on or off as desired.
short_description: Enables the caster to attract and slowly move small iron or steel items by gesturing with their casting hand up to the range of the spell.

description: Generates dancing sparks across the caster’s fingers giving off an erratic light. A simple touch will cause another person or creature to experience a jolt. If that person fails a VGRx3 roll they will lose their next action in the round. The jolt is enough to make someone wary of being touched again. Such a shock is usually enough to cause most animals to make an INT check or flee. The caster may do this once each round.
short_description: Generates dancing sparks across the caster’s fingers giving off an erratic light. A simple touch will cause another person or creature to experience a jolt.

description: Summons a spark which will occupy the caster’s clothing and skin, or an object as directed. The spark will cause the caster no harm and may occasionally be seen leaping from place to place about their person. Should anyone touch the caster or object either directly, or with a conductive object like a sword, they will receive a minor shock. The shock will cause 1 point of damage and the victim must make a stun roll.
short_description: Summons a spark which will occupy the caster’s clothing and skin, or an object as directed.

description: Protects the caster completely from natural lightning strikes and electrical damage. The spell will also halve the chances of being struck by magical lightning. Also should they be struck they will only take half the normal damage and will not be stunned.
short_description: Protects the caster completely from natural lightning strikes and electrical damage. The spell will also halve the chances of being struck by magical lightning.

description: Causes the powers of lightning to enter the nerves making the target become doubly sensitive to pain. A scratch will feel like a cut, a slap like a punch and a toothache unendurable. A spell favoured by interrogators.
short_description: Causes the powers of lightning to enter the nerves making the target become doubly sensitive to pain. A scratch will feel like a cut, a slap like a punch and a toothache unendurable.

description: Takes the power of lightning from the recipient’s nerves, dulling any feelings of pain. Whilst the recipient will still be aware that they have pain, it will be bearable whilst the spell is active.
short_description: Takes the power of lightning from the recipient’s nerves, dulling any feelings of pain. Whilst the recipient will still be aware that they have pain, it will be bearable whilst the spell is active.

description: This spell enables the caster to embrace the spirit of lightning speeding up their hand eye coordination considerably. This will effectively add +4 to their DFT for the duration of the spell.
short_description: This spell enables the caster to embrace the spirit of lightning speeding up their hand eye coordination considerably. This will effectively add +4 to their DFT for the duration of the spell.

description: If cast upon any metal headed or bladed weapon (including missile weapons) the weapon will gain a small electrical charge. A target hit by the weapon will receive a small shock and must make a stun roll. Such damage ignores armour (apart from full plate), and will also discharge through a metal parrying weapon like a sword or shield. The jolt will require any creatures of animal intelligence to make an INT check to avoid fleeing or selecting a different opponent.
short_description: If cast upon any metal headed or bladed weapon (including missile weapons) the weapon will gain a small electrical charge.

description: Creates a field of energy about the caster that will cause a spark to jump to anyone or anything that gets close to touching. The spark will have no more effect on a human than shocking them a little, but will stun a creature the size of a rat or smaller and will zap small insects. The spell will also prevent any lint or dust from settling on the caster’s clothing.
short_description: Creates a field of energy about the caster that will cause a spark to jump to anyone or anything that gets close to touching.

description: A spell that allows the enchanter to cause a thunderclap to sound by clapping their hands together. This may be done as many times as the caster wishes whilst the spell is still in effect.
short_description: A spell that allows the enchanter to cause a thunderclap to sound by clapping their hands together. This may be done as many times as the caster wishes whilst the spell is still in effect.

description: Enables the caster to attract iron or steel items from up to 4Sd with a STR equivalent to their Key. Smaller, lighter items may fly through the air to the caster’s hand. Larger items may be dragged or simply toppled.
short_description: Enables the caster to attract iron or steel items from up to 4Sd with a STR equivalent to their Key. Smaller, lighter items may fly through the air to the caster’s hand.

description: Generates wild sparks from the caster’s hands. The caster may touch someone once each round giving them a stun even through metal armour. Anyone else they touch in that same round will still receive an unpleasant jolt. The caster may also try use such sparks to restart a heart that has stopped (recently). Such sparks will ignite explosive gases or readily flammable substances.
short_description: Generates wild sparks from the caster’s hands. The caster may touch someone once each round giving them a stun even through metal armour.
